papers.title: A New Adaptive Deep Learning based Reduced Order Model for Hybrid-Type Parabolic PDEs: Rigorous Error Analysis and Applications
papers.summary: This contribution proposes novel data-driven surrogate modeling approaches for parameterized parabolic PDEs, where the parameter dependence can be split into two parts with different decay behavior of the Kolmogorov $N$-width. Such problems naturally arise in many industrial flow processes with dominant advection or traveling fronts in the solution trajectories. To tackle this challenge, we extend the Deep Orthogonal Decomposition (DOD) method, recently introduced for related stationary problems, to the time-dependent setting. We introduce and rigorously analyze two DOD based approaches: Our approach is based on two novel adaptive deep learning-based surrogate models: The DOD-DL-ROM method which is a Reduced Order Model (ROM) that leverages the adaptive nature of DOD, and the DOD+DFNN method, which combines DOD with a generic Deep Feed-Forward Neural Network (DFNN). On the theory side, we generalize data-driven POD-based ROM arguments to the DOD setting, establishing a quantitative link between online performance and the regularity of an associated optimal map. Furthermore, we identify specific problem size and error tolerance requirements for DOD-based ROMs to outperform POD-based ROMs in hybrid-type problem classes, which is crucial for efficient computation. The significance of this work lies in its potential to accelerate the solution of complex PDEs, enabling faster design and optimization of industrial processes. The proposed approaches are demonstrated on a catalyst filter benchmark problem, showcasing their effectiveness and comparing favorably to traditional POD-based methods.

ai.tldr: 提出两种基于自适应深度学习的降阶模型（DOD-DL-ROM和DOD+DFNN），用于处理具有混合型Kolmogorov N-width衰减的参数抛物型PDE，并给出严格误差分析。
ai.motivation: 工业流动过程中常出现平流或行波主导的解轨迹，导致传统POD方法效率低下，需要更高效的代理模型。
ai.method: 将Deep Orthogonal Decomposition（DOD）扩展到时间依赖问题，结合自适应深度学习构建DOD-DL-ROM和DOD+DFNN两种降阶模型，并建立数据驱动POD与DOD之间的理论联系。
ai.result: 在催化剂过滤器基准问题上验证了方法的有效性，相比传统POD方法具有优势，并给出了DOD优于POD的问题规模和误差容忍条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户加速复杂PDE求解，用于工业过程的设计与优化。

idea_spark.idea: 结合DOD与深度前馈网络，利用自适应基函数捕捉混合型衰减特征。
idea_spark.risk: 深度网络训练可能过拟合或需要大量数据，理论误差界依赖于最优映射的正则性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将静态DOD方法推广到时间依赖问题，并建立严格的误差分析框架。

en.tldr: Proposes two adaptive deep learning-based reduced order models (DOD-DL-ROM and DOD+DFNN) for parametric parabolic PDEs with hybrid Kolmogorov N-width decay, with rigorous error analysis.
en.motivation: Industrial flow processes often exhibit advection-dominated or traveling front solutions, making traditional POD methods inefficient and requiring more effective surrogate models.
en.method: Extends Deep Orthogonal Decomposition (DOD) to time-dependent settings, combining adaptive deep learning to construct DOD-DL-ROM and DOD+DFNN, and establishes theoretical links between data-driven POD and DOD.
en.result: Demonstrates effectiveness on a catalyst filter benchmark, outperforming traditional POD methods, and identifies conditions where DOD surpasses POD in terms of problem size and error tolerance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users accelerate complex PDE solutions for industrial design and optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combines DOD with deep feedforward networks to capture hybrid decay features via adaptive basis functions.
idea_spark.risk: Deep network training may overfit or require large data; theoretical error bounds depend on regularity of the optimal map.
idea_spark.inspiration: Generalizes static DOD to time-dependent problems with a rigorous error analysis framework.

papers.title: Relaxation-Informed Training of Neural Network Surrogate Models
papers.summary: ReLU neural networks trained as surrogate models can be embedded exactly in mixed-integer linear programs (MILPs), enabling global optimization over the learned function. The tractability of the resulting MILP depends on structural properties of the network, i.e., the number of binary variables in associated formulations and the tightness of the continuous LP relaxation. These properties are determined during training, yet standard training objectives (prediction loss with classical weight regularization) offer no mechanism to directly control them. This work studies training regularizers that directly target downstream MILP tractability. Specifically, we propose simple bound-based regularizers that penalize the big-M constants of MILP formulations and/or the number of unstable neurons. Moreover, we introduce an LP relaxation gap regularizer that explicitly penalizes the per-sample gap of the continuous relaxation at training points. We derive its associated gradient and provide an implementation from LP dual variables without custom automatic differentiation tools. We show that combining the above regularizers can approximate the full total derivative of the LP gap with respect to the network parameters, capturing both direct and indirect sensitivities. Experiments on non-convex benchmark functions and a two-stage stochastic programming problem with quantile neural network surrogates demonstrate that the proposed regularizers can reduce MILP solve times by up to four orders of magnitude relative to an unregularized baseline, while maintaining competitive surrogate model accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出一种松弛感知的训练正则化方法，通过惩罚MILP中的大M常数、不稳定神经元数量和LP松弛间隙，显著加速神经网络代理模型的MILP求解。
ai.motivation: 标准训练目标无法控制下游MILP的可解性，导致求解时间过长。
ai.method: 设计基于边界的正则化项和LP松弛间隙正则化项，利用对偶变量计算梯度，无需自定义自动微分。
ai.result: 在非凸基准函数和两阶段随机规划问题上，求解时间降低四个数量级，同时保持代理模型精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户训练更易于全局优化的神经网络代理模型，适用于嵌入MILP的决策场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将LP松弛间隙作为可微正则化项，直接优化MILP求解效率。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化可能过度简化模型，导致代理精度下降；梯度计算依赖对偶变量，需保证LP求解稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从优化求解器的内部指标出发设计训练目标，启发其他领域将下游计算成本纳入训练损失。

en.tldr: Proposes relaxation-informed training regularizers that penalize big-M constants, unstable neurons, and LP relaxation gap, accelerating MILP solve times by up to four orders of magnitude for neural network surrogate models.
en.motivation: Standard training objectives cannot control downstream MILP tractability, leading to excessive solve times.
en.method: Designs bound-based regularizers and an LP relaxation gap regularizer, computing gradients via dual variables without custom automatic differentiation.
en.result: On non-convex benchmark functions and a two-stage stochastic programming problem, solve times reduce by four orders of magnitude while maintaining competitive accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users train neural network surrogates that are more amenable to global optimization via MILP, useful for decision-making tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Uses LP relaxation gap as a differentiable regularizer to directly optimize MILP solve efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Over-regularization may degrade surrogate accuracy; gradient computation relies on dual variables, requiring stable LP solves.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing training objectives based on solver internals inspires incorporating downstream computational cost into loss functions in other domains.

papers.title: Deep Learning for Model Calibration in Simulation of Itaconic Acid Production
papers.summary: In this study, deep learning is used to estimate kinetic parameters for modeling itaconic acid production based on real batch experiments conducted at different agitation speeds and reactor scales. Two deep learning strategies, namely direct deep learning (DDL) and generative conditional flow matching (CFM) are compared and benchmarked against nonlinear regression as a reference method. Compared with DDL, CFM consistently yields more accurate results. The concentration profiles predicted by CFM closely match those obtained from nonlinear regression, whereas DDL results in larger deviations. Similar behavior is observed in the scale-up experiments, where the CFM model again generalizes better and is more robust than the direct approach. These findings demonstrate that CFM can reliably predict system behavior across different operating conditions and scales, offering a flexible and data-efficient framework for parameter estimation in dynamic bioprocess models.

ai.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习估计衣康酸生产中的动力学参数，比较了直接深度学习（DDL）和条件流匹配（CFM）两种策略，发现CFM在准确性和鲁棒性上优于DDL，能可靠预测不同操作条件和规模下的系统行为。
ai.motivation: 衣康酸生产过程中，动力学参数的准确估计对模型校准至关重要，传统非线性回归方法在数据有限或条件变化时可能不够灵活高效。
ai.method: 采用直接深度学习（DDL）和生成式条件流匹配（CFM）两种深度学习策略，以非线性回归为基准，基于不同搅拌速度和反应器规模的批次实验数据进行参数估计。
ai.result: CFM始终比DDL更准确，其浓度预测曲线与非线性回归结果高度吻合，而DDL偏差较大；在放大实验中，CFM泛化能力更强、更鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 为生物过程建模提供了一种数据高效、灵活的参数估计方法，尤其适用于多条件、多规模场景下的模型校准。

idea_spark.idea: 结合迁移学习，将CFM在小规模实验上训练后直接应用于大规模生产数据，减少实验成本。
idea_spark.risk: CFM对数据质量敏感，若实验噪声较大可能影响生成分布的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将条件流匹配与物理信息神经网络结合，进一步提升参数估计的物理一致性。

en.tldr: This study uses deep learning to estimate kinetic parameters for itaconic acid production, comparing direct deep learning (DDL) and conditional flow matching (CFM). CFM outperforms DDL in accuracy and robustness, reliably predicting system behavior across different operating conditions and scales.
en.motivation: Accurate estimation of kinetic parameters is critical for model calibration in itaconic acid production, and traditional nonlinear regression may lack flexibility and efficiency with limited data or varying conditions.
en.method: Two deep learning strategies, direct deep learning (DDL) and generative conditional flow matching (CFM), are compared against nonlinear regression using batch experiment data at different agitation speeds and reactor scales.
en.result: CFM consistently yields more accurate results than DDL, with concentration profiles closely matching those from nonlinear regression, while DDL shows larger deviations. In scale-up experiments, CFM generalizes better and is more robust.
en.help_to_user: Provides a data-efficient and flexible parameter estimation framework for bioprocess modeling, especially under multiple conditions and scales.

idea_spark.idea: Combine transfer learning with CFM trained on small-scale experiments for direct application to large-scale production data, reducing experimental costs.
idea_spark.risk: CFM is sensitive to data quality; high experimental noise may degrade the accuracy of generated distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrate conditional flow matching with physics-informed neural networks to enhance physical consistency in parameter estimation.

papers.title: Sharpness-Aware Poisoning: Enhancing Transferability of Injective Attacks on Recommender Systems
papers.summary: Recommender Systems~(RS) have been shown to be vulnerable to injective attacks, where attackers inject limited fake user profiles to promote the exposure of target items to real users for unethical gains (e.g., economic or political advantages). Since attackers typically lack knowledge of the victim model deployed in the target RS, existing methods resort to using a fixed surrogate model to mimic the potential victim model. Despite considerable progress, we argue that the assumption that \textit{poisoned data generated for the surrogate model can be used to attack other victim models} is wishful. When there are significant structural discrepancies between the surrogate and victim models, the attack transferability inevitably suffers. Intuitively, if we can identify the worst-case victim model and iteratively optimize the poisoning effect specifically against it, then the generated poisoned data would be better transferred to other victim models. However, exactly identifying the worst-case victim model during the attack process is challenging due to the large space of victim models. To this end, in this work, we propose a novel attack method called Sharpness-Aware Poisoning (\textit{SharpAP}). Specifically, it employs the sharpness-aware minimization principle to seek the approximately worst-case victim model and optimizes the poisoned data specifically for this worst-case model. The poisoning attack with SharpAP is formulated as a min-max-min tri-level optimization problem. By integrating SharpAP into the iterative process for attacks, our method can generate more robust poisoned data which is less sensitive to the shift of model structure, mitigating the overfitting to the surrogate model. Comprehensive experimental comparisons on three real-world datasets demonstrate that \name~can significantly enhance the attack transferability.

ai.tldr: 提出SharpAP方法，通过锐度感知最小化寻找最坏情况受害者模型，生成对模型结构变化不敏感的鲁棒毒化数据，显著提升注入攻击的可迁移性。
ai.motivation: 现有注入攻击假设毒化数据对替代模型有效即可攻击其他受害者模型，但替代模型与受害者模型结构差异大时攻击可迁移性差。
ai.method: 将攻击建模为min-max-min三层优化问题，在迭代攻击过程中集成锐度感知最小化原则，近似寻找最坏情况受害者模型并针对其优化毒化数据。
ai.result: 在三个真实数据集上实验表明，SharpAP显著增强了攻击的可迁移性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过优化最坏情况模型来提升对抗攻击的泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将锐度感知最小化用于生成对模型结构变化不敏感的毒化数据。
idea_spark.risk: 最坏情况模型近似可能不准确，导致优化偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴锐度感知最小化在模型泛化中的成功，将其应用于攻击可迁移性提升。

en.tldr: Proposes SharpAP, which uses sharpness-aware minimization to find the worst-case victim model and generates robust poisoned data insensitive to model structure shifts, significantly enhancing transferability of injective attacks.
en.motivation: Existing injective attacks assume poisoned data effective for a surrogate model can attack other victim models, but transferability suffers when structural discrepancies are large.
en.method: Formulates attack as a min-max-min tri-level optimization, integrating sharpness-aware minimization in the iterative process to approximate the worst-case victim model and optimize poisoned data against it.
en.result: Experiments on three real-world datasets show SharpAP significantly enhances attack transferability.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how optimizing for the worst-case model can improve generalization of adversarial attacks.

idea_spark.idea: Using sharpness-aware minimization to generate poisoned data insensitive to model structure changes.
idea_spark.risk: Approximation of worst-case model may be inaccurate, leading to optimization bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by success of sharpness-aware minimization in model generalization, applied to attack transferability.

papers.title: Large time behavior and transition from vanishing to spreading regimes for the generalized Burgers-Fisher-KPP equation
papers.summary: The large time behavior of solutions to the following generalized Burgers-Fisher-KPP equation $$ \partial_tu=u_{xx}+k(u^n)_x+u^p-u^q, \quad (x,t)\in\mathbb{R}\times(0,\infty), $$ with $n\geq2$, $p>q\geq1$ and $k\in\mathbb{R}$, is considered in this work. Denoting by $H(x,t)$, respectively $\widetilde{H}(x,t)$ the solutions having as initial condition the Heaviside, respectively the ``anti-Heaviside" functions $$ H_0(x)=\begin{cases}   0, & \mbox{if } x<0   1, & \mbox{if } x\geq0. \end{cases}, \quad \widetilde{H}_0(x)=1-H_0(x), $$ critical velocities $\overline{c}$, respectively $\widetilde{c}=kn+2\sqrt{p-q}$, are identified such that $H(x,t)$, respectively $\widetilde{H}(x,t)$ approach the unique traveling wave solution of the equation with these critical velocities as $t\to\infty$. The critical velocity $\overline{c}$ is \emph{anomalous}, that is, it cannot be made explicit by an algebraic expression. Assuming for simplicity $k>0$, a remarkable fact is that, while $\widetilde{H}(x,t)\to0$ as $t\to\infty$ uniformly on compact subsets of $\mathbb{R}$, the Heaviside solution $H$ might tend either to zero or to one as $t\to\infty$, depending on the sign of the critical velocity $\overline{c}$. This sign vary with respect to the exponents $n$, $p$, $q$ and the coefficient $k$ and, in fact, we prove that given $p$, $q$, $n$, there exists a critical coefficient $k^*(n,p,q)$ such that $\overline{c}>0$ if $k>k^*(n,p,q)$ and $\overline{c}<0$ if $k<k^*(n,p,q)$. The convergence to either zero or one reflects the sharp influence of the convection term, since in the absence of it (that is, $k=0$), $H(x,t)$ would always tend to zero as $t\to\infty$. The results include more general initial conditions than the Heaviside-type functions, and sharp estimates of the threshold coefficient $k^*(n,p,q)$ are also given.

ai.tldr: 研究广义Burgers-Fisher-KPP方程解的大时间行为，识别出临界速度，并证明Heaviside解随参数变化趋向于零或一，揭示了对流项的显著影响。
ai.motivation: 理解非线性对流项对反应扩散方程长时间行为的影响，特别是从消失到传播的转变机制。
ai.method: 通过构造Heaviside和反Heaviside初值，分析临界速度的符号变化，并给出阈值系数的估计。
ai.result: 存在临界系数k*，当k>k*时临界速度为正，解趋向于1；当k<k*时为负，解趋向于0。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解含对流项的反应扩散方程中，参数如何决定解的最终状态（消失或传播）。

idea_spark.idea: 利用类似方法研究多维或变系数情形下的消失-传播转变。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下临界速度的显式表达式可能不存在，分析复杂度增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将临界系数k*的估计方法应用于生物种群扩散模型中的入侵阈值问题。

zh.result: 存在临界系数k*，当k>k*时临界速度为正，解趋向于1；当k<k*时为负，解趋向于0。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解含对流项的反应扩散方程中，参数如何决定解的最终状态（消失或传播）。

idea_spark.idea: 利用类似方法研究多维或变系数情形下的消失-传播转变。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下临界速度的显式表达式可能不存在，分析复杂度增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将临界系数k*的估计方法应用于生物种群扩散模型中的入侵阈值问题。

en.tldr: We study the large-time behavior of solutions to a generalized Burgers-Fisher-KPP equation, identify critical velocities, and show that the Heaviside solution tends to either zero or one depending on parameters, revealing the sharp influence of the convection term.
en.motivation: To understand how nonlinear convection affects the long-time behavior of reaction-diffusion equations, especially the transition from vanishing to spreading regimes.
en.method: By constructing Heaviside and anti-Heaviside initial data, analyzing the sign of critical velocities, and providing estimates for the threshold coefficient.
en.result: There exists a critical coefficient k* such that for k>k* the critical velocity is positive and the solution tends to 1, while for k<k* it is negative and the solution tends to 0.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how parameters determine the eventual state (vanishing or spreading) of solutions in reaction-diffusion-convection equations.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar methods to study vanishing-spreading transitions in multi-dimensional or variable-coefficient settings.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit expressions for critical velocities may not exist in higher dimensions, increasing analysis complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use the estimation of k* to address invasion thresholds in biological population models.

papers.title: Stochastic Krasnoselskii-Mann Iterations: Convergence without Uniformly Bounded Variance
papers.summary: We investigate the Stochastic Krasnoselskii-Mann iterations for expected nonexpansive fixed-point problems in a real Hilbert space. We establish convergence guarantees under significantly weaker assumptions on the variance than those typically used in the literature. In particular, instead of a uniform bound on the variance of the stochastic oracle, we only assume finite variance at a single fixed point. Under this assumption, we prove almost sure weak convergence of the iterates, derive convergence rates for the expected residual, and obtain almost sure convergence rates for the running minimum residual. Notably, we recover the best-known stochastic oracle complexity without imposing uniformly bounded variance. We illustrate the applicability of our results to Stochastic Gradient Descent, where we recover known guarantees, and to Stochastic Three-Operator Splitting, for which we obtain the first results that avoid uniform variance bounds.

ai.tldr: 本文研究随机Krasnoselskii-Mann迭代在实Hilbert空间中求解期望非扩张不动点问题，在仅假设单个不动点处方差有限（而非均匀有界）的条件下，证明了几乎必然弱收敛、期望残差收敛率及运行最小残差收敛率，并恢复了最优随机预言复杂度。
ai.motivation: 现有随机不动点迭代的收敛性分析通常要求随机预言方差均匀有界，这一假设在许多实际场景中难以满足。本文旨在放宽该假设，在更弱的方差条件下建立收敛保证。
ai.method: 采用随机Krasnoselskii-Mann迭代框架，仅假设在某个不动点处方差有限，利用鞅收敛理论和随机逼近技巧，推导几乎必然弱收敛和收敛率。
ai.result: 证明了在弱方差假设下迭代的几乎必然弱收敛，给出了期望残差和运行最小残差的收敛率，恢复了已知的最优随机预言复杂度，并首次为随机三算子分裂避免了均匀方差界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在随机优化和不动点问题中，如何放宽方差假设仍能保证收敛，为设计更实用的随机算法提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将有限方差条件推广到更一般的矩条件，或结合自适应步长策略进一步降低对噪声的假设。
idea_spark.risk: 弱假设可能导致收敛速度变慢或需要更精细的步长调节，实际应用中需验证方差条件是否易于验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从单个不动点方差有限出发，启发我们思考是否只需局部信息即可保证全局收敛，类似思想可应用于分布式或在线学习场景。

en.tldr: This paper studies Stochastic Krasnoselskii-Mann iterations for expected nonexpansive fixed-point problems in a real Hilbert space, proving almost sure weak convergence, convergence rates for the expected residual and running minimum residual under only finite variance at a single fixed point, recovering the best-known stochastic oracle complexity without uniform variance bounds.
en.motivation: Existing convergence analyses for stochastic fixed-point iterations typically require uniformly bounded variance of the stochastic oracle, which is often unrealistic. This work aims to relax this assumption and establish convergence guarantees under weaker variance conditions.
en.method: Using the Stochastic Krasnoselskii-Mann iteration framework, assuming only finite variance at a fixed point, martingale convergence theory and stochastic approximation techniques are employed to derive almost sure weak convergence and convergence rates.
en.result: Almost sure weak convergence is proved under the weak variance assumption, convergence rates for the expected residual and running minimum residual are derived, the best-known stochastic oracle complexity is recovered, and for Stochastic Three-Operator Splitting, uniform variance bounds are avoided for the first time.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to guarantee convergence in stochastic optimization and fixed-point problems under relaxed variance assumptions, providing theoretical support for designing more practical stochastic algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Consider extending the finite variance condition to more general moment conditions, or combining adaptive step-size strategies to further reduce assumptions on noise.
idea_spark.risk: Weaker assumptions may lead to slower convergence rates or require more delicate step-size tuning; practical applicability depends on whether the variance condition is easily verifiable.
idea_spark.inspiration: The insight that finite variance at a single fixed point suffices for global convergence inspires thinking about whether local information alone can guarantee global convergence, which could be applied in distributed or online learning scenarios.

keywords_raw: finite variance at a single fixed point

papers.title: Zero-inflated modeling with smoothing on counting tensors
papers.summary: We propose a unified probabilistic framework for sparse count tensors with excess zeros, motivated by single-cell Hi-C data. The observed data are naturally represented as a three-way tensor indexed by genomic loci pairs and cells, exhibiting pronounced sparsity, zero inflation, and cell-to-cell heterogeneity. We introduce a zero-inflated Poisson tensor model that integrates low-rank CP structure, cluster-specific latent embeddings, and smoothness along ordered genomic loci, thereby jointly capturing multiway dependence, heterogeneity, and structured variation.   We develop a Bayes-optimal procedure for distinguishing structural from technical zeros, enabling principled inference and uncertainty quantification. We establish identifiability of the model parameters and derive consistency rates for the proposed estimators in a high-dimensional regime. Simulation studies and analyses of single-cell Hi-C data demonstrate improved performance in zero detection, latent structure recovery, and downstream tasks such as clustering and 3D chromatin organization inference.   The proposed framework provides a flexible approach for multiway count data with excess zeros and structured dependencies, and suggests several directions for future work, including mixture-based modeling of cell populations and scalable computation for large-scale applications.

ai.tldr: 针对单细胞Hi-C数据中稀疏且含过多零的计数张量，提出一个统一的零膨胀泊松张量模型，整合低秩CP结构、聚类潜嵌入和基因组位点平滑性，实现结构零与技术零的贝叶斯最优区分。
ai.motivation: 单细胞Hi-C数据呈现极度稀疏、零膨胀和细胞间异质性，现有方法难以同时处理多维依赖、异质性和结构化变异。
ai.method: 构建零膨胀泊松张量模型，融合低秩CP分解、聚类特异性潜嵌入和沿有序基因组位点的平滑先验，并设计贝叶斯最优程序区分结构零与技术零。
ai.result: 在模拟和真实单细胞Hi-C数据上，零检测、潜在结构恢复以及下游聚类和3D染色质推断性能均有提升。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种处理含过多零和结构化依赖的多维计数数据的灵活框架，附带不确定性量化。

idea_spark.idea: 将零膨胀机制与图神经网络结合，利用基因组位点间的物理邻近图进一步约束平滑性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对先验假设敏感，若零产生机制与假设不符可能导致偏差；大规模数据计算复杂度高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受单细胞Hi-C数据中零的两种来源（结构零与技术零）启发，可推广至其他含双重零来源的多维数据。

en.tldr: A unified zero-inflated Poisson tensor model for sparse count tensors with excess zeros, integrating low-rank CP structure, cluster-specific latent embeddings, and smoothness along ordered genomic loci, with Bayes-optimal separation of structural and technical zeros.
en.motivation: Single-cell Hi-C data exhibit extreme sparsity, zero inflation, and cell-to-cell heterogeneity, challenging existing methods to jointly handle multiway dependence, heterogeneity, and structured variation.
en.method: Proposes a zero-inflated Poisson tensor model combining low-rank CP decomposition, cluster-specific latent embeddings, and smoothness priors along ordered genomic loci, with a Bayes-optimal procedure to distinguish structural from technical zeros.
en.result: Improved zero detection, latent structure recovery, and downstream clustering and 3D chromatin organization inference on simulated and real single-cell Hi-C data.
en.help_to_user: Provides a flexible framework for multiway count data with excess zeros and structured dependencies, with uncertainty quantification.

idea_spark.idea: Combine zero-inflation mechanisms with graph neural networks, leveraging physical proximity graphs between genomic loci to further constrain smoothness.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitivity to prior assumptions; mismatch with the true zero-generating process may cause bias; high computational cost for large-scale data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the two sources of zeros (structural vs technical) in single-cell Hi-C data, generalizable to other multi-dimensional data with dual zero origins.

papers.title: On a certain representation of a solution to the characteristic problem for the ultrahyperbolic equation
papers.summary: We consider the characteristic problem for the ultrahyperbolic equation in the Euclidean space. The value of a solution is prescribed on the characteristic hyperplane. A well-posed set-up of the problem is discussed. We obtain a certain representation for a solution suitable for analysis of its asymptotics at the infinity.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了欧氏空间中超双曲型方程的特征问题，在特征超平面上给定解的值，讨论了适定性，并得到了适用于无穷远渐近分析的解表示。
ai.motivation: 为超双曲型方程的特征问题提供一种适合分析无穷远渐近行为的解表示。
ai.method: 在欧氏空间中设定特征问题，在特征超平面上规定解的值，通过讨论适定性推导出解的特定表示形式。
ai.result: 得到了一个适用于无穷远渐近分析的解表示。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解超双曲型方程特征问题的适定性及解的渐近行为。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将特征超平面上的边界条件替换为更一般的曲面，或结合数值方法验证渐近公式。
idea_spark.risk: 表示形式可能仅在特定对称性或光滑性假设下成立，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受特征问题适定性讨论启发，可探索其他退化双曲型方程的类似表示。

en.tldr: This paper studies the characteristic problem for the ultrahyperbolic equation in Euclidean space, prescribing the solution on a characteristic hyperplane, discusses well-posedness, and obtains a representation suitable for asymptotic analysis at infinity.
en.motivation: To provide a representation of the solution to the characteristic problem for the ultrahyperbolic equation that facilitates analysis of its asymptotics at infinity.
en.method: Set up the characteristic problem in Euclidean space, prescribe the solution on a characteristic hyperplane, discuss well-posedness, and derive a specific representation.
en.result: A representation of the solution suitable for studying its asymptotics at infinity is obtained.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the well-posedness and asymptotic behavior of solutions to the characteristic problem for the ultrahyperbolic equation.

idea_spark.idea: Try replacing the characteristic hyperplane with more general surfaces, or combine with numerical methods to verify asymptotic formulas.
idea_spark.risk: The representation may hold only under specific symmetry or smoothness assumptions; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the discussion of well-posedness, explore similar representations for other degenerate hyperbolic equations.

papers.title: PoseFM: Relative Camera Pose Estimation Through Flow Matching
papers.summary: Monocular visual odometry (VO) is a fundamental computer vision problem with applications in autonomous navigation, augmented reality and more. While deep learning-based methods have recently shown superior accuracy compared to traditional geometric pipelines, particularly in environments where handcrafted features struggle due to poor structure or lighting conditions, most rely on deterministic regression, which lacks the uncertainty awareness required for robust applications. We propose PoseFM, the first framework to reformulate monocular frame-to-frame VO as a generative task using Flow Matching (FM). By leveraging FM, we model camera motion as a distribution rather than a point estimate, learning to transform noise into realistic pose predictions via continuous-time ODEs. This approach provides a principled mechanism for uncertainty estimation and enables robust motion inference under challenging visual conditions. In our evaluations, PoseFM achieves strong performance on TartanAir, KITTI and TUM-RGBD benchmarks, achieving the lowest absolute trajectory error (ATE) on some of the trajectories and overall being competitive with the best frame-to-frame monocular VO methods. Code and model checkpoints will be made available at https://github.com/helsinki-sda-group/posefm.

ai.tldr: 提出PoseFM，首个将单目帧间视觉里程计重构为基于流匹配的生成任务的方法，通过连续时间ODE学习噪声到姿态的变换，提供不确定性估计，在多个基准上取得竞争性结果。
ai.motivation: 现有单目VO方法多为确定性回归，缺乏不确定性感知，在光照差、结构弱的环境中鲁棒性不足。
ai.method: 利用流匹配（Flow Matching）将相机运动建模为分布而非点估计，通过连续时间常微分方程将噪声变换为姿态预测。
ai.result: 在TartanAir、KITTI和TUM-RGBD基准上，部分轨迹达到最低绝对轨迹误差（ATE），整体与最优帧间单目VO方法相当。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可输出不确定性估计的单目VO新范式，有助于提升自动驾驶、AR等应用在挑战性条件下的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将流匹配与多视角几何约束结合，或引入时序注意力机制以利用长程帧间依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 生成式方法可能引入额外计算开销，实时性需验证；不确定性估计的校准质量需进一步评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴扩散模型在图像生成中的成功，将其应用于几何推理，启发更多生成式视觉定位方法。

en.tldr: Proposes PoseFM, the first framework to reformulate monocular frame-to-frame visual odometry as a generative task using Flow Matching, modeling camera motion as a distribution via continuous-time ODEs for uncertainty estimation, achieving competitive results on multiple benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing monocular VO methods rely on deterministic regression and lack uncertainty awareness, leading to poor robustness under challenging visual conditions such as poor lighting or weak structure.
en.method: Leverages Flow Matching to model camera motion as a distribution rather than a point estimate, transforming noise into pose predictions through continuous-time ODEs.
en.result: Achieves the lowest absolute trajectory error (ATE) on some trajectories of TartanAir, KITTI, and TUM-RGBD benchmarks, and is overall competitive with the best frame-to-frame monocular VO methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new paradigm for monocular VO that outputs uncertainty estimates, enhancing reliability in autonomous navigation and augmented reality under challenging conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Flow Matching with multi-view geometric constraints or incorporate temporal attention mechanisms to exploit long-range inter-frame dependencies.
idea_spark.risk: Generative approaches may introduce additional computational overhead; real-time performance needs validation. Calibration quality of uncertainty estimates requires further evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of diffusion models in image generation, applying generative modeling to geometric reasoning opens new avenues for robust visual localization.

papers.title: Null-Space Flow Matching for MIMO Channel Estimation in Latency-Constrained Systems
papers.summary: Accurate yet low-latency channel state information (CSI) acquisition is essential for multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) communication systems. While advanced deep generative models, such as score-based and diffusion models, enable high-fidelity CSI reconstruction from limited pilot observations, they often suffer from high inference latency. To achieve accurate CSI estimation under stringent latency constraints, this paper proposes a null-space flow matching (FM) framework that decomposes pilot-limited MIMO channel estimation into a range-space reconstruction problem and a null-space generation problem. Specifically, the range-space component of the channel is directly recovered from noisy pilot observations, while only the ambiguous null-space component is iteratively refined using an FM-based generative prior. To further improve the robustness of the proposed framework, we introduce a power-law time schedule to better allocate the limited number of refinement steps, along with a noise-aware adaptive correction strategy to suppress channel noise on the refinement trajectory. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves a competitive normalized mean square error (NMSE) even under a strict latency budget of around 3 ms, while delivering superior estimation accuracy and faster inference than both model-based and generative baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种零空间流匹配框架，在严格延迟约束下实现高精度MIMO信道估计。
ai.motivation: 现有深度生成模型（如扩散模型）虽能高保真重建CSI，但推理延迟高，难以满足低延迟通信需求。
ai.method: 将信道估计分解为值空间直接恢复和零空间流匹配生成，引入幂律时间调度和噪声自适应校正策略。
ai.result: 在约3ms延迟预算下达到竞争性NMSE，优于模型基和生成基基线。

en.tldr: Proposes a null-space flow matching framework for accurate MIMO channel estimation under strict latency constraints.
en.motivation: Existing deep generative models achieve high-fidelity CSI reconstruction but suffer from high inference latency, unsuitable for low-latency communications.
en.method: Decomposes channel estimation into range-space direct recovery and null-space flow matching generation, with a power-law time schedule and noise-aware adaptive correction.
en.result: Achieves competitive NMSE under ~3ms latency budget, outperforming model-based and generative baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a channel estimation solution balancing accuracy and speed for low-latency MIMO systems.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the continuous-time nature of flow matching with adaptive step allocation to further reduce inference steps.
idea_spark.risk: Null-space generation relies on prior quality; mismatch with true distribution may introduce errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing a problem into deterministic and generative parts can inspire generative model design in other resource-constrained scenarios.

papers.title: Acyclic Monotone Operators Are Not Closed Under Addition
papers.summary: Borwein and Wiersma [SIAM J. Optim. 18(3) (2007), 946-960] asked if the set of acyclic monotone operators is closed under addition. We answer this question in the negative.

ai.tldr: 本文否定了Borwein和Wiersma提出的关于无环单调算子在加法下封闭性的问题。
ai.motivation: 验证无环单调算子集合在加法运算下是否封闭。
ai.method: 通过构造反例进行证明。
ai.result: 无环单调算子集合在加法下不封闭。
ai.help_to_user: 澄清了无环单调算子的代数性质，为相关理论提供基础。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他非线性算子类在类似运算下的封闭性。
idea_spark.risk: 反例可能依赖特定空间结构，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典问题出发，通过反例揭示理论边界。

en.tldr: This paper negatively answers the question posed by Borwein and Wiersma about whether the set of acyclic monotone operators is closed under addition.
en.motivation: To verify whether the set of acyclic monotone operators is closed under addition.
en.method: By constructing a counterexample.
en.result: The set of acyclic monotone operators is not closed under addition.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the algebraic property of acyclic monotone operators, providing a foundation for related theory.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the closure of other nonlinear operator classes under similar operations.
idea_spark.risk: The counterexample may depend on specific space structures; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from a classic problem, reveal theoretical boundaries through counterexamples.

papers.title: Correctness of Biot's model of in situ leaching for incompressible liquid and compressible solid components
papers.summary: We study a mathematical model of in situ leaching of rare metals, in which the joint filtration of two liquids is governed by the microscopic model $\mathbb{A}^{\varepsilon}$. A key difficulty is the unknown (free) boundary $Γ(r)$ between solid and liquid components, determined by an additional condition on $Γ(r)$; no standard methods exist for this nonlinear problem. To resolve it, we apply the fixed point theorem. For a given function $r(\boldsymbol{x},t)$ from a set $\mathfrak{M}_{(0,T)}$ of sufficiently smooth functions describing the skeleton structure, we consider the auxiliary problem $\mathbb{B}^{\varepsilon}(r)$: an elliptic system for displacements of the liquid and solid components coupled with parabolic equations for the acid concentration. Selecting the weak solution of minimal smoothness, we apply the homogenization method to pass from the microscopic to the macroscopic description. The resulting macroscopic model $\mathbb{H}(r)$ contains a homogenized boundary condition that expresses the normal boundary velocity $V_{N}=\partial r/\partial t$ as a linear function of the acid concentration $c$. Since $c$ depends on $r$ via an operator $\mathbb{F}\colon\mathfrak{M}_{(0,T)}\to\mathfrak{M}_{(0,T)}$, we prove that $\mathbb{F}$ is Lipschitz continuous and, by Banach's theorem, possesses a unique fixed point $r^{*}$, which yields the unique solution $\mathbb{H}=\mathbb{H}(r^{*})$.

ai.tldr: 研究不可压缩液体与可压缩固体组分原地浸出的Biot模型，通过不动点定理和均匀化方法证明宏观解的存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 原地浸出稀有金属的数学模型存在未知自由边界，缺乏标准解法。
ai.method: 引入辅助椭圆-抛物系统，利用不动点定理构造映射并证明其Lipschitz连续性，结合均匀化方法从微观过渡到宏观。
ai.result: 证明了映射存在唯一不动点，从而得到唯一的宏观模型解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理含自由边界的多相流-反应耦合问题的严格数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将自由边界条件转化为浓度依赖的边界速度，降低问题非线性度。
idea_spark.risk: 映射的Lipschitz常数可能依赖于问题参数，需验证实际适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用Banach不动点定理处理非线性边界条件，启发类似耦合问题的求解策略。

en.tldr: We study Biot's model for in situ leaching with incompressible liquid and compressible solid, proving existence and uniqueness of the macroscopic solution via fixed point theorem and homogenization.
en.motivation: The mathematical model involves an unknown free boundary between solid and liquid, for which no standard methods exist.
en.method: An auxiliary elliptic-parabolic system is introduced; a mapping is constructed and shown to be Lipschitz continuous using the fixed point theorem, then homogenization bridges micro and macro scales.
en.result: The mapping has a unique fixed point, yielding a unique macroscopic solution.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for coupled multiphase flow-reaction problems with moving boundaries.

idea_spark.idea: Reformulate the free boundary condition as a concentration-dependent boundary velocity to reduce nonlinearity.
idea_spark.risk: The Lipschitz constant may depend on problem parameters, requiring verification for practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using Banach's fixed point theorem to handle nonlinear boundary conditions inspires similar solution strategies for coupled problems.

papers.title: Large deviation principles for the stationary solutions and invariant measures of a class of SPDE with locally monotone coefficients
papers.summary: We establish the well-posedness of stationary solutions for a class of SPDEs with locally monotone coefficients, and prove the Freidlin--Wentzell large deviation principle (LDP) for these stationary solutions. The LDP for the associated invariant measures then follows via the contraction principle, avoiding the need to construct the quasi-potential and verify the Dembo--Zeitouni uniform LDP over bounded sets. By working directly with stationary solutions, we bypass these technical difficulties, thereby providing a more general and flexible framework that is adapted to additive noise, multiplicative noise, and transport-type noise. As applications, our results cover a range of SPDEs, including the stochastic reaction-diffusion equations, stochastic 1D viscous Burgers equation, stochastic 2D Navier--Stokes equations, stochastic 2D magneto-hydrodynamic equations and stochastic 3D hyper-dissipative Navier--Stokes equations.

ai.tldr: 针对一类具有局部单调系数的随机偏微分方程，建立了平稳解的存在唯一性，并证明了其Freidlin-Wentzell大偏差原理，进而通过收缩原理得到不变测度的大偏差原理。
ai.motivation: 现有方法需构造拟势并验证Dembo-Zeitouni一致大偏差原理，技术复杂且适用范围有限。本文旨在通过直接研究平稳解来绕过这些困难，提供更通用灵活的框架。
ai.method: 先证明平稳解的适定性，再直接对平稳解建立Freidlin-Wentzell大偏差原理，最后利用收缩原理导出不变测度的大偏差原理。
ai.result: 该方法适用于加性噪声、乘性噪声和输运型噪声，覆盖了随机反应扩散方程、随机1D粘性Burgers方程、随机2D Navier-Stokes方程、随机2D磁流体动力学方程和随机3D超耗散Navier-Stokes方程。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究SPDE的长期行为和大偏差性质提供了更简洁的证明框架，可推广至更多噪声类型和方程。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将本方法应用于随机波动方程或随机Cahn-Hilliard方程，验证其普适性。
idea_spark.risk: 对于非局部单调系数或非自治噪声，平稳解的存在性可能不成立，需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考：是否可以通过平稳解的某种变分表示来直接构造大偏差速率函数，从而避免收缩原理？

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考：是否可以通过平稳解的某种变分表示来直接构造大偏差速率函数，从而避免收缩原理？

en.tldr: For a class of SPDEs with locally monotone coefficients, we establish the well-posedness of stationary solutions and prove the Freidlin-Wentzell large deviation principle for them, then obtain the LDP for invariant measures via the contraction principle.
en.motivation: Existing methods require constructing the quasi-potential and verifying the Dembo-Zeitouni uniform LDP over bounded sets, which is technically involved and limited in scope. This work aims to bypass these difficulties by working directly with stationary solutions, providing a more general and flexible framework.
en.method: First prove the well-posedness of stationary solutions, then establish the Freidlin-Wentzell LDP directly for these solutions, and finally derive the LDP for invariant measures via the contraction principle.
en.result: The approach applies to additive, multiplicative, and transport-type noise, covering stochastic reaction-diffusion equations, stochastic 1D viscous Burgers equation, stochastic 2D Navier-Stokes equations, stochastic 2D magneto-hydrodynamic equations, and stochastic 3D hyper-dissipative Navier-Stokes equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simpler proof framework for studying long-time behavior and large deviations of SPDEs, extendable to more noise types and equations.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying this method to stochastic wave equations or stochastic Cahn-Hilliard equations to test its generality.
idea_spark.risk: For non-locally monotone coefficients or non-autonomous noise, existence of stationary solutions may fail, requiring additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires us to consider whether a variational representation of stationary solutions could directly yield the rate function, bypassing the contraction principle.

papers.title: Wiggle and Go! System Identification for Zero-Shot Dynamic Rope Manipulation
papers.summary: Many robotic tasks are unforgiving; a single mistake in a dynamic throw can lead to unacceptable delays or unrecoverable failure. To mitigate this, we present a novel approach that leverages learned simulation priors to inform goal-conditioned dynamic manipulation of ropes for efficient and accurate task execution. Related methods for dynamic rope manipulation either require large real-world datasets to estimate rope behavior or the use of iterative improvements on attempts at the task for goal completion. We introduce Wiggle and Go!, a system-identification, two-stage framework that enables zero-shot task rope manipulation. The framework consists of a system identification module that observes rope movement to predict descriptive physical parameters, which then informs an optimization method for goal-conditioned action prediction for the robot to execute zero-shot in the real. Our method achieves strong performance across multiple dynamic manipulation tasks enabled by the same task-agnostic system identification module which offers seamless switching between different manipulation tasks, allowing a single model to support a diverse array of manipulation policies. We achieve a 3.55 cm average accuracy on 3D target striking in real using rope system parameters in comparison to 15.34 cm accuracy when our task model is not system-parameter-informed. We achieve a Pearson correlation coefficient of 0.95 between Fourier frequencies of the predicted and real ropes on an unseen trajectory. Project website please see https://wiggleandgo.github.io/

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于系统辨识的两阶段框架，实现零样本动态绳索操控，无需真实数据或迭代尝试。
ai.motivation: 动态绳索操控中单次失误会导致不可恢复失败，现有方法依赖大量真实数据或迭代改进。
ai.method: 系统辨识模块观察绳索运动预测物理参数，优化器据此预测目标条件动作，零样本执行于真实环境。
ai.result: 3D目标打击平均精度3.55厘米（无参数时15.34厘米），预测与真实绳索傅里叶频率皮尔逊相关系数0.95。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需预训练或试错的绳索操控方案，适用于快速部署和任务切换。

idea_spark.idea: 结合物理参数预测与优化，实现零样本任务泛化，可能推广至非刚性物体交互。
idea_spark.risk: 物理参数预测精度依赖仿真器保真度，真实环境噪声可能降低性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用傅里叶频率作为绳索动态特征，启发其他周期性运动物体的系统辨识方法。

en.tldr: A system-identification two-stage framework enables zero-shot dynamic rope manipulation without real-world data or iterative attempts.
en.motivation: Single mistakes in dynamic rope tasks cause unrecoverable failures; existing methods require large datasets or iterative refinement.
en.method: A system identification module observes rope motion to predict physical parameters, which inform an optimizer for goal-conditioned action prediction executed zero-shot in the real world.
en.result: 3D target striking accuracy of 3.55 cm (vs. 15.34 cm without parameters); Pearson correlation of 0.95 between predicted and real rope Fourier frequencies.
en.help_to_user: Provides a zero-shot rope manipulation solution that requires no pre-training or trial-and-error, enabling rapid deployment and task switching.

idea_spark.idea: Combining physical parameter prediction with optimization enables zero-shot task generalization, potentially extending to non-rigid object interactions.
idea_spark.risk: Prediction accuracy depends on simulator fidelity; real-world noise may degrade performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using Fourier frequencies as rope dynamics features inspires system identification methods for other periodic motion objects.

papers.title: Global Convergence of Policy Gradient Methods for ReLU Controllers in Linear Quadratic Regulation
papers.summary: We study the convergence of model-based policy gradient for the deterministic, scalar, discounted linear-quadratic regulator when the controller is an overparameterized one-hidden-layer ReLU network without biases. Although the optimal LQR controller is linear, neural parameterization creates a redundant nonconvex weight space with a possibly asymmetric piecewise-linear controller. We show that this structure can still be analyzed exactly through the two effective gains induced on the positive and negative half-lines. Under suitable random initialization, sufficient width, and a small step size, the model-based policy gradient remains stable, decreases the cost geometrically, and drives the effective gains to the unique optimal scalar LQR gain with high probability.

ai.tldr: 研究了基于模型的策略梯度方法在确定性标量折扣线性二次调节问题中，使用过参数化单隐层ReLU网络（无偏置）作为控制器时的全局收敛性。
ai.motivation: 尽管最优LQR控制器是线性的，但神经网络参数化引入了冗余非凸权重空间和可能非对称的分段线性控制器，其收敛性分析具有挑战性。
ai.method: 通过分析正负半轴上诱导的两个有效增益，证明在合适的随机初始化、足够宽度和小步长下，基于模型的策略梯度保持稳定、成本几何下降，并以高概率驱动有效增益收敛到唯一最优标量LQR增益。
ai.result: 证明了过参数化ReLU网络控制器在LQR问题中策略梯度方法的全局收敛性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解神经网络控制器在经典控制问题中的优化行为提供了理论保证。

idea_spark.idea: 利用有效增益简化高维非凸优化问题，可能启发其他过参数化网络的分析方法。
idea_spark.risk: 当前结果限于标量系统和确定性设定，扩展到多维或随机情形可能面临复杂度爆炸。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将神经网络控制器的冗余参数映射到少量有效变量，为设计更易优化的网络结构提供思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将神经网络控制器的冗余参数映射到少量有效变量，为设计更易优化的网络结构提供思路。

en.tldr: We study the global convergence of model-based policy gradient for deterministic scalar discounted LQR with an overparameterized one-hidden-layer ReLU network controller (no biases).
en.motivation: Although the optimal LQR controller is linear, neural parameterization creates a redundant nonconvex weight space with possibly asymmetric piecewise-linear controllers, making convergence analysis challenging.
en.method: By analyzing two effective gains induced on the positive and negative half-lines, we show that under suitable random initialization, sufficient width, and small step size, model-based policy gradient remains stable, decreases cost geometrically, and drives effective gains to the unique optimal scalar LQR gain with high probability.
en.result: We prove global convergence of policy gradient methods for ReLU controllers in LQR.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for the optimization behavior of neural network controllers in classical control problems.

idea_spark.idea: Using effective gains to simplify high-dimensional nonconvex optimization could inspire analysis methods for other overparameterized networks.
idea_spark.risk: Current results are limited to scalar systems and deterministic settings; extension to multi-dimensional or stochastic cases may face complexity explosion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Mapping redundant neural controller parameters to a few effective variables suggests ways to design more optimizable network architectures.

papers.title: Adapted Wasserstein Barycenters of Gaussian Processes
papers.summary: We investigate barycenters of Gaussian process laws in adapted Wasserstein space. The adapted Wasserstein distance refines classical optimal transport by enforcing compatibility of transport plans with the temporal flow of information, and is therefore well suited for stochastic systems with filtration constraints, as common in stochastic control, mathematical finance and sequential decision problems. Within this framework, we consider weighted Fréchet means of Gaussian process laws and prove that the associated barycenter problem admits Gaussian solutions. We derive a characterization of adapted Wasserstein barycenters in terms of the means and covariance operators of the underlying processes, and we analyze their existence, uniqueness, and regularity properties under natural assumptions. The Gaussian setting reveals a tractable and structurally rich subclass of adapted transport problems, bridging adapted optimal transport and Bures--Wasserstein geometry. Our results identify adapted Wasserstein barycenters as natural representatives of collections of Gaussian models and suggest new applications in stochastic optimization, robust finance, and sequential statistics.

ai.tldr: 研究了高斯过程在适应Wasserstein空间中的重心，证明了重心问题存在高斯解，并给出了均值和协方差算子的刻画。
ai.motivation: 适应Wasserstein距离能更好地处理随机系统中的信息流约束，但高斯过程在该框架下的重心性质尚未被系统研究。
ai.method: 将适应Wasserstein重心定义为加权Fréchet均值，利用高斯过程的协方差结构推导重心解的存在性、唯一性和正则性。
ai.result: 证明了适应Wasserstein重心是高斯过程，并给出了其均值和协方差算子的显式表征，建立了与Bures-Wasserstein几何的联系。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机优化、鲁棒金融和序贯统计中高斯模型集合的聚合提供了理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将适应Wasserstein重心用于多源高斯过程回归的模型融合，以保持时间信息流的一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 非高斯过程的重心可能没有封闭解，计算复杂度较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴Bures-Wasserstein几何的数值算法，开发适应Wasserstein重心的高效计算方法。

en.tldr: Investigates barycenters of Gaussian process laws in adapted Wasserstein space, proving Gaussian solutions and characterizing them via means and covariance operators.
en.motivation: Adapted Wasserstein distance respects temporal information flow, making it suitable for stochastic systems, but barycenters of Gaussian processes in this space were unexplored.
en.method: Defines adapted Wasserstein barycenters as weighted Fréchet means and leverages Gaussian covariance structure to analyze existence, uniqueness, and regularity.
en.result: Proves that adapted Wasserstein barycenters are Gaussian, provides explicit characterization via mean and covariance operators, and links to Bures-Wasserstein geometry.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for aggregating Gaussian models in stochastic optimization, robust finance, and sequential statistics.

idea_spark.idea: Use adapted Wasserstein barycenters for model fusion in multi-source Gaussian process regression while preserving temporal information flow.
idea_spark.risk: Non-Gaussian processes may lack closed-form barycenters, and computational cost could be high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw on numerical algorithms from Bures-Wasserstein geometry to develop efficient computation for adapted Wasserstein barycenters.

papers.title: Algebraic methods in periodic singular Liouville equations
papers.summary: We explain how algebraic geometry comes into play in the study of non-linear mean field (singular Liouville) equations $$ \triangle u + e^u = 4π\sum_{i = 1}^N \ell_i δ_{p_i} $$ on a flat torus $E = \Bbb C/Λ$, where $N, \ell_1, \ldots, \ell_N \in \Bbb N$, $p_i \in E$ are distinct points, and $δ_{p_i}$ is the Dirac measure at $p_i$.   The case with one singular source ($N = 1$) had been studied extensively in recent years. We start with a survey of this case with emphasizes on the constructions of Lamé curves $\overline X_n$ and pre-modular forms $Z_n(σ, τ)$ which encodes the structure of solutions of the PDE.   We then discuss extensions to the case of general $N$. The basic tool is the monodromy theory for generalized Lamé equations. Two aspects are discussed: (1) For $\ell := \sum_{i = 1}^N \ell_i$ being odd, an exact counting formula of \emph{algebraic degree} is proved. (2) For $\ell$ being even, the existence of generalized Lamé curves parametrizing logarithmic-free solutions is proposed.

ai.tldr: 本文用代数几何方法研究平坦环面上带奇点的Liouville方程，综述了单奇点情形并推广到多奇点，证明了奇点总数为奇数时的代数度计数公式，并提出了偶数情形下广义Lamé曲线的存在性。
ai.motivation: 理解非线性平均场（奇异Liouville）方程解的结构，特别是多奇点情形下解的代数性质。
ai.method: 利用广义Lamé方程的单值性理论，结合代数曲线（Lamé曲线）和预模形式构造。
ai.result: 当奇点总数ℓ为奇数时，证明了代数度的精确计数公式；当ℓ为偶数时，提出了参数化无对数解的一般Lamé曲线存在性。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究带奇点的Liouville方程提供代数几何视角和计数工具，可用于相关PDE解的分类与构造。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Lamé曲线构造推广到高亏格曲面或非平坦背景上。
idea_spark.risk: 高亏格情形下代数曲线参数化可能过于复杂，单值性分析难度增大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 预模形式与解结构的联系启发用模形式理论统一不同奇点配置下的解空间。

en.tldr: This paper uses algebraic geometry to study singular Liouville equations on flat tori, reviews the single-singularity case, extends to multiple singularities, proves an exact algebraic degree counting formula for odd total singularity, and proposes the existence of generalized Lamé curves for even total singularity.
en.motivation: To understand the structure of solutions to nonlinear mean field (singular Liouville) equations, especially the algebraic properties in the multi-singularity case.
en.method: Monodromy theory for generalized Lamé equations, combined with constructions of Lamé curves and pre-modular forms.
en.result: For odd total singularity ℓ, an exact counting formula for algebraic degree is proved; for even ℓ, the existence of generalized Lamé curves parametrizing logarithmic-free solutions is proposed.
en.help_to_user: Provides an algebraic-geometric perspective and counting tools for singular Liouville equations, useful for classification and construction of solutions in related PDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Try to generalize the Lamé curve construction to higher-genus surfaces or non-flat backgrounds.
idea_spark.risk: In higher genus, the parametrization by algebraic curves may become too complicated, and monodromy analysis more difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: The connection between pre-modular forms and solution structures inspires the use of modular form theory to unify solution spaces under different singularity configurations.

papers.title: Reflected Stochastic Differential Equations Driven by G-Brownian Motion with Nonlinear Constraints
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the reflected stochastic differential equations driven by G-Brownian motion (reflected G-SDEs) with two nonlinear constraints. With the help of the Skorokhod problem with nonlinear constraints, we first study the doubly reflected G-Brownian motion, which is constructed pathwise and lies in the same G-expectation space as the G-Brownian motion. For the reflected G-SDE, the uniqueness is derived from some a priori estimate and the existence is obtained by a Picard iteration method. The comparison theorem of the solution and the individual constraining processes are provided.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了由G-布朗运动驱动的带两个非线性约束的反射随机微分方程，通过Skorokhod问题构造了双重反射G-布朗运动，并证明了解的存在唯一性和比较定理。
ai.motivation: 扩展反射随机微分方程理论到G-布朗运动框架下，处理非线性约束情形。
ai.method: 利用非线性约束的Skorokhod问题构造双重反射G-布朗运动，通过先验估计和Picard迭代证明解的存在唯一性。
ai.result: 得到了反射G-SDE解的存在唯一性以及比较定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理带非线性约束的随机系统提供了理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将反射G-SDE应用于金融中的带约束资产定价或风险度量。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性约束可能增加模型复杂性，实际应用需验证参数稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合G-期望与反射过程，可探索模型不确定性下的障碍期权定价。

en.tldr: This paper studies reflected stochastic differential equations driven by G-Brownian motion with two nonlinear constraints, constructs doubly reflected G-Brownian motion via the Skorokhod problem, and proves existence, uniqueness, and a comparison theorem.
en.motivation: Extend reflected SDE theory to the G-Brownian motion framework under nonlinear constraints.
en.method: Construct doubly reflected G-Brownian motion using the Skorokhod problem with nonlinear constraints; prove existence and uniqueness via a priori estimates and Picard iteration.
en.result: Existence, uniqueness, and a comparison theorem for reflected G-SDEs are established.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for stochastic systems with nonlinear constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Apply reflected G-SDEs to asset pricing or risk measures with constraints in finance.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlinear constraints may increase model complexity; parameter stability needs verification in applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining G-expectation with reflected processes could explore barrier option pricing under model uncertainty.

papers.title: Cumulative Euler flows
papers.summary: We consider the compressible Euler system for ideal gas flow in the absence of   any forces except the internal thermodynamic pressure. In this setting, and in dimensions   higher 1, it is known that wave-focusing can drive Euler solutions to amplitude blowup   in finite time from bounded initial data. In the known cases (self-similar, radial flows   \cites{gud,hun_60,jt3,laz,mrrs1,jls})   the primary flow variables are standard functions at time of blowup.   It is natural to ask if the Euler system admits even more singular behavior, and   specifically whether accumulation of mass, i.e., the appearance of a Dirac delta   in the density field, is possible.   We consider the class of radial affine motions \cites{mcvittie,sed, kell,sid_2014}   which are conveniently obtained via a Lagrangian formulation.   This class does include examples of cumulative behavior, and we observe that   there are two distinct mechanisms for accumulation, due to inertial effects or adverse   pressure gradients, respectively. However, we show that all affine cumulative solutions   necessarily exhibit unphysical behavior due to initially unbounded velocity and/or   acceleration in the far-field.   We also analyze the behavior of characteristics in   cumulative flows and consider concrete examples, including a class of 1-dimensional,   non-affine flows. Finally, we discuss the possibility of modifying the   known examples to obtain physically acceptable gas flows displaying   accumulation.

ai.tldr: 研究可压缩欧拉系统中质量累积（密度场出现狄拉克δ）的可能性，通过径向仿射运动类分析发现两种累积机制，但所有仿射累积解因远场初始速度/加速度无界而物理不可接受。
ai.motivation: 已知欧拉系统存在有限时间振幅爆破，但能否出现更奇异的狄拉克δ密度累积尚不清楚。
ai.method: 采用拉格朗日框架下的径向仿射运动类，分析惯性效应和逆压梯度两种累积机制，并考察特征线行为及一维非仿射流实例。
ai.result: 所有仿射累积解均因远场初始速度/加速度无界而物理不可接受；讨论了修改已知例子以获得物理可接受累积流的可能性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解可压缩欧拉系统中质量累积的数学限制和物理不可行性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索非仿射、非径向的初始条件，或引入弱解框架（如测度值解）来容纳狄拉克累积。
idea_spark.risk: 修改后的例子可能仍无法满足物理边界条件，或导致其他非物理解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从拉格朗日观点出发，结合特征线分析，可系统筛选可能产生累积的初始数据类。

en.tldr: Investigates the possibility of mass accumulation (Dirac delta in density) in the compressible Euler system, finding two mechanisms via radial affine motions, but all affine cumulative solutions are physically unacceptable due to unbounded far-field initial velocity/acceleration.
en.motivation: Known Euler solutions exhibit finite-time amplitude blowup, but whether more singular Dirac-delta density accumulation can occur is unclear.
en.method: Analyzes radial affine motions in Lagrangian framework, examines inertial and adverse pressure gradient mechanisms, and studies characteristic behavior and 1D non-affine examples.
en.result: All affine cumulative solutions are physically unacceptable due to unbounded far-field initial velocity/acceleration; discusses modifying known examples to obtain physically acceptable cumulative flows.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies mathematical constraints and physical unacceptability of mass accumulation in compressible Euler flows.

idea_spark.idea: Explore non-affine, non-radial initial conditions or weak solution frameworks (e.g., measure-valued solutions) to accommodate Dirac accumulation.
idea_spark.risk: Modified examples may still violate physical boundary conditions or introduce other non-physical features.
idea_spark.inspiration: Lagrangian viewpoint combined with characteristic analysis can systematically screen initial data classes that may produce accumulation.

papers.title: The Exact Replica Threshold for Nonlinear Moments of Quantum States
papers.summary: Joint measurements on multiple copies of a quantum state provide access to nonlinear observables such as $\operatorname{tr}(ρ^t)$, but whether replica number marks a sharp information-theoretic resource boundary has remained unclear. For every fixed order $t\ge 3$, existing protocols show that $\lceil t/2\rceil$ replicas already suffice for polynomial-sample estimation of $\operatorname{tr}(ρ^t)$, yet it has remained open whether one fewer replica must necessarily incur a sample-complexity barrier growing with the dimension. We prove that this is indeed the case in the sample/copy-access model with replica-limited joint measurements: any protocol restricted to $\lceil t/2\rceil-1$ replicas requires dimension-growing sample complexity, while $\lceil t/2\rceil$ replicas suffice by prior work. Thus the exact replica threshold for fixed-order pure moments is $\lceil t/2\rceil$. Equivalently, for fixed-order pure moments, one additional coherent replica is not merely useful but marks the exact threshold between polynomial-sample estimation and a dimension-growing regime in the replica-limited model. We further show that the same threshold law extends to a broad family of observable-weighted moments $\operatorname{tr}(Oρ^t)$, including Pauli observables and other observables with bounded operator norm and macroscopic trace norm. Coherent replica number therefore acts as a genuinely discrete resource for nonlinear quantum-state estimation.

ai.tldr: 证明了对于量子态的非线性矩，精确的副本数阈值为⌈t/2⌉，少于该阈值会导致样本复杂度随维度增长。
ai.motivation: 明确副本数作为量子态估计中非线性可观测量的信息论资源边界。
ai.method: 在副本受限的联合测量模型下，分析不同副本数下估计tr(ρ^t)的样本复杂度。
ai.result: ⌈t/2⌉-1个副本需要维度增长的样本复杂度，而⌈t/2⌉个副本足以实现多项式样本估计；该阈值也适用于可观测加权矩。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子态估计中相干副本数的资源价值，指导实验设计中的副本选择。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在噪声或有限相干性下副本数阈值是否仍然成立，或是否存在更优的测量策略。
idea_spark.risk: 实际量子系统中副本制备和联合测量的保真度可能影响阈值有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典统计中样本复杂度阈值启发，量子信息中离散资源（如副本数）可能定义新的计算相变。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典统计中样本复杂度阈值启发，量子信息中离散资源（如副本数）可能定义新的计算相变。

en.tldr: Proves that the exact replica threshold for nonlinear moments of quantum states is ⌈t/2⌉, below which sample complexity grows with dimension.
en.motivation: To clarify the information-theoretic resource boundary of replica number for nonlinear observables in quantum state estimation.
en.method: Analyzes sample complexity in the replica-limited joint measurement model for estimating tr(ρ^t) with varying replica numbers.
en.result: ⌈t/2⌉-1 replicas require dimension-growing sample complexity, while ⌈t/2⌉ replicas suffice for polynomial-sample estimation; the threshold extends to observable-weighted moments.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the resource value of coherent replica number in quantum state estimation and guides replica selection in experiments.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether the replica threshold holds under noise or limited coherence, or if better measurement strategies exist.
idea_spark.risk: Fidelity of replica preparation and joint measurements in real quantum systems may affect threshold validity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by sample complexity thresholds in classical statistics, discrete resources (e.g., replica number) in quantum information may define new computational phase transitions.

papers.title: Numerical homogenization for indefinite time-harmonic Maxwell equations
papers.summary: We propose a novel numerical homogenization method based on the edge multiscale approach for solving indefinite time-harmonic Maxwell equations in heterogeneous media with large wavenumber. Numerical methods for these equations in homogeneous media with high wavenumber are particularly challenging due to the so-called pollution effect: the mesh size must be significantly smaller than the reciprocal of the wavenumber to achieve a desired accuracy. This challenge is amplified in heterogeneous media, which frequently occur in practical applications such as metamaterial simulations, since resolving the heterogeneity is necessary for obtaining reliable solutions. Our approach overcomes this difficulty by avoiding explicit resolution of the heterogeneity, while employing a mesh size that depends almost linearly on the reciprocal of the wavenumber. The approximation properties and stability of the method rely critically on the development and rigorous analysis of a novel, nonstandard variational formulation, which constitutes the main innovation of this work. Extensive numerical experiments are provided to validate our theoretical findings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于边缘多尺度方法的数值均匀化方法，用于求解大波数非均匀介质中的不定时谐麦克斯韦方程，避免显式解析非均匀性，且网格尺寸几乎与波数倒数成线性关系。
ai.motivation: 高波数均匀介质中的麦克斯韦方程因污染效应需要极细网格，而非均匀介质（如超材料模拟）进一步加剧了计算挑战。现有方法需同时解析非均匀性和波数，计算成本过高。
ai.method: 采用边缘多尺度数值均匀化方法，结合一种新颖的非标准变分公式，通过避免显式解析非均匀性，使网格尺寸几乎线性依赖于波数倒数。
ai.result: 理论分析证明了方法的逼近性质和稳定性，数值实验验证了理论结果，表明该方法能有效克服污染效应和非均匀性带来的困难。
ai.help_to_user: 为高波数非均匀介质中的电磁波模拟提供一种高效数值方案，降低网格要求，适用于超材料等实际应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将边缘多尺度方法推广到时域麦克斯韦方程或非线性介质，或结合自适应网格细化进一步优化计算效率。
idea_spark.risk: 非标准变分公式的数学分析可能依赖特定假设，推广至更复杂介质（如色散或损耗介质）时需重新验证稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受超材料模拟中多尺度特性启发，利用均匀化思想绕过精细网格需求，类似思路可应用于光子晶体或电磁隐身设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a numerical homogenization method based on the edge multiscale approach for indefinite time-harmonic Maxwell equations in heterogeneous media with large wavenumber, avoiding explicit resolution of heterogeneity and using a mesh size almost linear in the reciprocal wavenumber.
en.motivation: High-wavenumber Maxwell equations in homogeneous media suffer from the pollution effect requiring very fine meshes, and heterogeneous media (e.g., metamaterial simulations) further amplify the challenge. Existing methods must resolve both heterogeneity and wavenumber, leading to prohibitive computational cost.
en.method: Employs an edge multiscale numerical homogenization method with a novel nonstandard variational formulation, bypassing explicit resolution of heterogeneity and achieving a mesh size almost linearly dependent on the reciprocal wavenumber.
en.result: Theoretical analysis proves approximation properties and stability; extensive numerical experiments validate the theory, showing the method effectively overcomes the pollution effect and heterogeneity challenges.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient numerical scheme for electromagnetic wave simulation in high-wavenumber heterogeneous media, reducing mesh requirements and applicable to metamaterials and similar applications.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the edge multiscale method to time-domain Maxwell equations or nonlinear media, or combine with adaptive mesh refinement to further optimize computational efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: The mathematical analysis of the nonstandard variational formulation may rely on specific assumptions; generalization to more complex media (e.g., dispersive or lossy) requires re-validation of stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multiscale features in metamaterial simulations, using homogenization to bypass fine mesh requirements; similar ideas could be applied to photonic crystals or electromagnetic cloaking design.

papers.title: Skew-orthogonal polynomials for a quartic Freud weight: two classes of quasi-orthogonal polynomials
papers.summary: This work is a thorough investigation of skew-orthogonal polynomials with respect to a quartic Freud weight. We provide an explicit method to evaluate skew-orthogonal polynomials of any degree as linear combinations of orthogonal polynomials. The coefficients of these combinations can be evaluated via novel recursive relations. Moreover, we observe that skew-orthogonal polynomials with even and odd degree constitute two families of quasi-orthogonal polynomials with respect to two different semi-classical Laguerre weights, and we provide the first instance of closed recursive relations involving skew-orthogonal polynomials only.

ai.tldr: 本文深入研究了关于四次Freud权的斜正交多项式，给出了任意次斜正交多项式作为正交多项式线性组合的显式方法，并发现偶次和奇次斜正交多项式分别构成关于两个不同半经典Laguerre权的准正交多项式族。
ai.motivation: 斜正交多项式在随机矩阵理论和可积系统中具有重要应用，但关于四次Freud权的斜正交多项式缺乏系统研究。
ai.method: 将斜正交多项式表示为正交多项式的线性组合，通过新的递推关系计算组合系数，并利用准正交多项式理论建立封闭递推关系。
ai.result: 得到了任意次斜正交多项式的显式表达式，发现了偶次和奇次斜正交多项式分别对应两个半经典Laguerre权的准正交多项式，并首次给出了仅涉及斜正交多项式的封闭递推关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究四次Freud权下的斜正交多项式提供了系统方法和显式公式，有助于随机矩阵和可积系统领域的进一步研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用准正交多项式的性质，可以简化斜正交多项式的计算，并可能发现新的正交多项式族。
idea_spark.risk: 递推关系的稳定性可能受数值误差影响，需验证高次情况下的计算精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将斜正交多项式分解为两个准正交多项式族的方法，可启发其他非标准正交多项式系统的研究。

en.tldr: This work thoroughly investigates skew-orthogonal polynomials with respect to a quartic Freud weight, providing an explicit method to express them as linear combinations of orthogonal polynomials, and revealing that even and odd degree skew-orthogonal polynomials form two families of quasi-orthogonal polynomials with respect to two different semi-classical Laguerre weights.
en.motivation: Skew-orthogonal polynomials are important in random matrix theory and integrable systems, but a systematic study for the quartic Freud weight was lacking.
en.method: Skew-orthogonal polynomials are expressed as linear combinations of orthogonal polynomials with coefficients computed via novel recursive relations; quasi-orthogonal polynomial theory is used to derive closed recursions.
en.result: Explicit expressions for skew-orthogonal polynomials of any degree are obtained; even and odd degree families are identified as quasi-orthogonal polynomials for two semi-classical Laguerre weights; the first closed recursive relations involving only skew-orthogonal polynomials are provided.
en.help_to_user: Provides systematic methods and explicit formulas for skew-orthogonal polynomials under the quartic Freud weight, aiding further research in random matrices and integrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using quasi-orthogonal polynomial properties may simplify computation of skew-orthogonal polynomials and reveal new orthogonal polynomial families.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical stability of recursive relations may degrade for high degrees; accuracy needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing skew-orthogonal polynomials into two quasi-orthogonal families may inspire studies of other non-standard orthogonal polynomial systems.

papers.title: Non static exponential turnpike property for optimal control problems with symmetries and boundary conditions
papers.summary: Optimal control problems with symmetries often admit a non stationary turnpike property called trim turnpike, which characterizes the convergence of optimal solutions to certain symmetry induced trajectories called trim primitives. In this paper we establish an exponential trim turnpike property for a class of optimal control problems with structural properties related to Abelian Lie group symmetries. The key ingredient of our approach is the introduction of an appropriate reduced optimal control problem. We show that extremals of the original problem can be characterized through a reduced Hamiltonian boundary value problem that coincides with the optimality system of the reduced problem. Under a hyperbolicity assumption on the equilibrium of the corresponding reduced Hamiltonian system we prove that optimal trajectories remain exponentially close, up to boundary layers near the endpoints, to a trim primitive defined by the static reduced problem. The theoretical results are illustrated on three representative examples: linear and nonlinear problems with quadratic cost and the Kepler orbital transfer problem.

ai.tldr: 针对具有阿贝尔李群对称性的一类最优控制问题，建立了非静态指数转向性质，证明最优轨迹在边界层外指数逼近约简静态问题定义的修剪原始轨迹。
ai.motivation: 对称性最优控制问题常出现非平稳转向性质（修剪转向），但缺乏指数收敛的严格证明。
ai.method: 引入约简最优控制问题，通过约简哈密顿边值问题刻画原问题极值曲线，并在平衡点双曲性假设下证明指数逼近。
ai.result: 最优轨迹在端点附近边界层外指数收敛到修剪原始轨迹，线性/非线性二次成本及开普勒轨道转移实例验证。
ai.help_to_user: 为对称性最优控制问题的数值求解提供理论收敛保证，指导算法设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用对称性降维构造约简问题，将原问题指数转向性质转化为约简系统平衡点的双曲性分析。
idea_spark.risk: 双曲性假设可能不适用于所有对称性系统，需验证约简系统平衡点的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将对称性约简与转向性质结合，为复杂动力学系统的最优控制提供理论框架。

en.tldr: For a class of optimal control problems with Abelian Lie group symmetries, we establish a non-stationary exponential turnpike property, proving that optimal trajectories exponentially approach a trim primitive defined by the static reduced problem except near boundary layers.
en.motivation: Optimal control problems with symmetries often exhibit a non-stationary turnpike property (trim turnpike), but exponential convergence was not rigorously proven.
en.method: We introduce a reduced optimal control problem, characterize extremals via a reduced Hamiltonian boundary value problem, and prove exponential approximation under a hyperbolicity assumption on the equilibrium of the reduced Hamiltonian system.
en.result: Optimal trajectories converge exponentially to a trim primitive away from boundary layers, illustrated on linear/nonlinear quadratic cost examples and the Kepler orbital transfer problem.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence guarantees for numerical methods in symmetric optimal control problems.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit symmetry reduction to construct a reduced problem, converting the exponential turnpike property into hyperbolicity analysis of the reduced system's equilibrium.
idea_spark.risk: The hyperbolicity assumption may fail for some symmetric systems; stability of the reduced equilibrium must be verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining symmetry reduction with turnpike properties offers a theoretical framework for optimal control of complex dynamical systems.

papers.title: Optimal sequential decision-making for error propagation mitigation in digital twins
papers.summary: Here, we explore the problem of error propagation mitigation in modular digital twins as a sequential decision process. Building on a companion study that used a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) to infer latent error regimes from surrogate-physics residuals, we develop a Markov Decision Process (MDP) in which the inferred regimes serve as states, corrective interventions serve as actions, and a scalar reward that takes into consideration the cost-benefit tradeoff between system fidelity and maintenance expense. The baseline transition matrix is extracted from the HMM-learned parameters. We then extend the formulation to a Partially Observable MDP (POMDP) that accounts for the imperfect nature of regime classification by maintaining a belief distribution updated via Bayesian filtering, with the HMM confusion matrix serving as the observation model. Both formulations are solved via dynamic programming and validated through Gillespie stochastic simulation. We then benchmark two model-free reinforcement learning algorithms, Q-learning and REINFORCE, to assess whether effective policies can be learned without explicit model knowledge. A systematic comparison of different intervention policies demonstrates that the MDP policy achieves the highest cumulative reward and fraction of time in nominal operation, while the POMDP recovers approximately 95\% of MDP performance under realistic observation noise. Sensitivity analyses across observation quality, repair probability, and discount factor confirm the robustness of these conclusions, and the major gaps in the policy hierarchy are statistically significant at $p < 0.001$. The gap between MDP and POMDP performance quantifies the value of information providing a principled criterion for investing in improved classification accuracy.

ai.tldr: 将数字孪生中的误差传播缓解建模为序贯决策问题，通过MDP和POMDP求解，并比较了强化学习算法。
ai.motivation: 模块化数字孪生中误差传播会降低系统保真度，需要有效的干预策略来平衡保真度和维护成本。
ai.method: 基于隐马尔可夫模型推断潜在误差状态，构建MDP和POMDP，通过动态规划求解，并对比Q学习和REINFORCE算法。
ai.result: MDP策略获得最高累积奖励和标称运行时间占比，POMDP在观测噪声下恢复约95%的MDP性能，策略差异统计显著。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种量化信息价值、指导分类精度投资的原则性方法。

idea_spark.idea: 结合贝叶斯滤波与强化学习，在部分可观测环境下学习鲁棒干预策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设（如状态转移矩阵）可能偏离真实动态，导致策略泛化性不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用HMM混淆矩阵作为观测模型，将分类不确定性纳入决策，启发更鲁棒的主动感知策略设计。
