en.tldr: Models error propagation mitigation in digital twins as a sequential decision problem, solved via MDP and POMDP, and benchmarks reinforcement learning algorithms.
en.motivation: Error propagation in modular digital twins degrades system fidelity, requiring effective intervention policies balancing fidelity and maintenance cost.
en.method: Infers latent error regimes via HMM, formulates MDP and POMDP solved by dynamic programming, and compares Q-learning and REINFORCE.
en.result: MDP policy achieves highest cumulative reward and nominal operation time; POMDP recovers ~95% of MDP performance under observation noise; policy gaps are statistically significant.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled criterion for investing in improved classification accuracy by quantifying the value of information.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Bayesian filtering with reinforcement learning to learn robust intervention policies under partial observability.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions (e.g., transition matrix) may deviate from real dynamics, limiting policy generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using the HMM confusion matrix as an observation model incorporates classification uncertainty into decision-making, inspiring more robust active sensing strategies.

papers.title: Operational Feature Fingerprints of Graph Datasets via a White-Box Signal-Subspace Probe
papers.summary: Graph neural networks achieve strong node-classification accuracy, but their learned message passing entangles ego attributes, neighborhood smoothing, high-pass graph differences, class geometry, and classifier boundaries in an opaque representation. This obscures why a node is classified and what feature-level graph-learning mechanisms a dataset requires.   We propose WG-SRC, a white-box signal-subspace probe for prediction and graph dataset diagnosis. WG-SRC replaces learned message passing with a fixed, named graph-signal dictionary of raw features, row-normalized and symmetric-normalized low-pass propagation, and high-pass graph differences. It combines Fisher coordinate selection, class-wise PCA subspaces, closed-form multi-alpha ridge classification, and validation-based score fusion, so prediction and analysis use explicit class subspaces, energy-controlled dimensions, and closed-form linear decisions.   As a white-box graph-learning instrument, WG-SRC uses predictive performance to validate its diagnostics: across six node-classification datasets, the scaffold remains competitive with reproduced graph baselines and achieves positive average gain under aligned splits. Its atlas, produced by a predictor, decomposes behavior into raw-feature, low-pass, high-pass, class-geometric, and ridge-boundary components. These operational feature fingerprints distinguish low-pass-dominated Amazon graphs, mixed high-pass and class-geometrically complex Chameleon behavior, and raw- or boundary-sensitive WebKB graphs. As intrinsic classifier outputs rather than post-hoc explanations, these fingerprints provide post-evaluation guidance for later analysis and dataset-specific modification. Aligned mechanistic interventions support this guidance by indicating when high-pass blocks act as removable noise, when raw features should be preserved, and when ridge-type boundary correction matters.

ai.tldr: 提出白盒信号子空间探针WG-SRC，通过固定图信号字典和封闭形式分类器，为图数据集生成操作特征指纹，诊断其学习机制。
ai.motivation: 图神经网络的黑箱表示掩盖了节点分类的原因和数据集所需的学习机制，需要可解释的诊断工具。
ai.method: 用固定命名的图信号字典（原始特征、低通传播、高通差异）替代学习消息传递，结合Fisher坐标选择、类PCA子空间、多α岭分类和验证分数融合。
ai.result: 在六个节点分类数据集上，WG-SRC与基线竞争且平均增益为正；其指纹区分了低通主导、混合高通和原始特征敏感等数据集行为。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解图数据集的内在特征需求，指导后续分析和模型修改。

idea_spark.idea: 将固定信号字典与封闭形式分类结合，实现无需训练的可解释预测和数据集指纹生成。
idea_spark.risk: 固定字典可能无法覆盖复杂图结构的所有信号模式，导致诊断偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信号处理中子空间分解和Fisher判别分析启发，将图学习机制分解为可解释组件。

zh.tldr: 提出白盒信号子空间探针WG-SRC，通过固定图信号字典和封闭形式分类器，为图数据集生成操作特征指纹，诊断其学习机制。
zh.motivation: 图神经网络的黑箱表示掩盖了节点分类的原因和数据集所需的学习机制，需要可解释的诊断工具。
zh.method: 用固定命名的图信号字典（原始特征、低通传播、高通差异）替代学习消息传递，结合Fisher坐标选择、类PCA子空间、多α岭分类和验证分数融合。
zh.result: 在六个节点分类数据集上，WG-SRC与基线竞争且平均增益为正；其指纹区分了低通主导、混合高通和原始特征敏感等数据集行为。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解图数据集的内在特征需求，指导后续分析和模型修改。

en.tldr: Proposes WG-SRC, a white-box signal-subspace probe that generates operational feature fingerprints for graph datasets via a fixed graph-signal dictionary and closed-form classifiers, diagnosing their learning mechanisms.
en.motivation: Black-box GNN representations obscure why nodes are classified and what mechanisms a dataset requires, necessitating interpretable diagnostic tools.
en.method: Replaces learned message passing with a fixed, named graph-signal dictionary (raw features, low-pass, high-pass), combined with Fisher coordinate selection, class-wise PCA subspaces, closed-form multi-alpha ridge classification, and validation-based score fusion.
en.result: On six node-classification datasets, WG-SRC remains competitive with baselines and achieves positive average gain; its fingerprints distinguish low-pass-dominated, mixed high-pass, and raw-feature-sensitive dataset behaviors.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the intrinsic feature requirements of graph datasets, guiding subsequent analysis and model modifications.

idea_spark.idea: Combining a fixed signal dictionary with closed-form classification enables training-free interpretable prediction and dataset fingerprint generation.
idea_spark.risk: The fixed dictionary may fail to cover all signal patterns in complex graph structures, leading to diagnostic bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by subspace decomposition and Fisher discriminant analysis in signal processing, decomposing graph learning mechanisms into interpretable components.

papers.title: Where Should LoRA Go? Component-Type Placement in Hybrid Language Models
papers.summary: Hybrid language models that interleave attention with recurrent components are increasingly competitive with pure Transformers, yet standard LoRA practice applies adapters uniformly without considering the distinct functional roles of each component type. We systematically study component-type LoRA placement across two hybrid architectures -- Qwen3.5-0.8B (sequential, GatedDeltaNet + softmax attention) and Falcon-H1-0.5B (parallel, Mamba-2 SSM + attention) -- fine-tuned on three domains and evaluated on five benchmarks. We find that the attention pathway -- despite being the minority component -- consistently outperforms full-model adaptation with 5-10x fewer trainable parameters. Crucially, adapting the recurrent backbone is destructive in sequential hybrids (-14.8 pp on GSM8K) but constructive in parallel ones (+8.6 pp). We further document a transfer asymmetry: parallel hybrids exhibit positive cross-task transfer while sequential hybrids suffer catastrophic forgetting. These results establish that hybrid topology fundamentally determines adaptation response, and that component-aware LoRA placement is a necessary design dimension for hybrid architectures.

ai.tldr: 研究在混合语言模型中，LoRA适配器应如何根据组件类型（注意力 vs 循环）进行放置，发现注意力路径即使参数更少也能超越全模型微调，而循环骨干的效果取决于混合拓扑结构。
ai.motivation: 标准LoRA对所有组件统一应用，忽略了混合模型中注意力与循环组件的不同功能角色，导致适配效率低下。
ai.method: 在两种混合架构（Qwen3.5-0.8B顺序型、Falcon-H1-0.5B并行型）上，系统比较不同组件类型（注意力路径、循环骨干）的LoRA放置效果，并在三个领域五个基准上评估。
ai.result: 注意力路径以5-10倍更少参数超越全模型微调；顺序混合中循环骨干适配有害（GSM8K下降14.8个百分点），并行混合中则有益（提升8.6个百分点）；并行混合有正向跨任务迁移，顺序混合则出现灾难性遗忘。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在混合语言模型中如何选择LoRA放置位置以提升微调效率和性能，避免盲目统一适配。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应LoRA放置算法，根据任务和混合拓扑动态决定每个组件的适配强度或位置。
idea_spark.risk: 不同混合拓扑的适配行为差异大，需大量实验验证通用性，且可能增加超参数调优复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴神经架构搜索思想，将LoRA放置视为可搜索的离散决策，自动发现最优组件适配方案。

en.tldr: This paper studies where LoRA adapters should be placed in hybrid language models based on component type (attention vs recurrent), finding that the attention pathway outperforms full-model fine-tuning with 5-10x fewer parameters, while the effect of adapting the recurrent backbone depends on the hybrid topology.
en.motivation: Standard LoRA applies adapters uniformly across all components, ignoring the distinct functional roles of attention and recurrent components in hybrid models, leading to suboptimal adaptation efficiency.
en.method: Systematically compare LoRA placement on different component types (attention pathway, recurrent backbone) across two hybrid architectures (Qwen3.5-0.8B sequential, Falcon-H1-0.5B parallel), fine-tuned on three domains and evaluated on five benchmarks.
en.result: The attention pathway outperforms full-model adaptation with 5-10x fewer parameters; adapting the recurrent backbone is destructive in sequential hybrids (-14.8 pp on GSM8K) but constructive in parallel ones (+8.6 pp); parallel hybrids show positive cross-task transfer while sequential hybrids suffer catastrophic forgetting.
en.help_to_user: Helps users decide where to place LoRA adapters in hybrid language models to improve fine-tuning efficiency and performance, avoiding blind uniform adaptation.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive LoRA placement algorithm that dynamically determines the adaptation strength or location for each component based on task and hybrid topology.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptation behavior varies significantly across hybrid topologies, requiring extensive experiments to verify generality and potentially increasing hyperparameter tuning complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow from neural architecture search to treat LoRA placement as a searchable discrete decision, automatically discovering the optimal component adaptation scheme.

papers.title: Trace estimates and improved pointwise bounds for joint eigenfunctions
papers.summary: For $L^2$-normalized joint eigenfunctions in a quantum integrable system, [GT20] gave polynomial improvements over the standard Hömander bounds for typical points. In this paper, we improve their result by establishing a sharp bound of $h^{\frac{-n+k+1}2}$ for the points satisfying a rank $k$ non-degeneracy condition.

ai.tldr: 本文在量子可积系统中，对联合本征函数建立了更优的点态界，改进了已有结果。
ai.motivation: 改进[GT20]中关于典型点的多项式界，获得更精确的估计。
ai.method: 利用秩k非退化条件，推导出h^{(-n+k+1)/2}的尖锐界。
ai.result: 对满足秩k非退化条件的点，得到了比标准Hömander界更好的点态界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子可积系统中联合本征函数的局部行为。

idea_spark.idea: 将秩条件与半经典分析结合，优化点态估计。
idea_spark.risk: 非退化条件可能限制适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在更一般的可积系统中探索类似界。

en.tldr: This paper improves pointwise bounds for joint eigenfunctions in quantum integrable systems, achieving sharp estimates under a rank k non-degeneracy condition.
en.motivation: To improve the polynomial bounds of [GT20] for typical points and obtain sharper estimates.
en.method: Using a rank k non-degeneracy condition to derive a sharp bound of h^{(-n+k+1)/2}.
en.result: Established a sharp pointwise bound for points satisfying the rank k non-degeneracy condition, improving over standard Hömander bounds.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the local behavior of joint eigenfunctions in quantum integrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine rank conditions with semiclassical analysis to optimize pointwise estimates.
idea_spark.risk: The non-degeneracy condition may limit the applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of similar bounds in more general integrable systems.

papers.title: Adaptive Head Budgeting for Efficient Multi-Head Attention
papers.summary: Transformers have become the dominant architecture across a wide range of domains, largely due to the effectiveness of multi-head attention in capturing diverse representation subspaces. However, standard multi-head attention activates all heads uniformly for every input, regardless of task requirements or input complexity. In many scenarios, particularly for coarse-grained tasks such as text classification, the relevant information is often global and does not require the full diversity of attention heads. As a consequence, using a fixed number of heads can introduce unnecessary computational cost or lead to suboptimal performance when the allocation does not match the input. To address this limitation, we introduce BudgetFormer, a Transformer architecture equipped with an adaptive multi-head attention mechanism that dynamically allocates computational resources. Our approach learns, for each input, both a head budget corresponding to the number of attention heads required, and a relevance distribution that selects the most informative heads. We also propose a training strategy based on an exploration and exploitation trade-off, allowing the model to discover effective head configurations before converging to efficient usage patterns. Experiments on text classification tasks of varying complexity show that our method reduces inference cost in terms of FLOPs and memory, while also achieving performance that can surpass standard full multi-head attention. These results highlight the potential of adaptive head allocation as a principled approach to improving both efficiency and effectiveness in Transformer models.

ai.tldr: 提出BudgetFormer，通过自适应分配注意力头数量来提升Transformer效率。
ai.motivation: 标准多头注意力对所有输入使用固定头数，导致粗粒度任务（如文本分类）计算浪费或性能次优。
ai.method: 为每个输入学习头预算（所需头数）和相关性分布（选择最信息量头），并采用探索-利用训练策略。
ai.result: 在文本分类任务上，相比标准多头注意力，降低了FLOPs和内存，同时性能可超越之。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过动态头分配在保持或提升性能的同时减少Transformer计算开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将头预算与相关性分布联合学习，结合探索-利用策略，实现计算与性能的帕累托最优。
idea_spark.risk: 头预算预测可能增加额外计算开销，且探索阶段可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受条件计算和神经架构搜索启发，将注意力头选择视为一个可学习的离散决策问题。

en.tldr: Proposes BudgetFormer, which adaptively allocates the number of attention heads to improve Transformer efficiency.
en.motivation: Standard multi-head attention uses a fixed number of heads for all inputs, causing computational waste or suboptimal performance on coarse-grained tasks like text classification.
en.method: Learns a head budget (number of heads needed) and a relevance distribution (selecting the most informative heads) per input, with an exploration-exploitation training strategy.
en.result: On text classification tasks, reduces FLOPs and memory compared to standard full multi-head attention, while sometimes surpassing its performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how dynamic head allocation can reduce Transformer computational cost while maintaining or improving performance.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly learn head budget and relevance distribution with an exploration-exploitation strategy to achieve Pareto-optimal trade-off between computation and performance.
idea_spark.risk: Head budget prediction may introduce extra computational overhead, and the exploration phase could be unstable.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by conditional computation and neural architecture search, treating head selection as a learnable discrete decision problem.

papers.title: Gradient Hölder regularity for nonlocal double phase equations
papers.summary: This paper is devoted to investigating the interior $C^{1, α}$ regularity of viscosity solutions to the nonlocal double phase equations $$ \int_{\mathbb{R}^d} \left(\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{p-2}(u(x)-u(y))}{|x-y|^{d+sp}}+a(x,y)\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{q-2}(u(x)-u(y))}{|x-y|^{d+tq}}\right)\,dy=0, $$ where $2\le p\le q$, $s, t\in (0, 1)$ with $s\le t$, and $a(x, y)\ge0$. In the degenerate case, we solve the higher regularity issue raised by De Filippis-Palatucci [J. Differential Equations \textbf{267} (2019) 547--586]. By assuming the Lipschitz continuity of the modulating coefficient $a$, we are able to prove that the gradient of solution is Hölder continuous, provided the distance of $tq$ and $sp$ is suitably small. The core challenges consist in precisely characterizing the subtle interaction among the pointwise behaviour of the coefficient $a$, the growth exponents and the differentiability orders.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了非局部双相方程粘性解的梯度Hölder正则性，在退化情形下解决了De Filippis-Palatucci提出的高阶正则性问题。
ai.motivation: 解决非局部双相方程在退化情形下的高阶正则性问题，该问题由De Filippis-Palatucci提出。
ai.method: 假设调制系数a具有Lipschitz连续性，并利用tq与sp距离适当小的条件，通过精确刻画系数点态行为、增长指数和可微阶数之间的微妙相互作用来证明梯度Hölder连续性。
ai.result: 证明了在适当条件下，解的梯度是Hölder连续的。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非局部双相方程粘性解的正则性理论，特别是梯度Hölder连续性的证明方法。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将调制系数的Lipschitz条件放宽为更弱的Hölder条件，并探索是否仍能保持梯度Hölder连续性。
idea_spark.risk: 系数正则性降低可能导致技术困难，需要更精细的估计或新的补偿机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从De Filippis-Palatucci的未解决问题出发，结合Lipschitz系数假设，启发了对非局部双相方程正则性机制的深入理解。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the interior C^{1,α} regularity of viscosity solutions to nonlocal double phase equations, solving the higher regularity issue raised by De Filippis-Palatucci in the degenerate case.
en.motivation: To solve the higher regularity issue for nonlocal double phase equations in the degenerate case, as raised by De Filippis-Palatucci.
en.method: Assuming Lipschitz continuity of the modulating coefficient a and a suitably small distance between tq and sp, the proof precisely characterizes the subtle interaction among the pointwise behavior of a, growth exponents, and differentiability orders to establish gradient Hölder continuity.
en.result: It is proved that the gradient of the solution is Hölder continuous under the given conditions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the regularity theory of viscosity solutions for nonlocal double phase equations, especially the proof method for gradient Hölder continuity.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to relax the Lipschitz condition on the modulating coefficient to a weaker Hölder condition and explore whether gradient Hölder continuity still holds.
idea_spark.risk: Weaker coefficient regularity may introduce technical difficulties, requiring more refined estimates or new compensation mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the open problem of De Filippis-Palatucci and combining the Lipschitz coefficient assumption, this work inspires a deeper understanding of the regularity mechanism for nonlocal double phase equations.

papers.title: Weighted Dirichlet-type inequalities for the decreasing rearrangement in cylinders
papers.summary: In this paper weighted Dirichlet-type inequalities for the decreasing rearrangement in cylinders are proved. A weighted isoperimetric inequality is also obtained.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了柱体上递减重排的加权Dirichlet型不等式，并得到了一个加权等周不等式。
ai.motivation: 研究柱体上加权Dirichlet型不等式与递减重排的关系，并探索加权等周不等式。
ai.method: 通过分析递减重排在柱体上的性质，建立加权Dirichlet型不等式，并推导加权等周不等式。
ai.result: 证明了柱体上递减重排的加权Dirichlet型不等式，并获得了加权等周不等式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了柱体上加权不等式的新结果，可用于偏微分方程和几何分析中的相关研究。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将递减重排与加权Sobolev不等式结合，探索新的不等式形式。
idea_spark.risk: 加权等周不等式的具体形式可能依赖于权函数的正则性，推广时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从柱体的对称性出发，可能启发其他对称区域上的加权不等式研究。

en.tldr: This paper proves weighted Dirichlet-type inequalities for the decreasing rearrangement in cylinders and obtains a weighted isoperimetric inequality.
en.motivation: To investigate the relationship between weighted Dirichlet-type inequalities and decreasing rearrangement in cylinders, and to explore weighted isoperimetric inequalities.
en.method: By analyzing properties of decreasing rearrangement in cylinders, weighted Dirichlet-type inequalities are established, and a weighted isoperimetric inequality is derived.
en.result: Weighted Dirichlet-type inequalities for decreasing rearrangement in cylinders are proved, along with a weighted isoperimetric inequality.
en.help_to_user: Provides new results on weighted inequalities in cylinders, useful for research in partial differential equations and geometric analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Consider combining decreasing rearrangement with weighted Sobolev inequalities to explore new inequality forms.
idea_spark.risk: The specific form of the weighted isoperimetric inequality may depend on the regularity of the weight function, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The symmetry of cylinders may inspire research on weighted inequalities in other symmetric domains.

papers.title: Tetrahedral $L$-operators, tensor Schur polynomials and $q$-deformed loop elementary symmetric functions
papers.summary: We study three-dimensional partition functions constructed from the tetrahedral $L$-operator introduced and studied by Bazhanov-Sergeev and Kuniba-Maruyama-Okado. First, we explore the $q=0$ case, extending the authors' previous results and giving applications by a further analysis on the Zamolodchikov-Faddeev algebra. We introduce a class of partition functions which can be expressed as the tensor Schur polynomials, a class of products of Schur polynomials. As an application, we derive the shuffle formula for the Schur polynomials which is geometrically the pushforward formula by Joźefiak-Pragacz-Lascoux. We also give a derivation and a unification of the Gustafson-Milne and Feh{é}r--N{é}methi--Rim{á}nyi identities, and introduce a family of Laurent polynomials using divided difference operators which imitates the Schubert polynomials from the perspective of our study. We also present an application to the steady state of the multispecies totally asymmetric simple exclusion process. Second, we investigate several classes of partition functions for the generic $q$ case, and determine the explicit forms as deformations of the elementary symmetric functions. One of them can be regarded as (an extension of) a $q$-deformed loop elementary symmetric functions.

papers.title: Dynamic solutions of next generation neural field models with delays
papers.summary: We study networks of theta neurons arranged on a ring with delayed interactions. In the continuum limit the systems are described by next generation neural field models with delays. We consider distributed delays with both finite and infinite support, and conduction delays. The stability of spatially uniform and localized bump states is determined, and we find that they undergo Hopf bifurcations as parameters related to the delays are varied. These bifurcations create traveling waves and ``breathing'' bump solutions. These dynamic solutions satisfy self-consistency equations and we show how to efficiently solve these equations. Following traveling waves and periodic solutions as parameters are varied provides a global picture of the influence of different delays on pattern formation processes in spatially extended networks of theta neurons.

ai.tldr: 研究环形排列的θ神经元网络在延迟相互作用下的动力学，提出下一代神经场模型，分析延迟对时空模式形成的影响。
ai.motivation: 理解不同延迟类型（分布延迟、传导延迟）如何影响神经网络的模式形成过程。
ai.method: 建立连续极限下的神经场模型，通过自洽方程求解行波和呼吸凸起解，并利用分岔分析研究稳定性。
ai.result: 发现延迟参数变化可引发Hopf分岔，产生行波和呼吸凸起解，并给出全局模式形成图景。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究延迟神经网络的时空动力学提供理论框架和高效求解方法。

en.tldr: We study networks of theta neurons on a ring with delayed interactions, deriving next-generation neural field models and analyzing how delays lead to traveling waves and breathing bumps via Hopf bifurcations.

en.method: Continuum-limit neural field models with self-consistency equations are solved efficiently; stability and bifurcations are analyzed.
en.result: Hopf bifurcations induced by delay parameters create traveling waves and breathing bumps, providing a global picture of pattern formation.
en.help_to_user: Offers a theoretical framework and efficient solution method for studying spatiotemporal dynamics in delayed neural networks.

papers.title: Universal Transformers Need Memory: Depth-State Trade-offs in Adaptive Recursive Reasoning
papers.summary: We study learned memory tokens as computational scratchpad for a single-block Universal Transformer (UT) with Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) on Sudoku-Extreme, a combinatorial reasoning benchmark. We find that memory tokens are empirically necessary: across all configurations tested -- 3 seeds, multiple token counts, two initialization schemes, ACT and fixed-depth processing -- no configuration without memory tokens achieves non-trivial performance. The optimal count exhibits a sharp lower threshold (T=0 always fails, T=4 is borderline, T=8 reliably succeeds for 81-cell puzzles) followed by a stable plateau (T=8-32, 57.4% +/- 0.7% exact-match) and collapse from attention dilution at T=64.   During experimentation, we identify a router initialization trap that causes >70% of training runs to fail: both default zero-bias initialization (p ~ 0.5) and Graves' recommended positive bias (p ~ 0.73) cause tokens to halt after ~2 steps at initialization, settling into a shallow equilibrium (halt ~ 5-7) that the model cannot escape. Inverting the bias to -3 ("deep start," p ~ 0.05) eliminates this failure mode. We confirm through ablation that the trap is inherent to ACT initialization, not an artifact of our architecture choices.   With reliable training established, we show that (1) ACT provides more consistent results than fixed-depth processing (56.9% +/- 0.7% vs 53.4% +/- 9.3% across 3 seeds); (2) ACT with lambda warmup achieves matching accuracy (57.0% +/- 1.1%) using 34% fewer ponder steps; and (3) attention heads specialize into memory readers, constraint propagators, and integrators across recursive depth. Code is available at https://github.com/che-shr-cat/utm-jax.

ai.tldr: 研究了通用Transformer中记忆令牌作为计算草稿纸的作用，发现记忆令牌在Sudoku-Extreme推理任务中不可或缺，并揭示了路由器初始化陷阱及其解决方案。
ai.motivation: 探索通用Transformer在组合推理任务中是否需要显式记忆，以及记忆令牌数量、初始化策略和自适应计算时间的影响。
ai.method: 在单块通用Transformer上使用自适应计算时间，测试不同记忆令牌数量、初始化方案和固定深度处理，分析性能并识别初始化陷阱。
ai.result: 无记忆令牌时性能为零；最佳令牌数为8-32，准确率约57.4%；ACT比固定深度更稳定；负偏置初始化消除陷阱；注意力头分化出不同功能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了在通用Transformer中有效使用记忆令牌和避免初始化陷阱的实用指导。

en.tldr: Investigates learned memory tokens as computational scratchpad for a single-block Universal Transformer on Sudoku-Extreme, finding memory tokens necessary, identifying a router initialization trap, and showing benefits of adaptive computation time.
en.motivation: To explore whether explicit memory is necessary for Universal Transformers in combinatorial reasoning tasks, and to study the effects of memory token count, initialization schemes, and adaptive computation time.
en.method: Experiments on a single-block Universal Transformer with Adaptive Computation Time, varying memory token counts, initialization schemes, and fixed-depth processing, analyzing performance and identifying initialization pitfalls.
en.result: No memory tokens yield zero performance; optimal token count is 8-32 with ~57.4% accuracy; ACT is more stable than fixed depth; negative bias initialization avoids the trap; attention heads specialize into distinct roles.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical guidance on using memory tokens effectively and avoiding initialization traps in Universal Transformers.

idea_spark.risk: Excessive memory tokens may cause attention dilution and performance degradation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by attention head specialization, design modular memory read-write mechanisms.

papers.title: Penalised and constrained geodesics in geometric control theory
papers.summary: In many problems in optimal control, one seeks to minimise an objective function subject to constraints on the velocity of the system. Imposing these constraints directly -- the ``hard-constrained'' approach -- is often analytically and computationally challenging. A natural alternative is to penalise violations of the constraints, solving a sequence of ``soft-constrained'' problems indexed by a penalty parameter $q$, and hoping that solutions converge to solutions of the hard-constrained problem as $q \to \infty$.   We show that this approach is justified when applied to a broad class of geometric control problems on a Riemannian manifold $(M,g)$. We first consider the case where there are no autonomous dynamics, and so the control problem reduces to the problem of finding a curve of minimal length or energy between two points, subject to a nonholonomic velocity constraint/penalty determined by the choice of a bracket-generating subbundle $D$ of $TM$. We show that any sequence of solutions to the soft-constrained problem has an accumulation point which is a solution to the hard-constrained problem. Subsequently, we show how to transform a broad class of optimal control problems to the problem of finding a geodesic, by trivialising the inherent dynamics of the system using a change of coordinates inspired by the interaction picture transformation in quantum mechanics.

ai.tldr: 在黎曼流形上，通过惩罚速度约束的软约束方法逼近硬约束最优控制问题，并证明其收敛性。
ai.motivation: 硬约束最优控制问题在解析和计算上具有挑战性，软约束惩罚方法提供了一种自然替代，但需要理论保证其收敛性。
ai.method: 将控制问题转化为黎曼流形上的测地线问题，利用交互图像变换简化动力学，并证明软约束问题解的聚点是硬约束问题的解。

ai.help_to_user: 为处理非完整速度约束的最优控制问题提供了理论收敛性证明和实用变换方法。

en.tldr: On a Riemannian manifold, soft-constrained penalization of velocity constraints approximates hard-constrained optimal control problems, with proven convergence.
en.motivation: Hard-constrained optimal control problems are analytically and computationally challenging; soft-constrained penalization offers a natural alternative but requires theoretical convergence guarantees.
en.method: Transform control problems into geodesic problems on a Riemannian manifold, simplify dynamics via an interaction picture transformation, and prove that accumulation points of soft-constrained solutions solve the hard-constrained problem.
en.result: For a broad class of geometric control problems, the soft-constrained approach converges to hard-constrained solutions, and the problem reduces to finding geodesics.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence proof and practical transformation for optimal control problems with nonholonomic velocity constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Reducing control problems to geodesic problems enables leveraging mature Riemannian geometry tools (e.g., geodesic equations) for efficient solution.
idea_spark.risk: The transformation's applicability depends on trivializability of system dynamics, which may not hold for all control problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The interaction picture transformation from quantum mechanics inspires cross-disciplinary methods for geometric problems in control theory.

papers.title: Multiple Mellin-Barnes integrals in Schwinger-DeWitt technique
papers.summary: We consider off-diagonal asymptotic series for integral kernels of functions of Laplace-type operators on curved backgrounds. These expansions are obtained by applying integral transforms to the DeWitt series for the heat kernel of the corresponding operator and thus represent a DeWitt-type series in the heat kernel coefficients with the coefficients of this expansion (which we call basis kernels) being some hypergeometric-type functions of the Synge world function. Basis kernels of a certain class of operator functions were found previously in terms of $N$-fold Mellin-Barnes integrals. In this paper we study series representations of the corresponding Mellin-Barnes integrals in both non-resonant and resonant cases and suggest a physical interpretation for the emerging series, which is related to the UV and IR properties of operator functions.

ai.tldr: 本文研究弯曲背景上拉普拉斯型算符函数积分核的离对角渐近级数，通过积分变换将热核的DeWitt级数转化为Mellin-Barnes积分，并分析其级数表示及紫外/红外物理解释。
ai.motivation: 扩展Schwinger-DeWitt技术到离对角区域，处理算符函数的积分核展开。
ai.method: 利用多重Mellin-Barnes积分表示基核，并研究其在非共振和共振情况下的级数展开。
ai.result: 给出了Mellin-Barnes积分的级数表示，并关联到算符函数的紫外和红外性质。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解弯曲时空中算符函数的渐近行为及其物理意义。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将共振情况下的级数解释为某种重正化群流或有效作用量的非局域项。
idea_spark.risk: 级数收敛性及物理解释的严格性需要进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从热核系数到Mellin-Barnes积分的变换思路可启发其他场论中的离对角展开。

en.method: Represent basis kernels via multiple Mellin-Barnes integrals and study their series expansions in non-resonant and resonant cases.
en.result: Series representations of Mellin-Barnes integrals are obtained and linked to UV and IR properties of operator functions.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into asymptotic behavior of operator functions in curved spacetime and their physical interpretation.

papers.title: On truncations of hierarchical equations of motion for finite-dimensional systems
papers.summary: We study truncations of hierarchical equations of motion (HEOM) for finite-dimensional open quantum systems. We prove that for finite-dimensional approximations constructed with a Schur-complement type of terminator, the spectrum converges to that of the full HEOM as the truncation depth increases. We also prove that this approximation is free of spectral pollution: sufficiently deep truncations do not produce spurious unstable modes, provided the exact HEOM is stable. We illustrate the results for the spin-boson model.

ai.tldr: 证明了有限维开放量子系统中分层运动方程截断的谱收敛性，且无谱污染。
ai.motivation: 确保HEOM截断方法在有限维系统中的可靠性和稳定性。
ai.method: 采用Schur补类型终结器构造有限维近似，并分析其谱性质。
ai.result: 截断深度增加时谱收敛于完整HEOM；足够深截断不产生虚假不稳定模。
ai.help_to_user: 为HEOM截断提供严格数学保证，指导实际计算中截断深度的选择。

idea_spark.idea: 利用谱污染分析设计自适应截断深度算法。
idea_spark.risk: 理论证明依赖有限维假设，高维系统可能需额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将谱收敛性分析用于量子主方程数值方法的误差控制。

en.tldr: Proves spectral convergence and absence of spectral pollution for truncated HEOM in finite-dimensional open quantum systems.
en.motivation: To ensure reliability and stability of HEOM truncation methods for finite-dimensional systems.
en.method: Constructs finite-dimensional approximations using a Schur-complement type terminator and analyzes their spectral properties.
en.result: Spectrum converges to that of full HEOM as truncation depth increases; deep truncations produce no spurious unstable modes if exact HEOM is stable.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical guarantees for HEOM truncation, guiding choice of truncation depth in practical computations.

idea_spark.idea: Design adaptive truncation depth algorithms using spectral pollution analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Proof relies on finite-dimensional assumption; high-dimensional systems may require additional validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply spectral convergence analysis to error control in numerical methods for quantum master equations.

papers.title: Shock waves of spherical/cylindrical KdV-B: Asymptotic, stability, superposition
papers.summary: Spherical and cylindrical KdV-B equations have few known exact solutions, yet these solutions are hard to be interpreted physically. But these equations do have a family of diverging shock waves. Their properties such as   asymptotic modes, stability, rules of their interactions/superposition are the subject of this paper. It gives a detailed asymptotic description of the one-parameter families of shock wave solutions and proves their stability using a conservation law. Based on these results, effective rules of superposition are obtained. Moreover these rules are applicable to a wide class of shock waves, in particular discontinuous. Typical examples are illustrated by graphs.

ai.tldr: 研究了球面和柱面KdV-B方程的激波，给出了渐近描述、稳定性证明和叠加规则。
ai.motivation: 球面和柱面KdV-B方程已知精确解少且物理解释困难，但存在发散激波族，需要系统研究其性质。
ai.method: 利用守恒律对单参数激波解族进行渐近分析并证明稳定性，进而推导有效叠加规则。
ai.result: 获得了激波解的详细渐近描述、稳定性证明，以及适用于包括间断激波在内的广泛激波的叠加规则。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非平面KdV-B方程中激波的渐近行为、稳定性和相互作用规律。

idea_spark.idea: 将守恒律方法用于证明其他非线性波动方程激波解的稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 叠加规则可能仅适用于特定参数范围，需验证普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用渐近分析和守恒律研究复杂非线性波的相互作用。

en.tldr: Studies shock waves of spherical and cylindrical KdV-B equations, providing asymptotic description, stability proof, and superposition rules.
en.motivation: Few exact solutions exist for these equations and they are hard to interpret physically, yet a family of diverging shock waves requires systematic study.
en.method: Uses a conservation law to perform asymptotic analysis and prove stability of one-parameter shock wave families, then derives effective superposition rules.
en.result: Obtains detailed asymptotic description, stability proof, and superposition rules applicable to a wide class of shock waves including discontinuous ones.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand asymptotic behavior, stability, and interaction laws of shock waves in non-planar KdV-B equations.

idea_spark.idea: Apply conservation law method to prove stability of shock solutions in other nonlinear wave equations.
idea_spark.risk: Superposition rules may hold only for specific parameter regimes; universality needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use asymptotic analysis and conservation laws to study interactions of complex nonlinear waves.

papers.title: Asymptotics of Multi-Scale McKean--Vlasov Diffusions with Super-Linear Kernels: a Lifted Semigroup Approach
papers.summary: In this work, we establish the small-noise asymptotic behaviour (namely, the functional law of large numbers and the large deviation principle) for multi-scale McKean--Vlasov diffusions with super-linear kernels. In this setting, the interaction depends on the laws of both the slow component and the fast oscillating process. Consequently, the frozen (parameterized) system exhibits McKean--Vlasov dynamics, forming a nonlinear Markov process and thereby rendering the analysis more complex compared to existing works.   We develop a lifted semigroup argument and employ a generalized Khasminskii time discretization scheme to derive the small-noise limit of the slow variable, providing explicit convergence rates. Furthermore, we introduce the notion of a lifted viable pair and utilize a generalized functional occupation measure approach to establish the Laplace principle, which is equivalent to the large deviation principle. The main results of this work find broad applications in multi-scale models arising in fields such as machine learning and optimization theory. In particular, our results can be employed to analyze the dynamics of multi-scale consensus-based methods for multilevel optimization, where the coefficients typically satisfy local Lipschitz continuity on the interaction kernels.

ai.tldr: 针对具有超线性核的多尺度McKean-Vlasov扩散，建立了小噪声渐近行为（大数定律和大偏差原理），并提出了提升半群论证和广义Khasminskii时间离散化方案。
ai.motivation: 现有工作未处理相互作用依赖于慢变量和快振荡过程两者的多尺度McKean-Vlasov扩散，且超线性核导致非线性马尔可夫过程，分析更复杂。
ai.method: 发展提升半群论证，结合广义Khasminskii时间离散化方案推导小噪声极限和显式收敛率；引入提升可行对概念，利用广义泛函占据测度方法建立Laplace原理。
ai.result: 获得了慢变量的小噪声极限和显式收敛率，并证明了等价于大偏差原理的Laplace原理。
ai.help_to_user: 为多尺度共识方法等机器学习与优化算法提供了渐近分析工具，可用于多级优化问题的动力学分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将提升可行对概念与泛函占据测度结合，为复杂多尺度系统的大偏差原理提供新框架。
idea_spark.risk: 超线性核可能破坏经典Lipschitz条件，需验证局部Lipschitz连续性假设的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多尺度共识方法启发，将理论结果应用于实际多级优化问题，验证其有效性。

en.tldr: Established small-noise asymptotics (functional law of large numbers and large deviation principle) for multi-scale McKean-Vlasov diffusions with super-linear kernels, using a lifted semigroup argument and generalized Khasminskii time discretization.
en.motivation: Existing works do not handle multi-scale McKean-Vlasov diffusions where interaction depends on laws of both slow and fast components, and super-linear kernels lead to nonlinear Markov processes, complicating analysis.
en.method: Developed a lifted semigroup argument combined with a generalized Khasminskii time discretization scheme to derive the small-noise limit and explicit convergence rates; introduced the notion of a lifted viable pair and used a generalized functional occupation measure approach to establish the Laplace principle.
en.result: Obtained the small-noise limit of the slow variable with explicit convergence rates, and proved the Laplace principle equivalent to the large deviation principle.
en.help_to_user: Provides asymptotic analysis tools for multi-scale consensus methods and other algorithms in machine learning and optimization, applicable to multilevel optimization dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Combining the lifted viable pair concept with functional occupation measures offers a new framework for large deviation principles in complex multi-scale systems.
idea_spark.risk: Super-linear kernels may violate classical Lipschitz conditions; the local Lipschitz continuity assumption needs verification for broader applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-scale consensus methods, the theoretical results can be applied to practical multilevel optimization problems to validate their effectiveness.

papers.title: Spiral, target, stripe, and disordered waves in active six-state Potts models
papers.summary: Wave propagation can be observed in various nonequilibrium systems. In this study, we investigated the properties of several wave modes in active six-state Potts models using Monte Carlo simulations of square and hexagonal lattices. Disordered and spiral (SP) waves of six states are formed under weak and strong repulsions at nonflip contacts, respectively. The target (TG) and stripe (ST) waves were found to emerge under stronger repulsion. These three wave modes (SP, TG, and ST) can temporally coexist in small systems near the transition points but they do not switch in large systems or far from these transition points. During coarsening from randomly mixed states to ST waves, SP waves appear at an intermediate stage. The SP wave modes of three even- or odd-numbered states (states $s=0,2,4$ or $s=1,3,5$) emerge under two conditions: repulsion at the diagonal contact and attraction at nonflip contacts. Previously thought to be identical for both conditions, the wave types were found to differ, comprising forward and backward waves ($s=1\to 3\to 5\to 1$ or $s=1\to 5\to 3\to 1$), whose domain boundaries move by the two-step and four-step forward flips, respectively. The transition between the waves of the even- and odd-numbered states is first-order for both the forward and backward waves.

ai.tldr: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究了活性六态Potts模型中的螺旋波、靶波、条纹波和无序波，并发现了波模式之间的共存与转变。
ai.motivation: 探索非平衡系统中多种波模式的特性及其转变条件。
ai.method: 在方形和六边形格点上进行活性六态Potts模型的蒙特卡洛模拟。
ai.result: 弱排斥产生无序波，强排斥产生螺旋波，更强排斥产生靶波和条纹波；波模式在过渡点附近小系统中可共存，但在大系统中不切换；偶数和奇数态波之间存在一级相变。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解活性Potts模型中波模式的涌现机制和相变行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用不同波模式对系统参数的敏感性设计可调控的波导或信息传输通道。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟参数空间较大，实验验证可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从波模式共存现象联想到多稳态系统中的模式切换控制。

en.tldr: Using Monte Carlo simulations, we studied spiral, target, stripe, and disordered waves in active six-state Potts models, revealing coexistence and transitions between wave modes.
en.motivation: To investigate the properties and transition conditions of various wave modes in nonequilibrium systems.
en.method: Monte Carlo simulations of active six-state Potts models on square and hexagonal lattices.
en.result: Weak repulsion yields disordered waves; strong repulsion yields spiral waves; stronger repulsion yields target and stripe waves. Wave modes can coexist in small systems near transition points but not in large systems. First-order transition occurs between even- and odd-state waves.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the emergence and phase transitions of wave patterns in active Potts models.

idea_spark.idea: Design tunable waveguides or information channels by exploiting the sensitivity of different wave modes to system parameters.
idea_spark.risk: Large parameter space may make experimental validation challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: The coexistence of wave modes suggests strategies for controlling mode switching in multistable systems.

papers.title: From graphemic dependence to lexical structure: a Markovian perspective on Dante's Commedia
papers.summary: This study investigates the structural organisation of Dante's Divina Commedia through a symbolic representation based on vowel-consonant (V/C) encoding. Modelling the resulting sequence as a four-state Markov chain yields a parsimonious index of graphemic memory, capturing the balance between persistence and alternation patterns.   Across the poem, this index exhibits a slight but consistent increase from the Inferno to the Paradiso, indicating a directional shift in local dependency structure. Trigram-level analysis shows that this trend is driven by a restricted set of recurrent configurations, interpreted as graphemic probes linking the Markov representation to identifiable lexical environments in the text.   These probes display distinct behaviours: configurations involving two transitions more frequently emerge across word boundaries, reflecting interactions between adjacent tokens, whereas configurations with fewer transitions are largely confined to intra-lexical structures. Part of the signal is further shaped by orthographic phenomena, particularly apostrophised forms, highlighting the role of writing conventions alongside phonological and lexical organisation.   A complementary classification analysis identifies cantica-specific terms, providing lexical anchors through which graphemic probes can be related to the structure of the poem. This organisation is reflected not only in the separation of the three cantiche, but also in a continuous trajectory across the text.   Overall, the results show that simple probabilistic models applied to symbolic text representations can uncover structured interactions between local dependencies, lexical distribution, orthographic encoding, and large-scale organisation, providing an interpretable framework for linking local symbolic dynamics to higher-level textual organisation.

ai.tldr: 通过元音-辅音编码将但丁《神曲》转化为符号序列，用四态马尔可夫链建模，发现从《地狱篇》到《天堂篇》的书写记忆指数逐渐上升，揭示了局部依赖与词汇分布、正字法之间的结构化互动。
ai.motivation: 探索文学文本中局部符号依赖与整体组织之间的可解释关系，为计算文体学提供简洁的量化框架。
ai.method: 将文本转换为元音/辅音二元符号序列，拟合四态马尔可夫链，计算书写记忆指数；通过三字母组分析识别重复配置，并结合正字法特征和词汇分类分析。
ai.result: 书写记忆指数从《地狱篇》到《天堂篇》轻微但一致增加；趋势由少数重复配置驱动，这些配置在词边界和词内表现出不同行为；正字法现象（如省音形式）影响信号；分类分析识别出各篇特有词汇。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将简单概率模型应用于符号文本表示以揭示局部与全局结构互动的方法，可用于其他文学或序列文本分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将马尔可夫链与词汇分类结合，构建文本的“书写指纹”，用于作者归属或风格演变研究。
idea_spark.risk: 模型过于简化可能忽略语义和句法信息；对正字法现象的依赖可能不适用于所有语言。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受但丁《神曲》三篇结构启发，可探索其他多部分文学作品的局部依赖梯度变化。

zh.tldr: 通过元音-辅音编码将但丁《神曲》转化为符号序列，用四态马尔可夫链建模，发现从《地狱篇》到《天堂篇》的书写记忆指数逐渐上升，揭示了局部依赖与词汇分布、正字法之间的结构化互动。

idea_spark.idea: 将马尔可夫链与词汇分类结合，构建文本的“书写指纹”，用于作者归属或风格演变研究。
idea_spark.risk: 模型过于简化可能忽略语义和句法信息；对正字法现象的依赖可能不适用于所有语言。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受但丁《神曲》三篇结构启发，可探索其他多部分文学作品的局部依赖梯度变化。

en.tldr: By encoding Dante's Divine Comedy into vowel-consonant sequences and modeling them as a four-state Markov chain, this study finds a slight but consistent increase in graphemic memory from Inferno to Paradiso, revealing structured interactions between local dependencies, lexical distribution, orthography, and large-scale organization.
en.motivation: To explore interpretable relationships between local symbolic dependencies and global textual organization in literary works, providing a parsimonious quantitative framework for computational stylistics.
en.method: Convert text into binary vowel/consonant sequences, fit a four-state Markov chain to compute a graphemic memory index; perform trigram analysis to identify recurrent configurations, and combine with orthographic features and lexical classification.
en.result: The graphemic memory index increases slightly but consistently from Inferno to Paradiso; the trend is driven by a few recurrent configurations that behave differently at word boundaries vs. within words; orthographic phenomena (e.g., apostrophes) shape the signal; classification identifies canticle-specific terms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to apply simple probabilistic models to symbolic text representations for uncovering local-global structural interactions, applicable to other literary or sequential text analyses.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Markov chains with lexical classification to build a 'writing fingerprint' for authorship attribution or style evolution studies.
idea_spark.risk: The model may oversimplify, ignoring semantic and syntactic information; reliance on orthographic phenomena may not generalize across languages.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the three-part structure of Dante's Commedia, one could explore gradient changes in local dependencies in other multi-part literary works.

papers.title: Analysis of an Inhomogeneous Random Walk with Spatial Decay of Transition Probabilities and Parameter Renewal per Excursion
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose and analyze a novel one-dimensional inhomogeneous random walk model that combines spatial decay of transition probabilities with a temporal renewal structure for each excursion. In this model, the probability of moving to the right from each state creats a spatial inhomogeneity that causes a stronger pull-back toward the origin as the process moves farther away. Furthermore, it features a random environment aspect where the parameter of each transition probability is independently resampled from a uniform distribution at the beginning of each excursion. We rigorously derive the hitting probability to an upper boundary using a scale function. Furthermore, by solving linear difference equations, we provide the probability generating function of the first hitting time, the expected occupation time for each state during an excursion (discrete Green's function), and the distribution and expectation of the maximum penetration depth.

ai.tldr: 提出并分析了一种结合空间衰减转移概率与每次游荡参数更新的非齐次随机游走模型，严格推导了击中概率、首达时间生成函数、占据时间和最大穿透深度。
ai.motivation: 现有随机游走模型难以同时刻画空间非齐次性和环境随机更新，需要建立更贴近实际物理过程的数学模型。
ai.method: 利用尺度函数推导击中概率，通过求解线性差分方程得到首达时间概率生成函数、离散格林函数及最大穿透深度的分布与期望。
ai.result: 获得了击中上边界的概率、首达时间的生成函数、每次游荡中各状态的期望占据时间以及最大穿透深度的分布与期望。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究具有空间衰减和参数随机更新的随机游走提供了完整的解析工具，可用于物理、生物等领域的扩散建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将参数更新机制与空间衰减结合，可能模拟生物运动中的记忆效应或环境异质性。
idea_spark.risk: 解析求解可能仅适用于一维或特定衰减形式，数值模拟需验证一般性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将参数更新分布从均匀分布扩展到其他分布，或引入状态依赖的更新概率。

en.tldr: Proposes and analyzes a novel inhomogeneous random walk combining spatial decay of transition probabilities with parameter renewal per excursion, deriving hitting probability, first hitting time generating function, occupation times, and maximum penetration depth.
en.motivation: Existing random walk models cannot simultaneously capture spatial inhomogeneity and random environment updates, necessitating a more realistic mathematical model.
en.method: Derives hitting probability via a scale function and solves linear difference equations to obtain the probability generating function of the first hitting time, discrete Green's function, and distribution/expectation of maximum penetration depth.
en.result: Obtains the hitting probability to an upper boundary, generating function of the first hitting time, expected occupation time per state during an excursion, and distribution/expectation of maximum penetration depth.
en.help_to_user: Provides complete analytical tools for random walks with spatial decay and parameter renewal, applicable to diffusion modeling in physics and biology.

idea_spark.idea: Combining parameter renewal with spatial decay may model memory effects or environmental heterogeneity in biological movement.
idea_spark.risk: Analytical solutions may be limited to one dimension or specific decay forms; numerical simulations are needed for generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider extending the parameter renewal distribution beyond uniform, or introducing state-dependent renewal probabilities.

papers.title: Malliavin calculus for signatures with applications to finance
papers.summary: Malliavin calculus is a powerful and general framework for the analysis of square-integrable random variables, but it often suffers from a lack of tractability and explicit representations. To address this limitation, we focus on a subclass of random variables given by finite linear combinations of time-extended Brownian motion signatures. The class remains rich due to the universal approximation properties of signatures. Leveraging the algebraic structure of signatures, we first derive explicit formulas for the Malliavin derivative of signatures of continuous Itô processes. As a consequence, we obtain closed-form expressions for the Clark--Ocone representation, the Ornstein--Uhlenbeck semigroup and its generator, as well as the integration-by-parts formula within the class of Brownian signature variables. These results provide purely algebraic formulations of the classical operators of Malliavin calculus. As an application, we compute Greeks for general path-dependent options under signature volatility models, and numerically compare different choices of Malliavin weights.

ai.tldr: 本文利用签名代数结构，为布朗运动签名变量类推导出Malliavin导数的显式公式，进而得到Clark-Ocone表示、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck半群及其生成元以及分部积分公式的闭式表达式，并应用于签名波动率模型下路径依赖期权的Greeks计算。
ai.motivation: Malliavin微积分框架强大但缺乏可处理性和显式表示，本文旨在通过限制在布朗运动签名变量类上，利用签名的代数结构获得显式公式。
ai.method: 聚焦于时间扩展布朗运动签名的有限线性组合构成的随机变量子类，利用签名的通用逼近性质和代数结构，推导Malliavin导数的显式公式，并由此得到Clark-Ocone表示、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck半群及其生成元以及分部积分公式。
ai.result: 获得了Malliavin微积分经典算子的纯代数形式，并在签名波动率模型下实现了路径依赖期权的Greeks计算，数值比较了不同Malliavin权重的效果。
ai.help_to_user: 为金融衍生品定价和风险管理提供了一种新的显式计算方法，尤其适用于路径依赖期权和签名波动率模型。

idea_spark.idea: 利用签名代数结构简化随机分析中的复杂算子，可能启发在随机控制、滤波理论或机器学习中设计更高效的算法。
idea_spark.risk: 签名变量类的逼近能力虽强，但实际应用中可能面临高维截断和计算复杂度问题，且对模型假设的依赖性需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将抽象数学框架（如Malliavin微积分）与具体代数结构（如签名）结合，为理论推导和实际计算之间搭建桥梁，类似思路可应用于其他领域如随机微分方程数值解或统计推断。

en.tldr: This paper derives explicit formulas for the Malliavin derivative of Brownian motion signatures using their algebraic structure, leading to closed-form expressions for the Clark-Ocone representation, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck semigroup, and integration-by-parts formula, with applications to Greeks computation for path-dependent options under signature volatility models.
en.motivation: Malliavin calculus is powerful but often lacks tractability and explicit representations; this work aims to obtain explicit formulas by restricting to a class of signature random variables.
en.method: Focuses on the subclass of random variables given by finite linear combinations of time-extended Brownian motion signatures, leveraging the universal approximation property and algebraic structure of signatures to derive explicit Malliavin derivative formulas, and subsequently the Clark-Ocone representation, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck semigroup, and integration-by-parts formula.

en.help_to_user: Provides a new explicit computational method for pricing and risk management of financial derivatives, especially path-dependent options under signature volatility models.

idea_spark.idea: Using signature algebraic structure to simplify complex operators in stochastic analysis may inspire efficient algorithms in stochastic control, filtering theory, or machine learning.
idea_spark.risk: Although the signature class has strong approximation properties, practical applications may face high-dimensional truncation and computational complexity, and the dependence on model assumptions requires careful validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bridging abstract mathematical frameworks (e.g., Malliavin calculus) with concrete algebraic structures (e.g., signatures) provides a pathway between theoretical derivation and practical computation, a strategy applicable to other fields such as numerical solutions of SDEs or statistical inference.

papers.title: Two-layer sharply stratified Euler fluids in three dimensions: a Hamiltonian setting
papers.summary: Three-dimensional two-layer incompressible Euler fluids are studied from a Hamiltonian perspective. A natural Hamiltonian structure for the effective 2D model described by the interface-value of the field variables is obtained by means of a Hamiltonian reduction process from the 3D Poisson structure. The problem of expressing the fluid's energy in terms of the reduced variables is considered, and it is shown that in the weakly non linear approximation our procedure gives rise to a so-called 2D Kaup-Broer-Kupershmidt Boussinesq (KBK-B) model with ``critical" parameters. A model weakly dependent on one of the two horizontal directions is also discussed, whose unidirectionalization turns out to be the well-known Kadomtsev-Petviashvili (KP) equation. A Dirac-type reduction process of the Hamiltonian structure of the KBK-B model yields a natural Hamiltonian structure for KP qua 2+1-dimensional model.

ai.tldr: 从哈密顿视角研究三维两层不可压缩欧拉流体，通过约化得到有效二维模型的自然哈密顿结构，并导出KBK-B和KP方程。
ai.motivation: 为两层分层流体系统建立哈密顿框架，并推导其约化模型。
ai.method: 利用哈密顿约化从三维泊松结构导出二维界面变量的哈密顿结构，并应用Dirac约化。
ai.result: 在弱非线性近似下得到具有临界参数的二维KBK-B模型，以及单向化后的KP方程。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分层流体哈密顿建模的严格数学框架，有助于理解界面波动力学。

idea_spark.idea: 将Dirac约化用于KBK-B模型，得到KP方程的哈密顿结构。
idea_spark.risk: 模型参数临界性可能限制其适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用约化方法从高维系统提取低维有效模型，可启发其他物理系统的降维建模。

en.tldr: A Hamiltonian study of 3D two-layer incompressible Euler fluids yields a natural Hamiltonian structure for the effective 2D model via reduction, leading to the KBK-B and KP equations.
en.motivation: To establish a Hamiltonian framework for two-layer stratified fluids and derive reduced models.
en.method: Hamiltonian reduction from the 3D Poisson structure to the interface variables, followed by Dirac reduction.
en.result: A 2D KBK-B model with critical parameters under weak nonlinearity, and the KP equation upon unidirectionalization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous Hamiltonian formulation for stratified fluids, aiding the study of interfacial wave dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Dirac reduction of the KBK-B model yields a Hamiltonian structure for the KP equation.
idea_spark.risk: The criticality of parameters may limit the model's applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using reduction to extract low-dimensional effective models from high-dimensional systems can inspire similar approaches in other physical domains.

papers.title: SpikingBrain2.0: Brain-Inspired Foundation Models for Efficient Long-Context and Cross-Platform Inference
papers.summary: Scaling context length is reshaping large-model development, yet full-attention Transformers suffer from prohibitive computation and inference bottlenecks at long sequences. A key challenge is to design foundation models that maintain performance and long-context efficiency with minimal training overhead. We introduce SpikingBrain2.0 (SpB2.0), a 5B model that advances both architecture and training efficiency of its predecessor.   Our contributions are two-fold. (1) Architectural Innovation: We propose Dual-Space Sparse Attention (DSSA), an inter-layer hybrid of Sparse Softmax Attention (MoBA) and Sparse Linear Attention (SSE), achieving an improved performance-efficiency trade-off for long-context modeling. SpB2.0 further supports dual quantization paths: INT8-Spiking coding enables sparse event-driven computation, while FP8 coding accelerates inference on modern GPUs. (2) Enhanced Training Strategy: We develop an optimized Transformer-to-Hybrid (T2H) pipeline with dual conversion paths for LLMs and VLMs using curated open-source data.   Empirically, SpB2.0-5B and SpB2.0-VL-5B recover most of the base Transformer (Qwen3-4B) capability with under 7k A100 GPU hours. SpB2.0 achieves a 10.13x TTFT speedup at 4M context and supports over 10M tokens on 8 A100 GPUs under vLLM, where full-attention models exceed memory limits. It also demonstrates strong cross-platform compatibility, enabling FP8 GPU inference (2.52x speedup at 250k) and efficient neuromorphic execution (64.31% sparsity, with 70.6% and 46.5% area and power reduction at 500MHz).   Overall, SpikingBrain2.0 provides a practical pathway for lightweight, multimodal, spiking foundation models, highlighting the potential of combining brain-inspired mechanisms with efficient architectures for resource-constrained and edge scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出SpikingBrain2.0，一种5B参数的脑启发基础模型，通过双空间稀疏注意力和双量化路径实现高效长上下文推理与跨平台部署。
ai.motivation: 全注意力Transformer在长序列上计算和推理瓶颈严重，需设计保持性能且高效的长上下文基础模型。
ai.method: 提出双空间稀疏注意力（DSSA），混合稀疏Softmax注意力和稀疏线性注意力；支持INT8脉冲编码和FP8编码双量化路径；开发Transformer到混合模型（T2H）训练流水线。
ai.result: SpB2.0-5B在4M上下文下TTFT加速10.13倍，支持8张A100上超1000万token推理；FP8推理加速2.52倍，神经形态执行稀疏度64.31%，面积和功耗分别降低70.6%和46.5%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量级、多模态、脉冲基础模型方案，适用于资源受限和边缘场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将脉冲编码与FP8量化结合，在保持稀疏事件驱动优势的同时兼容现代GPU加速。
idea_spark.risk: 混合注意力架构的稀疏模式选择可能依赖任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 脑启发机制与高效架构结合，为边缘端大模型部署提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes SpikingBrain2.0, a 5B brain-inspired foundation model achieving efficient long-context inference and cross-platform deployment via Dual-Space Sparse Attention and dual quantization paths.
en.motivation: Full-attention Transformers suffer from prohibitive computation and inference bottlenecks at long sequences, necessitating foundation models that maintain performance with long-context efficiency.
en.method: Proposes Dual-Space Sparse Attention (DSSA) hybridizing sparse softmax and sparse linear attention; supports INT8 spiking coding and FP8 coding dual quantization paths; develops a Transformer-to-Hybrid (T2H) training pipeline.
en.result: SpB2.0-5B achieves 10.13x TTFT speedup at 4M context, supports over 10M tokens on 8 A100 GPUs; FP8 inference yields 2.52x speedup at 250k; neuromorphic execution achieves 64.31% sparsity with 70.6% area and 46.5% power reduction at 500MHz.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, multimodal, spiking foundation model pathway suitable for resource-constrained and edge scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combining spiking coding with FP8 quantization preserves sparse event-driven advantages while leveraging modern GPU acceleration.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of sparsity patterns in hybrid attention may be task-dependent, requiring further validation of generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating brain-inspired mechanisms with efficient architectures opens new avenues for deploying large models at the edge.

papers.title: Curvature of optimal transport with respect to the cost and applications to inverse optimal transport
papers.summary: We study the inverse optimal transport problem of recovering the ground cost from an optimal transport plan. In discrete settings, this problem reduces to inverse linear programming and is intrinsically ill-posed, exhibiting non-identifiability and flat directions. We show that in the continuous setting, the regularity of the marginals fundamentally alters the structure of the inverse problem. Assuming smooth positive densities for the source and target measures, we characterize the second variation of the optimal transport functional with respect to the ground cost in Hölder spaces. In particular, we show that it is non-degenerate modulo the natural transport invariances, yielding a strict curvature property that is absent in discrete transport. As a consequence, we obtain local identifiability and stability results for inverse optimal transport. For the structured family of bilinear costs (i.e. Mahalanobis parametrizations), the ground cost can be uniquely recovered--up to the intrinsic invariances--from a single optimal coupling under a natural spanning condition. We further show that this identifiability property is generic under arbitrarily small perturbations of the marginals, while settings where the optimal transport map is affine (for instance Gaussian or elliptical marginals) remain degenerate. Finally, we establish precise bounds on the bias and statistical variance of inverse optimal transport under entropic regularization. These results reveal a structural parallel between forward and inverse optimal transport: regularity of the marginals ensures smooth optimal maps in the forward problem, while non-degeneracy of the induced transport plan yields curvature and local invertibility in the inverse problem.

ai.tldr: 研究从最优传输计划中恢复地面代价的逆问题，发现连续情形下边际的正则性带来严格的曲率性质，从而保证局部可辨识性和稳定性。
ai.motivation: 离散逆最优传输存在非可辨识性和平坦方向，需要理解连续情形下问题的结构差异。
ai.method: 在Hölder空间中刻画最优传输泛函关于地面代价的二阶变分，证明其非退化性（模自然传输不变性）。
ai.result: 连续边际下逆问题具有严格曲率，局部可辨识；双线性代价族在跨度条件下可唯一恢复；熵正则化下给出偏差和方差界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解逆最优传输问题的可辨识条件，以及如何利用边际正则性设计稳定恢复算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Hölder空间中的二阶变分分析，为逆问题设计基于曲率的正则化项或先验。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖光滑密度假设，实际数据可能不满足，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优传输的曲率性质出发，启发其他逆问题中“正则性→可逆性”的通用分析框架。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解逆最优传输问题的可辨识条件，以及如何利用边际正则性设计稳定恢复算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Hölder空间中的二阶变分分析，为逆问题设计基于曲率的正则化项或先验。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖光滑密度假设，实际数据可能不满足，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优传输的曲率性质出发，启发其他逆问题中“正则性→可逆性”的通用分析框架。

en.tldr: Studies the inverse optimal transport problem of recovering the ground cost from an optimal transport plan, showing that continuous marginals induce strict curvature and thus local identifiability and stability.
en.motivation: Discrete inverse optimal transport suffers from non-identifiability and flat directions; the continuous setting may fundamentally alter the structure.
en.method: Characterizes the second variation of the optimal transport functional with respect to the ground cost in Hölder spaces, proving non-degeneracy modulo natural invariances.
en.result: Strict curvature in continuous case yields local identifiability; bilinear cost families are uniquely recoverable under a spanning condition; entropic regularization provides bias and variance bounds.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand identifiability conditions in inverse optimal transport and how to leverage marginal regularity for stable recovery.

idea_spark.idea: Use second-variation analysis in Hölder spaces to design curvature-based regularizers or priors for inverse problems.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on smooth density assumptions; real data may violate them, requiring robustness checks.
idea_spark.inspiration: The curvature property in optimal transport inspires a general framework of 'regularity → invertibility' for other inverse problems.

papers.title: H-Sets: Hessian-Guided Discovery of Set-Level Feature Interactions in Image Classifiers
papers.summary: Feature attribution methods explain the predictions of deep neural networks by assigning importance scores to individual input features. However, most existing methods focus solely on marginal effects, overlooking feature interactions, where groups of features jointly influence model output. Such interactions are especially important in image classification tasks, where semantic meaning often arises from pixel interdependencies rather than isolated features. Existing interaction-based methods for images are either coarse (e.g., superpixel-only) or, fail to satisfy core interpretability axioms. In this work, we introduce H-Sets, a novel two-stage framework for discovering and attributing higher-order feature interactions in image classifiers. First, we detect locally interacting pairs via input Hessians and recursively merge them into semantically coherent sets; segmentation from Segment Anything (SAM) is used as a spatial grouping prior but can be replaced by other segmentations. Second, we attribute each set with IDG-Vis, a set-level extension of Integrated Directional Gradients that integrates directional gradients along pixel-space paths and aggregates them with Harsanyi dividends. While Hessians introduce additional compute at the detection stage, this targeted cost consistently yields saliency maps that are sparser and more faithful. Evaluations across VGG, ResNet, DenseNet and MobileNet models on ImageNet and CUB datasets show that H-Sets generate more interpretable and faithful saliency maps compared to existing methods.

ai.tldr: 提出H-Sets框架，通过Hessian检测局部交互特征对并递归合并为语义集，再以IDG-Vis进行集合级归因，生成更稀疏、更忠实的显著性图。
ai.motivation: 现有特征归因方法大多忽略特征交互，而图像分类中语义常源于像素间联合作用。
ai.method: 两阶段框架：先用输入Hessian检测局部交互对并递归合并为语义集（可替换分割先验），再用IDG-Vis（集成方向梯度+Harsanyi红利）进行集合级归因。
ai.result: 在VGG、ResNet、DenseNet、MobileNet及ImageNet、CUB上，H-Sets生成的显著性图更稀疏、更忠实。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解图像分类器中哪些特征组共同影响预测，提升模型可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Hessian检测与SAM分割结合，自动发现语义上有意义的特征组。
idea_spark.risk: Hessian计算成本较高，可能限制在大规模模型上的实时应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用二阶信息发现交互，再通过分割先验约束语义一致性，启发更高效的交互归因方法。

en.tldr: Proposes H-Sets, a two-stage framework that detects locally interacting feature pairs via input Hessians, recursively merges them into semantically coherent sets, and attributes each set with IDG-Vis, yielding sparser and more faithful saliency maps.
en.motivation: Existing feature attribution methods mostly ignore feature interactions, yet semantic meaning in image classification often arises from joint pixel interdependencies.
en.method: Two-stage framework: first, detect locally interacting pairs via input Hessians and recursively merge them into semantically coherent sets (with replaceable segmentation prior like SAM); second, attribute each set with IDG-Vis (Integrated Directional Gradients + Harsanyi dividends).
en.result: On VGG, ResNet, DenseNet, MobileNet over ImageNet and CUB, H-Sets produces sparser and more faithful saliency maps compared to existing methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand which groups of features jointly influence predictions in image classifiers, improving model interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Hessian detection with SAM segmentation to automatically discover semantically meaningful feature groups.
idea_spark.risk: Hessian computation introduces additional cost, potentially limiting real-time application on large models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using second-order information to detect interactions and segmentation priors to enforce semantic coherence inspires more efficient interaction attribution methods.

papers.title: Data-Free Contribution Estimation in Federated Learning using Gradient von Neumann Entropy
papers.summary: Client contribution estimation in Federated Learning is necessary for identifying clients' importance and for providing fair rewards. Current methods often rely on server-side validation data or self-reported client information, which can compromise privacy or be susceptible to manipulation. We introduce a data-free signal based on the matrix von Neumann (spectral) entropy of the final-layer updates, which measures the diversity of the information contributed. We instantiate two practical schemes: (i) SpectralFed, which uses normalized entropy as aggregation weights, and (ii) SpectralFuse, which fuses entropy with class-specific alignment via a rank-adaptive Kalman filter for per-round stability. Across CIFAR-10/100 and the naturally partitioned FEMNIST and FedISIC benchmarks, entropy-derived scores show a consistently high correlation with standalone client accuracy under diverse non-IID regimes - without validation data or client metadata. We compare our results with data-free contribution estimation baselines and show that spectral entropy serves as a useful indicator of client contribution.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需验证数据的联邦学习客户端贡献估计方法，基于梯度von Neumann熵衡量信息多样性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖服务器端验证数据或客户端自报信息，存在隐私泄露或被操纵风险。
ai.method: 利用最后一层更新的矩阵von Neumann熵作为数据无关信号，设计SpectralFed（归一化熵作为聚合权重）和SpectralFuse（结合熵与类别对齐的秩自适应卡尔曼滤波）两种方案。
ai.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、FEMNIST和FedISIC基准上，熵得分与客户端独立准确率高度相关，无需验证数据或客户端元数据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助联邦学习系统公平评估客户端贡献，无需额外数据或信任假设。

idea_spark.idea: 将熵与模型更新方向（如梯度余弦相似度）结合，可能进一步提升贡献估计的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 熵可能受模型架构或训练超参数影响，需验证在不同设置下的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信息论中熵衡量多样性的启发，可探索其他信息论指标（如互信息）用于贡献估计。

en.tldr: Proposes a data-free method for client contribution estimation in federated learning using gradient von Neumann entropy to measure information diversity.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on server-side validation data or self-reported client information, risking privacy leakage or manipulation.
en.method: Uses matrix von Neumann entropy of final-layer updates as a data-free signal, with two schemes: SpectralFed (normalized entropy as aggregation weights) and SpectralFuse (fuses entropy with class-specific alignment via rank-adaptive Kalman filter).
en.result: On CIFAR-10/100, FEMNIST, and FedISIC benchmarks, entropy scores show high correlation with standalone client accuracy without validation data or client metadata.
en.help_to_user: Helps federated learning systems fairly assess client contributions without additional data or trust assumptions.

idea_spark.idea: Combining entropy with model update directions (e.g., gradient cosine similarity) may further improve robustness of contribution estimation.
idea_spark.risk: Entropy may be influenced by model architecture or training hyperparameters; stability across different settings needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by information theory where entropy measures diversity; other information-theoretic metrics (e.g., mutual information) could be explored for contribution estimation.

papers.title: A direct derivation of an effective Hamiltonian in non-relativistic quantum electrodynamics
papers.summary: We present a direct derivation of Arai's effective Hamiltonian in non-relativistic quantum electrodynamics without relying on the scaling limit. Our result applies to a broader class of potentials, including the Rollnik class and confining potentials such as the harmonic potential.

ai.tldr: 本文直接推导了非相对论量子电动力学中的Arai有效哈密顿量，无需依赖标度极限，且适用于更广泛的势类。
ai.motivation: 现有推导依赖标度极限，适用范围有限，需要更直接的方法。
ai.method: 通过直接推导，避开标度极限，扩展势类至Rollnik类和约束势（如谐振子势）。
ai.result: 成功推导出Arai有效哈密顿量，适用于Rollnik类和约束势。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种更通用的有效哈密顿量推导方法，有助于研究非相对论QED中的束缚态和散射问题。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法应用于相对论QED或凝聚态系统中的有效模型推导。
idea_spark.risk: 扩展至更复杂系统时，数学严格性可能面临挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 标度极限的替代思路可能启发其他领域中的有效理论构建。

en.tldr: This paper presents a direct derivation of Arai's effective Hamiltonian in non-relativistic quantum electrodynamics without relying on the scaling limit, and it applies to a broader class of potentials.
en.motivation: Existing derivations rely on the scaling limit, which limits applicability; a more direct method is needed.
en.method: Direct derivation bypassing the scaling limit, extending the potential class to include Rollnik and confining potentials such as the harmonic potential.
en.result: Successfully derived Arai's effective Hamiltonian for Rollnik class and confining potentials.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more general derivation method for effective Hamiltonians, useful for studying bound states and scattering in non-relativistic QED.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying a similar approach to effective model derivation in relativistic QED or condensed matter systems.
idea_spark.risk: Mathematical rigor may be challenging when extending to more complex systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The alternative to the scaling limit may inspire effective theory construction in other fields.

papers.title: Maximization of the efficiency of the first Dirichlet eigenfunction and improved eigenvalue inequalities
papers.summary: We study the efficiency of the first Dirichlet eigenfunction $u$ on bounded convex domains $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N$, defined as the ratio between the mean value of $u$ on $Ω$ and its maximum value. By exploiting improved log-concavity estimates, we establish new sharp lower bounds for the first eigenvalue $λ_1$ and upper bounds for the efficiency in terms of the geometry of the domain, refining classical inequalities by Payne, Stakgold, and Hersch. Furthermore, we investigate the asymptotic behavior of the efficiency for elongating planar convex domains, making use of 1D limit profiles and Schr{ö}dinger operators with convex potentials. As a main consequence of our analysis, we prove that among all planar convex domains the Payne-Stakgold upper bound is not optimal, and that there exists a maximizer of the efficiency.

ai.tldr: 研究了有界凸区域上第一Dirichlet特征函数的效率，通过改进的对数凹性估计得到了新的尖锐下界和上界，并证明了平面凸区域中Payne-Stakgold上界非最优且存在效率最大化者。
ai.motivation: 经典不等式（如Payne-Stakgold和Hersch）给出的第一特征值下界和效率上界可能不够精确，需要利用更精细的对数凹性估计来改进。
ai.method: 利用改进的对数凹性估计，结合一维极限轮廓和具有凸势的Schrödinger算子分析，推导新的不等式并研究渐近行为。
ai.result: 建立了新的尖锐下界和上界，证明了平面凸区域中Payne-Stakgold上界不是最优的，且存在效率的最大化者。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了凸区域上特征值问题更精确的界，有助于理解区域几何与谱性质的关系。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将效率最大化问题推广到非凸区域或带权重的特征函数。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸区域可能破坏对数凹性，导致估计失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 一维极限轮廓方法可启发其他形状优化问题的降维分析。

en.tldr: We study the efficiency of the first Dirichlet eigenfunction on bounded convex domains, establish new sharp lower bounds and upper bounds via improved log-concavity estimates, and prove that the Payne-Stakgold upper bound is not optimal among planar convex domains, with a maximizer existing.
en.motivation: Classical inequalities (e.g., Payne-Stakgold and Hersch) for the first eigenvalue lower bound and efficiency upper bound may be improved using refined log-concavity estimates.
en.method: We exploit improved log-concavity estimates, combined with 1D limit profiles and Schrödinger operators with convex potentials, to derive new inequalities and study asymptotic behavior.
en.result: New sharp lower and upper bounds are established; the Payne-Stakgold upper bound is shown not optimal for planar convex domains, and a maximizer of efficiency exists.
en.help_to_user: Provides sharper bounds for eigenvalue problems on convex domains, aiding understanding of the relationship between domain geometry and spectral properties.

idea_spark.idea: Consider extending the efficiency maximization problem to non-convex domains or weighted eigenfunctions.
idea_spark.risk: Non-convex domains may break log-concavity, causing estimates to fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: The 1D limit profile method may inspire dimensionality reduction in other shape optimization problems.

papers.title: Model Predictive Control of Hybrid Dynamical Systems
papers.summary: The problem of controlling hybrid dynamical systems using model predictive control (MPC) is formulated and sufficient conditions for asymptotic stability of a set are provided. Hybrid dynamical systems are modeled in terms of hybrid equations, involving a differential equation and a difference equation with inputs and constraints. The proposed hybrid MPC algorithm uses a suitable prediction and control horizon construction inspired by hybrid time domains. Structural properties of the hybrid optimization problem, its feasible set, and its value function are provided. Checkable conditions to guarantee asymptotic stability of a set are provided. These conditions are given in terms of properties on the stage cost, terminal cost, and the existence of static state-feedback laws, related through a control Lyapunov function condition. Examples illustrate the results throughout the paper.

ai.tldr: 提出了混合动力系统的模型预测控制方法，并给出了集合渐近稳定的充分条件。
ai.motivation: 混合动力系统同时包含连续和离散动态，传统控制方法难以处理其复杂行为，需要一种系统化的控制框架。
ai.method: 利用混合方程建模系统，设计基于混合时间域的预测与控制时域，并通过阶段代价、终端代价和静态状态反馈律构造控制李雅普诺夫函数。
ai.result: 给出了优化问题的可行集、值函数的结构性质，以及保证集合渐近稳定的可检验条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何为混合动力系统设计稳定的模型预测控制器。

idea_spark.idea: 将混合时间域概念引入预测时域设计，可能启发新的时域自适应策略。
idea_spark.risk: 条件依赖于静态状态反馈律的存在性，实际系统中可能难以满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 混合动力系统的稳定性条件可借鉴到事件触发控制或切换系统。

en.tldr: Formulates MPC for hybrid dynamical systems and provides sufficient conditions for asymptotic stability of a set.
en.motivation: Hybrid systems involve both continuous and discrete dynamics, posing challenges for conventional control methods; a systematic framework is needed.
en.method: Models systems via hybrid equations, designs prediction and control horizons inspired by hybrid time domains, and uses stage cost, terminal cost, and static state-feedback laws to construct a control Lyapunov function.
en.result: Provides structural properties of the feasible set and value function, along with checkable conditions for asymptotic stability of a set.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to design stable MPC for hybrid dynamical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating hybrid time domains into prediction horizon design may inspire new adaptive horizon strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Conditions rely on existence of static state-feedback laws, which may be hard to satisfy in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Stability conditions for hybrid systems could be adapted to event-triggered control or switched systems.

papers.title: Finite Termination of a Generalized Perceptron Algorithm
papers.summary: Motivated by Ridgway's proof of the perceptron algorithm, we study a simple subgradient method for convex inequality systems in Hilbert space. Assuming strict feasibility and bounded subgradients, we establish finite termination for several natural step sizes. We also examine what can go wrong without strict feasibility: finite convergence may fail even for one function, and with several functions the method may converge to a point outside the feasible set. The linear setting recovers the classical perceptron algorithm.

ai.motivation: 受Ridgway感知机算法证明的启发，将感知机算法推广到更一般的凸不等式系统，并研究其有限终止性质。
