en.tldr: In Hilbert space, a generalized perceptron algorithm for convex inequality systems is studied, proving finite termination under strict feasibility and bounded subgradients, and analyzing failures without strict feasibility.
en.motivation: Inspired by Ridgway's proof of the perceptron algorithm, we extend the algorithm to general convex inequality systems and investigate its finite termination properties.
en.method: A simple subgradient method is employed in Hilbert space for convex inequality systems, assuming strict feasibility and bounded subgradients, and analyzing finite termination under various natural step sizes.
en.result: Under strict feasibility, the algorithm terminates finitely; without strict feasibility, even a single function may fail to converge, and with multiple functions the method may converge outside the feasible set. The linear case recovers the classical perceptron algorithm.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the generalization of the perceptron algorithm and its convergence conditions, providing theoretical foundations for designing optimization algorithms with finite termination guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Relax the strict feasibility condition to a weaker one, or introduce regularization to ensure convergence when strict feasibility fails.
idea_spark.risk: Relaxing conditions may cause convergence to infeasible points, requiring additional projection or correction steps.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw on constraint qualification theories in convex analysis to design more robust termination criteria.

papers.title: Stackelberg Stochastic Linear-Quadratic Differential Games: A Closed-Loop Equilibrium Approach
papers.summary: This paper addresses a Stackelberg stochastic linear-quadratic (LQ) differential game under closed-loop information, a problem inherently time-inconsistent. Existing approaches rely on solving two coupled Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equations derived via time discretization and a limiting argument, whose convergence remains an open problem. We propose an alternative framework based on closed-loop equilibrium strategies. We reformulate the leader's problem as a forward-backward optimal control problem involving a coupled system of forward SDEs and backward Riccati equations. Due to the presence of controlled Riccati equations, the leader's problem becomes essentially nonlinear. Using a variational method, we characterize the leader's closed-loop equilibrium strategy and derive the associated equilibrium Riccati equation (ERE). A key conceptual distinction is that the follower adopts a globally optimal strategy against any admissible control of the leader, whereas in previous literature the follower's strategy was only locally optimal along the leader's specific equilibrium path. This makes the follower's strategy more robust and the leader's commitment more credible. In our LQ setting, the resulting ERE coincides exactly with the coupled HJB system from the literature, showing the leader's strategy is equivalent to the feedback Stackelberg solution. Thus, our framework provides not only an alternative derivation but also a rigorous justification of the limiting argument. We establish a priori estimates for the ERE, covering 1D and high-dimensional cases, ensuring global well-posedness for any finite horizon. This significantly extends existing results which require a sufficiently short time horizon or control-independent diffusion. An application to an asset management problem with numerical simulations illustrates the theoretical results.

ai.tldr: 本文提出基于闭环均衡策略的框架，解决Stackelberg随机线性二次微分博弈中的时间不一致问题，并严格证明了均衡Riccati方程与现有耦合HJB系统的等价性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖时间离散化和极限论证求解两个耦合HJB方程，其收敛性尚未解决。
ai.method: 将领导者问题重构为前向-后向最优控制问题，利用变分法推导闭环均衡策略及均衡Riccati方程。
ai.result: 均衡Riccati方程与文献中的耦合HJB系统完全一致，为极限论证提供了严格依据；建立了有限时间区间上全局适定性先验估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理时间不一致的Stackelberg随机博弈提供了可严格分析的替代框架，并给出资产管理的数值示例。

idea_spark.idea: 利用均衡Riccati方程替代HJB系统，简化求解并保证全局适定性。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性Riccati方程在高维情形下数值求解可能复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将领导者承诺的可信性建模为全局最优响应，而非局部最优路径。

en.motivation: Existing approaches rely on time discretization and a limiting argument for two coupled HJB equations, whose convergence remains open.
en.method: Reformulate the leader's problem as a forward-backward optimal control problem and use a variational method to derive the closed-loop equilibrium strategy and the equilibrium Riccati equation.
en.result: The equilibrium Riccati equation coincides exactly with the coupled HJB system, providing a rigorous justification of the limiting argument; a priori estimates ensure global well-posedness for any finite horizon.

papers.title: Free compressions of R-diagonal random variables and the semigroup of Brown measures
papers.summary: We investigate the Brown measures of compressions of $R$-diagonal random variables, extending previous results to include unbounded cases. For random variables with finite variance, we demonstrate that the Brown measures of their compressions converge to the uniform distribution on the unit disc. In the case of infinite variance, we characterize the Brown measures that remain stable under the compression operation and explore their properties in detail.

ai.tldr: 研究了R-对角随机变量压缩的Brown测度，将先前结果推广到无界情形。
ai.motivation: 推广R-对角随机变量压缩的Brown测度理论至无界情形。
ai.method: 理论分析，利用自由概率和算子代数方法。
ai.result: 有限方差时压缩的Brown测度收敛到单位圆盘上的均匀分布；无限方差时刻画了在压缩下保持稳定的Brown测度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解自由概率中压缩算子的谱分布行为。

idea_spark.idea: 探索无限方差情形下Brown测度的稳定性条件是否对应某种不变测度。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导复杂，可能难以直接应用于实际数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将压缩算子与随机矩阵的极限谱分布联系起来。

papers.title: Unlocking Optical Prior: Spectrum-Guided Knowledge Transfer for SAR Generalized Category Discovery
papers.summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) holds significant promise for the label-scarce Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) domain, yet its efficacy is severely constrained by the cross-modal incompatibility between the inherent optical prior of the Large Vision Models (LVMs) and SAR imagery. Existing domain adaptation methods often lack an inductive bias that reflects imaging characteristics, consequently failing to effectively transfer optical prior into the SAR domain. To address this issue, the Modal Discrepancy Curve (MDC) is introduced to model cross-modal discrepancy as a structured frequency-domain descriptor derived from spectral energy distributions. Leveraging this formulation, we propose the MDC-guided Cross-modal Prior Transfer (MCPT) framework, a pre-training paradigm that operates on paired optical-SAR data. Within this framework, Adaptive Frequency Tokenization (AFT) converts the MDC into learnable tokens, and Frequency-aware Expert Refinement (FER) performs band-wise discrepancy-aware feature refinement using these tokens. Based on the refined representations, contrastive learning aligns refined embeddings across modalities and internalizes the adaptation pattern. Ultimately, the superior SAR feature representation capability learned during paired pre-training is applied to downstream single-modal SAR-GCD tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across multiple mainstream datasets, indicating that frequency-domain discrepancy modeling enables more effective adaptation of optical prior to SAR imagery.

ai.tldr: 提出频谱引导的知识迁移框架，利用光学先验提升SAR图像广义类别发现性能。
ai.motivation: SAR图像标注稀缺，现有大视觉模型的光学先验与SAR模态不兼容，域适应方法缺乏成像特性归纳偏置。
ai.method: 引入模态差异曲线（MDC）建模跨模态差异为频域描述符，设计MCPT框架，包含自适应频率分词（AFT）和频率感知专家精炼（FER），通过对比学习对齐跨模态嵌入。
ai.result: 在多个主流数据集上达到最先进性能，证明频域差异建模有效迁移光学先验。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用光学先验和频域分析解决SAR图像类别发现中的标注稀缺问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受光学图像频域特征启发，将频谱能量分布作为跨模态差异的结构化描述符。

en.tldr: A spectrum-guided knowledge transfer framework leverages optical prior to improve SAR Generalized Category Discovery.
en.motivation: SAR images lack labels; optical prior from large vision models is incompatible with SAR modality, and existing domain adaptation methods lack imaging-specific inductive bias.
en.method: Introduces Modal Discrepancy Curve (MDC) to model cross-modal discrepancy as a frequency-domain descriptor, proposes MCPT framework with Adaptive Frequency Tokenization (AFT) and Frequency-aware Expert Refinement (FER), and aligns cross-modal embeddings via contrastive learning.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple mainstream datasets, demonstrating that frequency-domain discrepancy modeling effectively transfers optical prior to SAR.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage optical prior and frequency-domain analysis for label-scarce SAR category discovery.

idea_spark.risk: Relies on paired optical-SAR data, which may be scarce in practice and limit generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by frequency-domain features of optical images, using spectral energy distribution as a structured descriptor of cross-modal discrepancy.

papers.title: Poisson Hyperbolic Staircase in Discrete Time
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose a novel stochastic process that serves as a natural discrete-time counterpart to the continuous-time model known as the ``Poisson hyperbolic staircase'' proposed by Levikson et al. (1999), and clarify its analytical properties. The proposed model is a Markov chain on the state space $(0,1]$. Its transition rule states that at each time step, it jumps downwards to a value less than or equal to the current state according to a continuous uniform distribution with a probability proportional to the current state, and otherwise remains in the same state. In the analysis of the continuous-time model, the scaling property based on the continuity of time and space serves as a powerful tool. However, for this discrete-time process, an essential analytical difficulty arises because this scaling property is inapplicable. To overcome this difficulty, we adopt an approach that directly evaluates recurrence relations and integral equations. First, starting from the conditional transition of this process, we derive closed-form expressions for the marginal distribution and the joint survival function. Next, focusing on the counting process representing the number of jump occurrences and the sum of the state variables, we provide exact closed-form expressions for the probability generating function and the Laplace transform. Furthermore, we clarify the necessary and sufficient conditions that a sequence of functions must satisfy to construct a martingale associated with this process, and present a concrete sequence of martingales.

ai.tldr: 提出离散时间泊松双曲阶梯过程，推导其边际分布、联合生存函数、概率生成函数和拉普拉斯变换的闭式表达式，并构造鞅。
ai.motivation: 连续时间泊松双曲阶梯模型具有缩放性质，但离散时间版本因缩放性质不适用而难以分析。
ai.method: 直接评估递推关系和积分方程，推导闭式表达式，并给出鞅存在的充要条件。
ai.result: 得到了边际分布、联合生存函数、概率生成函数和拉普拉斯变换的精确闭式解，并构造了具体的鞅序列。

en.tldr: Proposes a discrete-time Poisson hyperbolic staircase process, derives closed-form expressions for marginal distribution, joint survival function, probability generating function, and Laplace transform, and constructs martingales.
en.motivation: The continuous-time Poisson hyperbolic staircase model benefits from a scaling property, but the discrete-time counterpart lacks this property, making analysis challenging.
en.method: Directly evaluates recurrence relations and integral equations to derive closed-form expressions, and provides necessary and sufficient conditions for martingale construction.
en.result: Obtains exact closed-form solutions for marginal distribution, joint survival function, probability generating function, and Laplace transform, and presents a concrete sequence of martingales.

idea_spark.risk: Closed-form solutions may be specific to the given transition rule; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from a continuous model, discretization reveals new analytical structures.

papers.title: Affine Supertrusses and Superbraces
papers.summary: Brzeziński's trusses are ``ring-like'' algebraic structures in which the addition is replaced with an abelian heap operation and the binary product satisfies a natural distributivity rule of the ternary product. The question of how to define ($\mathbb{Z}_2$-graded) super-versions of trusses is addressed in this note. Taking our cue from the theory of algebraic supergroups, we define an affine supertruss as a representable functor from the category of unital associative supercommutative superalgebras to the category of trusses. The representing superalgebras are equipped with a `cotruss' structure--a new concept in itself. We show that from an affine supertruss one can construct an affine superbrace, and so generalise Rump's braces to supermathematics. As an application of these constructions, we propose a generalisation of the set-theoretic Yang--Baxter equation to the setting of affine superschemes.

ai.tldr: 本文定义了仿射超桁架和仿射超括号，将Brzeziński的桁架结构推广到超数学领域，并应用于集合论Yang–Baxter方程的推广。
ai.motivation: 将Brzeziński的桁架结构（一种用阿贝尔堆运算替代加法的环状代数结构）推广到Z₂分次超版本，并进一步构造超括号，以在超数学中推广Rump的括号理论。
ai.method: 从代数超群理论出发，将仿射超桁架定义为从幺结合超交换超代数范畴到桁架范畴的可表示函子，其表示超代数配备新的“余桁架”结构；进而从仿射超桁架构造仿射超括号。
ai.result: 成功定义了仿射超桁架和仿射超括号，并提出了集合论Yang–Baxter方程在仿射超概形上的推广。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究超代数结构、堆运算以及Yang–Baxter方程在超几何背景下的推广提供了新的代数框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用余桁架结构定义仿射超桁架，并由此构造超括号，为超数学中的Yang–Baxter方程提供新视角。
idea_spark.risk: 超括号与经典括号的相容性及具体计算实例尚待验证，可能面临结构复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数超群的可表示函子视角出发，将经典代数结构推广到超设置，启发其他超代数结构的函子式定义。

zh.tldr: 本文定义了仿射超桁架和仿射超括号，将Brzeziński的桁架结构推广到超数学领域，并应用于集合论Yang–Baxter方程的推广。
zh.motivation: 将Brzeziński的桁架结构（一种用阿贝尔堆运算替代加法的环状代数结构）推广到Z₂分次超版本，并进一步构造超括号，以在超数学中推广Rump的括号理论。
zh.method: 从代数超群理论出发，将仿射超桁架定义为从幺结合超交换超代数范畴到桁架范畴的可表示函子，其表示超代数配备新的“余桁架”结构；进而从仿射超桁架构造仿射超括号。
zh.result: 成功定义了仿射超桁架和仿射超括号，并提出了集合论Yang–Baxter方程在仿射超概形上的推广。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究超代数结构、堆运算以及Yang–Baxter方程在超几何背景下的推广提供了新的代数框架。

en.tldr: This note defines affine supertrusses and superbraces, extending Brzeziński's trusses to supermathematics, and proposes a generalization of the set-theoretic Yang–Baxter equation to affine superschemes.
en.motivation: To define Z₂-graded super-versions of Brzeziński's trusses (ring-like structures with an abelian heap operation) and to generalize Rump's braces to supermathematics.
en.method: Inspired by algebraic supergroups, an affine supertruss is defined as a representable functor from unital associative supercommutative superalgebras to trusses, with the representing superalgebra equipped with a new 'cotruss' structure; affine superbraces are then constructed from affine supertrusses.
en.result: Affine supertrusses and superbraces are successfully defined, and a generalization of the set-theoretic Yang–Baxter equation to affine superschemes is proposed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new algebraic framework for studying superalgebraic structures, heap operations, and generalizations of the Yang–Baxter equation in a supergeometric setting.

idea_spark.idea: Use the cotruss structure to define affine supertrusses and then construct superbraces, offering a new perspective on the Yang–Baxter equation in supermathematics.
idea_spark.risk: Compatibility of superbraces with classical braces and concrete computational examples remain to be verified; structural complexity may arise.
idea_spark.inspiration: The functorial approach from algebraic supergroups inspires the definition of other superalgebraic structures via representable functors.

papers.title: Generalised Symmetries and Swampland-Type Constraints from Charge Quantisation via Rational Homotopy Theory
papers.summary: Sati and Schreiber [arXiv:2402.18473, arXiv:2512.12431] have proposed that charge quantisation in quantum field theory and string theory is governed by a homotopy type $\mathcal A$. We provide a refinement of this postulate, incorporating other currents including matter, connecting it to adjustments in higher gauge theory and providing a prescription for determining $\mathcal A$, and show that, while the homotopy groups of $\mathcal A$ classify the possible brane charges, the homology groups of $\mathcal A$ classify the invertible higher-form symmetries. Furthermore, we show that the charge-quantisation postulate implies a number of non-trivial constraints on quantum field theories similar to those implied by swampland conjectures; in particular, it rules out noncompact gauge groups and one-form field strengths that form a non-nilpotent Lie algebra. Finally, we argue that for theories of quantum gravity the space $\mathcal A$ must be contractible, in accordance with the swampland conjectures on the absence of global generalised symmetries and the completeness of the spectrum of charges, and explain how this explicitly arises in the case of Type I string theory.

ai.tldr: 通过有理同伦论细化电荷量子化公设，揭示其与广义对称性、沼泽地约束的联系，并证明量子引力中空间A必须可缩。
ai.motivation: Sati和Schreiber提出电荷量子化由同伦型A控制，本文旨在细化该公设，将其与物质流、高阶规范理论调整结合，并给出确定A的处方。
ai.method: 利用有理同伦论分析A的同伦群与同调群，分别对应膜电荷与可逆高阶形式对称性；通过电荷量子化公设推导类似沼泽地猜想的约束。
ai.result: 电荷量子化公设排除非紧致规范群和非幂零李代数的一形式场强；量子引力中A必须可缩，与无全局广义对称性和电荷谱完备性一致，并在I型弦论中显式实现。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解电荷量子化与广义对称性、沼泽地约束之间的深层数学结构，为量子场论和量子引力模型提供约束条件。

idea_spark.idea: 利用同伦型A的同调群分类可逆高阶形式对称性，可能为寻找新的对称性破缺机制提供代数拓扑工具。
idea_spark.risk: 数学框架高度抽象，与具体物理模型的对应可能不唯一，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将电荷量子化与沼泽地猜想统一于同伦论，启发从拓扑角度重新审视量子引力一致性条件。

en.tldr: Refines the charge quantisation postulate via rational homotopy theory, linking it to generalised symmetries and swampland constraints, and shows that in quantum gravity the space A must be contractible.
en.motivation: Sati and Schreiber proposed charge quantisation governed by a homotopy type A; we refine this postulate by incorporating matter currents, connecting to higher gauge theory, and providing a prescription for determining A.
en.method: Use rational homotopy theory to analyse homotopy groups (brane charges) and homology groups (invertible higher-form symmetries) of A; derive swampland-like constraints from the charge quantisation postulate.
en.result: The postulate rules out noncompact gauge groups and non-nilpotent Lie algebras; in quantum gravity A must be contractible, consistent with absence of global generalised symmetries and completeness of charge spectrum, explicitly realised in Type I string theory.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical framework linking charge quantisation, generalised symmetries, and swampland constraints, offering consistency conditions for quantum field theories and quantum gravity.

idea_spark.idea: Using homology groups of A to classify invertible higher-form symmetries may inspire new mechanisms for symmetry breaking via algebraic topology.
idea_spark.risk: High mathematical abstraction may lead to non-unique physical interpretations; careful validation against concrete models is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Unifying charge quantisation and swampland conjectures under homotopy theory suggests a topological perspective for quantum gravity consistency conditions.

papers.title: Thermal background reduction for mid-infrared imaging by low-rank background and sparse point-source modelling
papers.summary: Mid-infrared astronomy from the ground faces critical challenges in accurately detecting and quantifying sources due to the dominant spatially and time-variable background noise. Moreover, chopping and nodding, the traditional methods for dealing with these background issues, will not be technically feasible on the next generation of extremely large telescopes. This limitation requires the development of novel computational methods for a robust background reduction. We present and evaluate a novel method named LOw-RAnk Background ELimination (LORABEL) to improve the sensitivity of mid-infrared astronomical observations, without the need for classical telescope nodding, source masking, or other overheads in observing time. We applied a low-rank background-reduction strategy to (1) data taken on the ground with the VISIR with synthetically injected sources, and (2) airborne data from SOFIA. We compared the performance of our new method to classical chopping and nodding techniques, and analysed the effect on source photometry and detection precision for different observational scenarios. In regimes with a low signal-to-noise ratio (S/N $<5$) in the ground-based VISIR data, LORABEL reduces variation in the photometric error with respect to chopping differences alone and even the classical chop-nod sequence, at the cost of introducing a bias. Secondly, we demonstrate that LORABEL increases detection precision in comparison to traditional background-reduction methods. For the SOFIA dataset, we achieve a $20-100$ fold decrease in mean background flux with respect to the traditional chop-nod method while preserving most of the source flux. Our findings suggest that LORABEL is applicable to a wider range of instrumental observation, that is, both ground-based and airborne, and it is a suitable tool in the context of faint-source detection.

ai.tldr: 提出一种名为LORABEL的低秩背景消除方法，用于中红外天文成像，无需传统的斩波和 nodding 技术，即可有效降低时空变化背景噪声，提升微弱源探测灵敏度。
ai.motivation: 下一代极大望远镜无法使用传统斩波/nodding技术，需要开发新的计算方法来处理中红外成像中占主导的时空变化背景噪声。
ai.method: 采用低秩背景与稀疏点源建模策略，对地面VISIR数据和机载SOFIA数据进行处理，并与经典斩波/nodding方法对比。
ai.result: 在低信噪比（S/N<5）地面数据中，LORABEL降低了测光误差的变异，但引入了偏差；在SOFIA数据中，平均背景通量降低20-100倍，同时保留大部分源通量，检测精度提高。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你处理中红外天文图像或类似强背景噪声的成像数据，LORABEL提供了一种无需额外观测开销的背景抑制方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将LORABEL与深度学习结合，自动学习背景的低秩结构，进一步减少人工调参并提升对复杂背景的适应性。
idea_spark.risk: 低秩假设在背景具有快速非线性变化时可能失效，导致源通量估计偏差或伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴天文中的低秩+稀疏分解，可应用于生物医学成像中去除缓慢变化的背景荧光或组织自发荧光。

en.tldr: Proposes LORABEL, a low-rank background elimination method for mid-infrared astronomy that reduces spatiotemporally varying background noise without traditional chopping/nodding, improving faint-source detection sensitivity.
en.motivation: Next-generation extremely large telescopes cannot use classical chopping/nodding, necessitating novel computational methods for robust background reduction in mid-infrared imaging.
en.method: Applies low-rank background and sparse point-source modeling to ground-based VISIR data with synthetic sources and airborne SOFIA data, comparing performance to classical chopping/nodding.
en.result: In low-S/N (<5) ground data, LORABEL reduces photometric error variation at the cost of bias; in SOFIA data, it achieves 20-100× reduction in mean background flux while preserving most source flux, improving detection precision.
en.help_to_user: If you work with mid-infrared astronomical images or similar high-background imaging, LORABEL offers a background suppression method without extra observational overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Combine LORABEL with deep learning to automatically learn the low-rank background structure, reducing manual tuning and improving adaptability to complex backgrounds.
idea_spark.risk: The low-rank assumption may fail under rapidly nonlinear background variations, leading to biased source flux estimates or artifacts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from astronomical low-rank+sparse decomposition, similar approaches could remove slowly varying background fluorescence or autofluorescence in biomedical imaging.

papers.title: Sharp bounds for products of dependent random variables
papers.summary: We study the sharp bounds of $\mathbb{E}[X_1\cdots X_d]$ when the univariate marginal distributions are known, but the dependence structure between them is unspecified. Maximizing products over non-negative variables is straightforward via the comonotonic coupling, but the problem is more subtle when the marginals can take both positive and negative values. Specifically, two negative realizations can be matched to yield a positive product, whereas a single negative realization necessarily yields a negative product. We propose a decomposition of the problem into a magnitude part and a sign part, and show that universal upper and lower bounds for the product expectation follow from the comonotonic coupling of the absolute values and properly chosen sign vectors. Under a mild regularity assumption, we give necessary and sufficient conditions for these universal bounds to be attainable. For the upper bound, the marginal sign-bias vector must belong to the even-parity polytope, while for the lower, the corresponding condition involves the odd-parity polytope. We construct the extremal couplings via measurable selections on the parity polytope whenever these conditions hold. We study the case of identical marginals in more detail and provide examples of non-symmetric extremal coupling that achieve the universal bounds. We explicitly construct the extremal copulas in three dimensions, and use a recursive parity decomposition to obtain higher-dimensional extremal copulas from the trivariate ones.

ai.tldr: 研究在已知单变量边际分布但依赖结构未知时，随机变量乘积期望的严格上下界。
ai.motivation: 当变量可正可负时，乘积期望的极值问题比非负情形更复杂，需要同时处理大小和符号。
ai.method: 将问题分解为大小部分和符号部分，利用绝对值的共单调耦合与奇偶多面体上的符号向量构造极值耦合。
ai.result: 给出了上下界可达的充要条件（符号偏置向量属于偶/奇多面体），并显式构造了三维及更高维的极值copula。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在依赖结构未知时如何计算或约束多个随机变量乘积的期望。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号与大小解耦后，用组合多面体刻画极值耦合，可能用于金融或保险中的风险聚合。
idea_spark.risk: 正则性假设可能限制实际应用，高维构造的递归方法计算复杂度需评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从符号匹配的直觉出发，用多面体几何严格刻画极值，启发类似分解思路用于其他依赖极值问题。

en.tldr: We study sharp bounds for the expectation of a product of random variables with known marginals but unspecified dependence, handling both positive and negative values.
en.motivation: When variables can be negative, maximizing the product expectation is more subtle than the non-negative case because two negatives yield a positive product.
en.method: Decompose the problem into magnitude and sign parts, using comonotonic coupling of absolute values and sign vectors chosen from parity polytopes.
en.result: Necessary and sufficient conditions for attainability of universal bounds are given via even- and odd-parity polytopes; extremal copulas are constructed explicitly in three dimensions and recursively in higher dimensions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a framework to bound the expected product of dependent random variables when only marginal distributions are known.

idea_spark.idea: Decouple sign and magnitude, then use combinatorial polytopes to characterize extremal couplings, potentially useful for risk aggregation in finance or insurance.
idea_spark.risk: Regularity assumptions may limit practical applicability; recursive construction for high dimensions may have computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: The intuitive idea of matching signs is formalized via polytope geometry, inspiring similar decomposition approaches for other dependence extremal problems.

papers.title: Compositional Online Learning for Multi-Objective System Co-Design
papers.summary: Many engineered systems must balance competing objectives, such as performance and safety, cost and reliability, or efficiency and sustainability, and are naturally modeled as compositions of interacting subsystems. We study online multi-objective decision-making in monotone co-design, where functionalities and resources are partially ordered, and the goal is to identify the target-feasible antichain of non-dominated trade-offs using few expensive evaluations. We introduce optimistic evaluators: history-dependent bounds on functionality and resource mappings that enable safe elimination of implementations before full evaluation. Based on these evaluators, we develop an elimination-based rejection-sampling algorithm, prove its soundness, and show that the admissible region shrinks monotonically as information accumulates. We instantiate the framework under monotonicity, Lipschitz continuity, and linear-parametric structure. For compositional co-design problems modeled by multigraphs, we show how local optimistic certificates propagate through the tractable remainder of the graph to yield system-level optimistic feasibility and resource bounds. Experiments on multi-robot fleet design, intermodal mobility systems, and synthetic monotone and Lipschitz benchmarks show substantial sample-efficiency gains over uniform sampling, Bayesian optimization, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithms.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种组合在线学习方法，用于多目标系统协同设计，通过乐观评估器安全地消除次优实现，并利用拒绝采样算法在单调协同设计框架下高效探索非支配折衷方案。
ai.motivation: 许多工程系统需要在多个竞争目标（如性能与安全、成本与可靠性）之间取得平衡，且通常由相互作用的子系统组成。现有方法（如均匀采样、贝叶斯优化、多目标进化算法）在评估昂贵时样本效率不足。
ai.method: 引入历史依赖的乐观评估器，对功能性和资源映射提供上界，从而在完全评估前安全地消除不可行实现；基于此开发了消除型拒绝采样算法，并证明其正确性及可行域随信息积累单调收缩的性质。在单调性、Lipschitz连续性和线性参数结构下实例化框架；对于多图建模的组合协同设计问题，展示局部乐观证书如何通过图的可处理剩余部分传播，得到系统级乐观可行性和资源界。
ai.result: 在多机器人舰队设计、多式联运移动系统以及合成单调和Lipschitz基准测试上，相比均匀采样、贝叶斯优化和多目标进化算法，样本效率显著提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用组合结构和乐观评估器，在昂贵评估场景下高效进行多目标系统协同设计，减少所需实验次数。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部乐观证书传播机制应用于更复杂的图结构（如循环图），或结合主动学习进一步减少评估次数。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖于单调性和Lipschitz连续性假设，若实际系统不满足这些条件，乐观界可能失效，导致错误消除可行实现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受组合优化和在线学习中的乐观算法启发，将“乐观”思想引入多目标协同设计，实现安全且高效的探索。

zh.tldr: 提出了一种组合在线学习方法，用于多目标系统协同设计，通过乐观评估器安全地消除次优实现，并利用拒绝采样算法在单调协同设计框架下高效探索非支配折衷方案。
zh.motivation: 许多工程系统需要在多个竞争目标（如性能与安全、成本与可靠性）之间取得平衡，且通常由相互作用的子系统组成。现有方法（如均匀采样、贝叶斯优化、多目标进化算法）在评估昂贵时样本效率不足。
zh.method: 引入历史依赖的乐观评估器，对功能性和资源映射提供上界，从而在完全评估前安全地消除不可行实现；基于此开发了消除型拒绝采样算法，并证明其正确性及可行域随信息积累单调收缩的性质。在单调性、Lipschitz连续性和线性参数结构下实例化框架；对于多图建模的组合协同设计问题，展示局部乐观证书如何通过图的可处理剩余部分传播，得到系统级乐观可行性和资源界。
zh.result: 在多机器人舰队设计、多式联运移动系统以及合成单调和Lipschitz基准测试上，相比均匀采样、贝叶斯优化和多目标进化算法，样本效率显著提升。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用组合结构和乐观评估器，在昂贵评估场景下高效进行多目标系统协同设计，减少所需实验次数。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部乐观证书传播机制应用于更复杂的图结构（如循环图），或结合主动学习进一步减少评估次数。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖于单调性和Lipschitz连续性假设，若实际系统不满足这些条件，乐观界可能失效，导致错误消除可行实现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受组合优化和在线学习中的乐观算法启发，将“乐观”思想引入多目标协同设计，实现安全且高效的探索。

en.tldr: Proposes a compositional online learning method for multi-objective system co-design, using optimistic evaluators to safely eliminate suboptimal implementations and a rejection-sampling algorithm to efficiently explore non-dominated trade-offs under a monotone co-design framework.
en.motivation: Many engineered systems must balance competing objectives (e.g., performance vs. safety, cost vs. reliability) and are naturally composed of interacting subsystems. Existing methods (e.g., uniform sampling, Bayesian optimization, multi-objective evolutionary algorithms) suffer from low sample efficiency when evaluations are expensive.
en.method: Introduces history-dependent optimistic evaluators that provide upper bounds on functionality and resource mappings, enabling safe elimination of infeasible implementations before full evaluation; develops an elimination-based rejection-sampling algorithm, proves its soundness, and shows monotonic shrinkage of the admissible region as information accumulates. Instantiates the framework under monotonicity, Lipschitz continuity, and linear-parametric structure. For compositional co-design problems modeled by multigraphs, shows how local optimistic certificates propagate through the tractable remainder of the graph to yield system-level optimistic feasibility and resource bounds.
en.result: Experiments on multi-robot fleet design, intermodal mobility systems, and synthetic monotone and Lipschitz benchmarks show substantial sample-efficiency gains over uniform sampling, Bayesian optimization, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithms.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage compositional structure and optimistic evaluators for efficient multi-objective system co-design under expensive evaluations, reducing the number of required experiments.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the local optimistic certificate propagation mechanism to more complex graph structures (e.g., cyclic graphs) or combine with active learning to further reduce evaluation counts.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on monotonicity and Lipschitz continuity assumptions; if the actual system violates these, optimistic bounds may be invalid, leading to erroneous elimination of feasible implementations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by optimistic algorithms in combinatorial optimization and online learning, bringing the 'optimism' idea into multi-objective co-design for safe and efficient exploration.

papers.title: Continuity properties of strongly singular integral operators for extreme values of $p$
papers.summary: In this work, we establish continuity properties of strongly singular integral operators for extreme values of $p$. Particularly, weighted $L^\infty$-$BMO$ boundedness is obtained, generalizing Miyachi's result to the context of Muckenhoupt weights. As an application, we get an alternative proof of Chanillo's weighted $L^p$ estimates via extrapolation techniques.

ai.tldr: 建立了强奇异积分算子在极端p值下的连续性，推广了Miyachi的结果到Muckenhoupt权，并通过外推法给出了Chanillo加权Lp估计的另一种证明。
ai.motivation: 研究强奇异积分算子在极端p值下的连续性，特别是加权L∞-BMO有界性，以推广已有结果。
ai.method: 利用Muckenhoupt权和外推技术建立加权有界性。
ai.result: 获得了加权L∞-BMO有界性，并给出了Chanillo加权Lp估计的替代证明。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解强奇异积分算子在加权空间中的连续性及其与外推法的联系。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他极端p值下算子的连续性，或结合不同权函数。
idea_spark.risk: 外推法可能依赖特定权函数条件，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Miyachi和Chanillo的工作出发，利用外推简化证明，启发类似问题的处理。

en.tldr: Establishes continuity properties of strongly singular integral operators for extreme values of p, generalizing Miyachi's result to Muckenhoupt weights and providing an alternative proof of Chanillo's weighted Lp estimates via extrapolation.
en.motivation: To study continuity of strongly singular integral operators at extreme p values, particularly weighted L∞-BMO boundedness, extending known results.
en.method: Uses Muckenhoupt weights and extrapolation techniques to obtain weighted boundedness.
en.result: Obtains weighted L∞-BMO boundedness and an alternative proof of Chanillo's weighted Lp estimates.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand continuity of strongly singular integral operators in weighted spaces and connections with extrapolation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore continuity for other extreme p values or combine with different weight functions.
idea_spark.risk: Extrapolation may depend on specific weight conditions; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Miyachi and Chanillo's work, using extrapolation to simplify proofs, suggesting similar approaches for related problems.

papers.title: Static Vacuum Spacetimes with $Λ<0$ as Attractors of the Ricci-Harmonic Flow
papers.summary: We prove dynamical stability and instability theorems for asymptotically hyperbolic static solutions of Einstein's equation with $Λ<0$, viewed as self-similar solutions of the Ricci-harmonic flow. More precisely, we show that static metrics are dynamically stable if and only if a positive mass type theorem holds for nearby metrics. Our key tool is a new variant of the expander entropy for the Ricci-harmonic flow.

ai.tldr: 证明了具有负宇宙常数的爱因斯坦方程静态解在Ricci-调和流下的动力学稳定性与不稳定性定理。
ai.motivation: 研究负宇宙常数时空的动力学行为，特别是静态解作为Ricci-调和流吸引子的性质。
ai.method: 利用Ricci-调和流的膨胀子熵新变体，结合正质量型定理。
ai.result: 静态度量动力学稳定当且仅当附近度量满足正质量型定理。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了负宇宙常数时空稳定性分析的数学框架和熵工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将正质量定理与动力学稳定性等价，可能用于检验其他时空解的稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 熵构造依赖特定对称性，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将熵方法用于AdS/CFT对应中的稳定性问题。

zh.tldr: 证明了具有负宇宙常数的爱因斯坦方程静态解在Ricci-调和流下的动力学稳定性与不稳定性定理。

idea_spark.risk: 熵构造依赖特定对称性，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将熵方法用于AdS/CFT对应中的稳定性问题。

en.tldr: Proves dynamical stability and instability theorems for static solutions of Einstein's equation with negative cosmological constant under Ricci-harmonic flow.
en.motivation: To understand the dynamical behavior of spacetimes with negative cosmological constant, focusing on static solutions as attractors.
en.method: Uses a new variant of expander entropy for Ricci-harmonic flow, combined with a positive mass type theorem.
en.result: Static metrics are dynamically stable if and only if a positive mass type theorem holds for nearby metrics.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical framework and entropy tool for stability analysis of spacetimes with negative cosmological constant.

idea_spark.idea: Equivalence between positive mass theorem and dynamical stability may be used to test stability of other spacetime solutions.
idea_spark.risk: Entropy construction relies on specific symmetries; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using entropy methods for stability problems in AdS/CFT correspondence.

papers.title: A variational formulation of stochastic thermodynamics: Spatially extended systems
papers.summary: Stochastic field theories are often constructed phenomenologically, without a systematic assessment of thermodynamic consistency or local detailed balance. This may hinder a physical description of irreversibility at the field-theoretic level beyond the standard statistical formulation of stochastic thermodynamics. Here, we develop a variational formulation for thermodynamically consistent stochastic field theories by extending Hamilton's principle of classical field theory. Introducing the second law as an axiom yields a consistent local thermodynamic structure in which novel fluctuationdissipation relations emerge naturally, ensuring local detailed balance. Remarkably, the resulting entropy production takes the same form as in standard stochastic thermodynamics, up to a reformulation in an extended phase space incorporating both configurational and thermal variables. This correspondence extends key results, including individual trajectory-level thermodynamics and fluctuation theorems. The construction is formulated within a unified geometric framework based on a generalized Lagrange-d'Alembert principle, providing a top-down connection between phenomenological modeling and thermodynamic consistency. Potential applications include thermodynamically consistent modeling of complex fluids, Lagrangian reduction by symmetry in continuum systems, and structure-preserving numerical schemes for stochastic partial differential equations.

ai.tldr: 通过扩展经典场论的哈密顿原理，为随机场论建立了热力学一致的变分公式，并证明了其与标准随机热力学在熵产生等关键结果上的一致性。
ai.motivation: 随机场论常被现象学地构建，缺乏对热力学一致性或局部细致平衡的系统评估，这阻碍了在场论层面描述不可逆性。
ai.method: 将热力学第二定律作为公理引入，扩展哈密顿原理，在包含构型和热变量的扩展相空间中重新表述，并基于广义拉格朗日-达朗贝尔原理构建统一几何框架。
ai.result: 得到了与标准随机热力学相同形式的熵产生，自然涌现出新的涨落-耗散关系，确保了局部细致平衡，并扩展了轨迹级热力学和涨落定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为复杂流体、连续介质对称性约化以及随机偏微分方程的结构保持数值格式提供了热力学一致的建模方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该几何框架，可设计保结构数值算法，直接模拟满足局部细致平衡的随机场论，避免人工耗散。
idea_spark.risk: 扩展相空间的引入可能增加计算复杂度，且公理化的第二定律在非马尔可夫或强耦合系统中的适用性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受哈密顿原理与热力学第二定律结合的启发，可探索将信息论约束纳入变分原理，以描述测量反馈或信息处理系统的热力学。

en.tldr: Extending Hamilton's principle of classical field theory, a thermodynamically consistent variational formulation for stochastic field theories is developed, showing that the resulting entropy production matches standard stochastic thermodynamics.
en.motivation: Stochastic field theories are often constructed phenomenologically without systematic assessment of thermodynamic consistency or local detailed balance, hindering a field-theoretic description of irreversibility.
en.method: The second law is introduced as an axiom, extending Hamilton's principle; the formulation is recast in an extended phase space with configurational and thermal variables, and unified via a generalized Lagrange-d'Alembert principle.
en.result: Entropy production takes the same form as in standard stochastic thermodynamics, novel fluctuation-dissipation relations emerge ensuring local detailed balance, and key results like trajectory-level thermodynamics and fluctuation theorems are extended.
en.help_to_user: Provides a top-down approach for thermodynamically consistent modeling of complex fluids, symmetry reduction in continuum systems, and structure-preserving numerical schemes for stochastic PDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the geometric framework to design structure-preserving numerical algorithms that directly simulate stochastic field theories satisfying local detailed balance, avoiding artificial dissipation.
idea_spark.risk: The extended phase space may increase computational cost, and the axiomatic second law may need validation for non-Markovian or strongly coupled systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining Hamilton's principle with the second law, one could explore incorporating information-theoretic constraints into the variational principle to describe thermodynamics of measurement-feedback or information-processing systems.

papers.title: UniSonate: A Unified Model for Speech, Music, and Sound Effect Generation with Text Instructions
papers.summary: Generative audio modeling has largely been fragmented into specialized tasks, text-to-speech (TTS), text-to-music (TTM), and text-to-audio (TTA), each operating under heterogeneous control paradigms. Unifying these modalities remains a fundamental challenge due to the intrinsic dissonance between structured semantic representations (speech/music) and unstructured acoustic textures (sound effects). In this paper, we introduce UniSonate, a unified flow-matching framework capable of synthesizing speech, music, and sound effects through a standardized, reference-free natural language instruction interface. To reconcile structural disparities, we propose a novel dynamic token injection mechanism that projects unstructured environmental sounds into a structured temporal latent space, enabling precise duration control within a phoneme-driven Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MM-DiT). Coupled with a multi-stage curriculum learning strategy, this approach effectively mitigates cross-modal optimization conflicts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniSonate achieves state-of-the-art performance in instruction-based TTS (WER 1.47%) and TTM (SongEval Coherence 3.18), while maintaining competitive fidelity in TTA. Crucially, we observe positive transfer, where joint training on diverse audio data significantly enhances structural coherence and prosodic expressiveness compared to single-task baselines. Audio samples are available at https://qiangchunyu.github.io/UniSonate/.

ai.tldr: 提出UniSonate统一框架，通过流匹配和动态令牌注入，实现文本指令驱动的语音、音乐和音效生成，并在多任务联合训练中观察到正迁移。
ai.motivation: 现有生成式音频建模碎片化为文本转语音、文本转音乐和文本转音频等独立任务，控制范式异构，缺乏统一模型。
ai.method: 采用流匹配框架，提出动态令牌注入机制将非结构化环境声音投影到结构化时间潜空间，结合音素驱动的多模态扩散变换器和多阶段课程学习策略。
ai.result: 在指令式TTS上WER 1.47%，TTM上SongEval Coherence 3.18，TTA保持竞争力，且联合训练提升结构连贯性和韵律表现力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户通过统一自然语言指令生成语音、音乐和音效，简化多模态音频创作流程。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将动态令牌注入与扩散模型结合，用于非结构化数据（如噪声、环境声）的结构化表示。
idea_spark.risk: 多模态联合训练可能引入模态间干扰，需谨慎设计课程学习顺序。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受语音音素结构启发，将非结构化音频映射到结构化空间，可推广至其他非结构化数据生成。

idea_spark.risk: 多模态联合训练可能引入模态间干扰，需谨慎设计课程学习顺序。

en.tldr: UniSonate is a unified flow-matching framework for speech, music, and sound effect generation via text instructions, using dynamic token injection and multi-stage curriculum learning, achieving state-of-the-art results with positive cross-modal transfer.
en.motivation: Generative audio modeling is fragmented into separate tasks (TTS, TTM, TTA) with heterogeneous control paradigms, lacking a unified model.
en.method: A flow-matching framework with a dynamic token injection mechanism that projects unstructured environmental sounds into a structured temporal latent space, coupled with a phoneme-driven Multimodal Diffusion Transformer and multi-stage curriculum learning.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art in instruction-based TTS (WER 1.47%) and TTM (SongEval Coherence 3.18), competitive TTA fidelity, and positive transfer from joint training enhancing structural coherence and prosodic expressiveness.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to generate speech, music, and sound effects via a unified natural language interface, simplifying multimodal audio creation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining dynamic token injection with diffusion models for structured representation of unstructured data like noise or environmental sounds.
idea_spark.risk: Multimodal joint training may introduce inter-modal interference, requiring careful curriculum design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by phoneme structure in speech, mapping unstructured audio to structured space can be generalized to other unstructured data generation.

papers.title: Flow4DGS-SLAM: Optical Flow-Guided 4D Gaussian Splatting SLAM
papers.summary: Handling the dynamic environments is a significant research challenge in Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). Recent research combines 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with SLAM to achieve both robust camera pose estimation and photorealistic renderings. However, using SLAM to efficiently reconstruct both static and dynamic regions remains challenging. In this work, we propose an efficient framework for dynamic 3DGS SLAM guided by optical flow. Using the input depth and prior optical flow, we first propose a category-agnostic motion mask generation strategy by fitting a camera ego-motion model to decompose the optical flow. This module separates dynamic and static Gaussians and simultaneously provides flow-guided camera pose initialization. We boost the training speed of dynamic 3DGS by explicitly modeling their temporal centers at keyframes. These centers are propagated using 3D scene flow priors and are dynamically initialized with an adaptive insertion strategy. Alongside this, we model the temporal opacity and rotation using a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to adaptively learn the complex dynamics. The empirical results demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in tracking, dynamic reconstruction, and training efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出基于光流引导的4D高斯泼溅SLAM框架，高效处理动态场景，实现跟踪、重建和训练速度的领先性能。
ai.motivation: 现有3DGS SLAM难以同时高效重建静态和动态区域，动态场景处理是视觉SLAM的重要挑战。
ai.method: 利用输入深度和先验光流，通过拟合相机自运动模型生成类别无关的运动掩码，分离动态与静态高斯体；在关键帧显式建模动态高斯体的时间中心，利用3D场景流先验传播并自适应插入；使用高斯混合模型学习时间不透明度和旋转。
ai.result: 在跟踪、动态重建和训练效率上达到最先进水平。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效处理动态场景的SLAM方案，可用于增强现实、机器人导航等需要实时定位与动态重建的应用。

en.tldr: Proposes an optical flow-guided 4D Gaussian Splatting SLAM framework that efficiently handles dynamic scenes, achieving state-of-the-art performance in tracking, dynamic reconstruction, and training efficiency.
en.motivation: Existing 3DGS SLAM struggles to efficiently reconstruct both static and dynamic regions; handling dynamic environments is a key challenge in visual SLAM.
en.method: Uses input depth and prior optical flow to generate a category-agnostic motion mask by fitting a camera ego-motion model, separating dynamic and static Gaussians; explicitly models temporal centers of dynamic Gaussians at keyframes, propagated via 3D scene flow priors and adaptively inserted; models temporal opacity and rotation using a Gaussian Mixture Model.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance in tracking, dynamic reconstruction, and training efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient SLAM solution for dynamic scenes, useful for augmented reality, robot navigation, and other applications requiring real-time localization and dynamic reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Using Gaussian Mixture Models for temporal attribute modeling can inspire other temporal dynamic modeling methods, such as dynamic neural radiance fields or deformable scene representations.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on prior optical flow and depth input; performance may degrade when depth sensors are unavailable or optical flow estimation is inaccurate.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing optical flow via camera ego-motion model to distinguish dynamic and static regions offers a new approach for unsupervised dynamic segmentation.

papers.title: Using a generative model for out-of-sample testing of two-stage stochastic programs
papers.summary: Stochastic programming models for decision-making under uncertainty often suffer from scenario scarcity, where obtaining representative samples of uncertain parameters requires expensive simulations or measurements. This work presents a framework that leverages the Normal-to-Anything (NORTA) generative model to enhance the reliability of two-stage stochastic programming solutions through comprehensive out-of-sample testing when scenario data is limited. The NORTA model efficiently generates synthetic scenarios that preserve both marginal distributions and correlation structures from limited available data, offering a computationally tractable alternative to expensive physics-based simulations. We demonstrate the approach through a case study on power grid resilience planning against flood events in Texas, where we use 16 high-fidelity flood scenarios to generate 800 additional synthetic scenarios for validation. The results show that NORTA-generated scenarios accurately capture essential statistical properties, with the out-of-sample performance of first-stage decisions closely matching expectations from the original stochastic programming model. This framework enables decision-makers to assess the robustness of their solutions when obtaining additional real-world data is prohibitively expensive. The approach bridges machine learning and operations research by providing a practical solution to scenario generation challenges in stochastic programming.

ai.tldr: 提出使用NORTA生成模型进行两阶段随机规划的外样本测试，在数据有限时生成合成场景以验证决策鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 随机规划中场景稀缺，获取真实样本成本高，需要高效生成保留统计特性的合成场景。
ai.method: 利用NORTA模型从少量数据生成合成场景，保留边际分布和相关性结构，用于外样本测试。
ai.result: 以德克萨斯州电网防洪规划为例，16个高保真场景生成800个合成场景，统计特性准确，一阶段决策表现与原始模型一致。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助决策者在数据有限时评估随机规划解的鲁棒性，降低对昂贵仿真的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 结合NORTA与强化学习，动态生成适应环境变化的场景，提升在线决策适应性。
idea_spark.risk: 合成场景可能无法完全捕捉极端事件，需结合领域知识验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成模型与运筹学结合，为数据稀缺场景提供低成本验证工具。

en.tldr: Proposes using the NORTA generative model for out-of-sample testing of two-stage stochastic programs, generating synthetic scenarios from limited data to validate decision robustness.
en.motivation: Stochastic programming suffers from scenario scarcity; obtaining real-world samples is expensive, requiring efficient generation of synthetic scenarios that preserve statistical properties.
en.method: Leverages the NORTA model to generate synthetic scenarios from limited data, preserving marginal distributions and correlation structures for out-of-sample testing.
en.result: Case study on Texas power grid flood resilience: 16 high-fidelity scenarios generate 800 synthetic scenarios, accurately capturing statistics; first-stage decisions match original model expectations.
en.help_to_user: Helps decision-makers assess solution robustness when real-world data is scarce, reducing reliance on expensive simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine NORTA with reinforcement learning to dynamically generate scenarios adapting to environmental changes, improving online decision adaptability.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic scenarios may not fully capture extreme events; domain knowledge validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bridging generative models and operations research provides a low-cost validation tool for data-scarce settings.

papers.title: Sign-balance of random Laplace eigenfunctions
papers.summary: Motivated by the problem of the small-scale sign distribution of Laplace eigenfunctions, we introduce a strong notion of sign-balance for (eigen)functions, and prove that random eigenfunctions are sign-balanced above a precisely determined scale with almost full probability. The scale is proven to be optimal up to a logarithmic power of the energy. Our results include the important case of random spherical harmonics, as well as more general band-limited random waves on smooth Riemannian manifolds. Extending the notion of balance to arbitrary levels, we determine the precise optimum scale above which random eigenfunctions are volume-balanced with respect to non-zero levels. Beyond their intrinsic interest, our results serve as a model for a natural conjecture on the optimal scale at which deterministic Laplace eigenfunctions are sign-balanced.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了随机拉普拉斯本征函数的符号平衡性，证明了在精确确定的尺度上，随机本征函数几乎必然符号平衡，且该尺度在能量对数幂意义下最优。
ai.motivation: 受拉普拉斯本征函数小尺度符号分布问题的启发，旨在建立本征函数符号平衡的强概念并确定最优尺度。
ai.method: 引入符号平衡的严格定义，利用概率方法分析随机本征函数，包括随机球谐函数和一般黎曼流形上的带限随机波。
ai.result: 证明了随机本征函数在精确确定的尺度上几乎必然符号平衡，该尺度最优至能量对数幂；并推广到任意水平，确定体积平衡的最优尺度。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解随机本征函数的符号分布提供了精确的尺度界限，有助于谱几何和随机波理论的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号平衡与体积平衡结合，可能用于研究本征函数的零点分布或 nodal 域。
idea_spark.risk: 确定性本征函数的符号平衡可能不满足随机情形下的最优尺度，需谨慎推广。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机球谐函数符号平衡的启发，可探索其他对称空间上的类似性质。

en.tldr: This paper studies the sign-balance of random Laplace eigenfunctions, proving that they are sign-balanced at a precisely determined scale with almost full probability, and that the scale is optimal up to a logarithmic power of the energy.
en.motivation: Motivated by the small-scale sign distribution of Laplace eigenfunctions, the aim is to introduce a strong notion of sign-balance and determine the optimal scale.
en.method: A rigorous definition of sign-balance is introduced, and probabilistic methods are used to analyze random eigenfunctions, including random spherical harmonics and band-limited random waves on smooth Riemannian manifolds.
en.result: Random eigenfunctions are shown to be sign-balanced at a precisely determined scale with almost full probability, optimal up to a logarithmic power of energy; the notion is extended to arbitrary levels, yielding the optimal scale for volume-balance.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise scale bounds for the sign distribution of random eigenfunctions, aiding research in spectral geometry and random wave theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining sign-balance with volume-balance may lead to studies of zero distributions or nodal domains of eigenfunctions.
idea_spark.risk: Deterministic eigenfunctions may not achieve the optimal scale for sign-balance as in the random case, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by sign-balance of random spherical harmonics, similar properties on other symmetric spaces could be explored.

papers.title: HFS-TriNet: A Three-Branch Collaborative Feature Learning Network for Prostate Cancer Classification from TRUS Videos
papers.summary: Transrectal ultrasound (TRUS) imaging is a cost-effective and non-invasive modality widely used in the diagnosis of prostate cancer. The computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) relying on TRUS images has been extensively investigated recently. Compared to static images, TRUS video provides richer spatial-temporal information, which make it a promising alternative for improving the accuracy and robustness of CAD systems. However, TRUS video analysis also introduces new challenges. These include information redundancy, which increases computational costs; high intra- and inter-class similarity, which complicates feature extraction; and a low signal-to-noise ratio, which hinders the identification of clinically relevant information. To address these problems, we propose a heuristic frame selection (HFS) and a three-branch collaborative feature learning network (HFS-TriNet) for prostate cancer classification from TRUS videos. Specifically, selecting a clip of video frames at intervals for training can mitigate redundancy. The HFS strategy dynamically initializes the starting point of each training clip, which ensures that the sampled clips span the entire video sequence. For better feature extraction, besides a regular ResNet50 branch, we also utilize 1) a large model branch based a pre-trained medical segment anything model (SAM) to extract deep features of each frame and a normalization-based attention module to explore the temporal consistency; and 2) a wavelet transform convolutional residual (WTCR) branch that extracts lesion edge information in the high-frequency domain and performs denoising in the low-frequency domain.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于启发式帧选择和三分支协作特征学习网络的TRUS视频前列腺癌分类方法。
ai.motivation: TRUS视频包含丰富时空信息，但存在信息冗余、类间相似度高、信噪比低等问题，现有静态图像方法难以充分利用。
ai.method: 采用启发式帧选择策略动态初始化训练片段起点，减少冗余；构建三分支网络：ResNet50主干、基于SAM的大模型分支提取深度特征并利用归一化注意力模块建模时序一致性、小波变换卷积残差分支提取高频边缘信息并去噪。
ai.result: 在TRUS视频数据集上验证了方法的有效性，提升了分类准确性和鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用视频时空信息和多分支特征融合提升前列腺癌超声诊断性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将SAM等通用分割模型作为特征提取器，结合时序注意力与频域去噪，为弱监督视频分类提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: SAM模型计算开销大，实时性可能受限；频域分支对噪声敏感，需调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用预训练大模型提取通用特征，再通过轻量模块适配特定任务，平衡性能与效率。

idea_spark.risk: SAM模型计算开销大，实时性可能受限；频域分支对噪声敏感，需调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用预训练大模型提取通用特征，再通过轻量模块适配特定任务，平衡性能与效率。

en.tldr: Proposes a heuristic frame selection and three-branch collaborative feature learning network for prostate cancer classification from TRUS videos.
en.motivation: TRUS videos offer rich spatiotemporal information but suffer from redundancy, high intra/inter-class similarity, and low SNR, which static image methods cannot handle well.
en.method: Uses heuristic frame selection to dynamically initialize training clip start points, reducing redundancy; builds a three-branch network: a ResNet50 backbone, a large model branch based on SAM for deep features with a normalization-based attention module for temporal consistency, and a wavelet transform convolutional residual branch for edge extraction and denoising.
en.result: Validated on TRUS video dataset, improving classification accuracy and robustness.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage video spatiotemporal information and multi-branch feature fusion to enhance prostate cancer ultrasound diagnosis.

idea_spark.idea: Using SAM as a feature extractor combined with temporal attention and frequency-domain denoising offers a new approach for weakly-supervised video classification.
idea_spark.risk: SAM model incurs high computational cost, potentially limiting real-time use; frequency branch is sensitive to noise and requires tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage pretrained large models for general features, then adapt with lightweight modules for specific tasks, balancing performance and efficiency.

papers.title: Aggregate vs. Personalized Judges in Business Idea Evaluation: Evidence from Expert Disagreement
papers.summary: Evaluating LLM-generated business ideas is often harder to scale than generating them. Unlike standard NLP benchmarks, business idea evaluation relies on multi-dimensional criteria such as feasibility, novelty, differentiation, user need, and market size, and expert judgments often disagree. This paper studies a methodological question raised by such disagreement: should an automatic judge approximate an aggregate consensus, or model evaluators individually? We introduce PBIG-DATA, a dataset of approximately 3,000 individual scores across 300 patent-grounded product ideas, provided by domain experts on six business-oriented dimensions: specificity, technical validity, innovativeness, competitive advantage, need validity, and market size. Analyses show substantial expert disagreement on fine-grained ordinal scores, while agreement is higher under coarse selection, suggesting structured heterogeneity rather than random noise. We then compare three judge configurations: a rubric-only zero-shot judge, an aggregate judge conditioned on mixed evaluator histories, and a personalized judge conditioned on the target evaluator's scoring history. Across dimensions and model sizes, personalized judges align more closely with the corresponding evaluator than aggregate judges, and evaluator agreement correlates with similarity of judge-generated reasoning only under personalized conditioning. These results indicate that pooled labels can be a fragile target in pluralistic evaluation settings and motivate evaluator-conditioned judge designs for business idea assessment.

ai.tldr: 研究在商业创意评估中，面对专家分歧时，应使用聚合判断还是个性化判断。
ai.motivation: LLM生成的商业创意评估难以规模化，专家判断常存在分歧，需要研究评估方法。
ai.method: 构建PBIG-DATA数据集，包含约3000个专家评分，比较零样本、聚合判断和个性化判断三种配置。
ai.result: 个性化判断更贴近对应评估者，聚合标签在多元评估中可能不可靠。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在多元评估场景下如何设计更准确的自动评估系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用评估者历史评分数据训练个性化模型，提升评估一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 个性化模型可能过拟合特定评估者，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 专家分歧的结构性异质性提示可探索评估者聚类或混合模型。

en.tldr: Studies whether aggregate or personalized judges are better for business idea evaluation given expert disagreement.
en.motivation: Evaluating LLM-generated business ideas is hard to scale; expert judgments often disagree, raising methodological questions.
en.method: Constructs PBIG-DATA with ~3000 expert scores, compares zero-shot, aggregate, and personalized judge configurations.
en.result: Personalized judges align better with target evaluators; pooled labels are fragile in pluralistic settings.
en.help_to_user: Helps design more accurate automatic evaluation systems in pluralistic evaluation scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Train personalized models using evaluator history to improve evaluation consistency.
idea_spark.risk: Personalized models may overfit specific evaluators; generalizability needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Structured heterogeneity in expert disagreement suggests exploring evaluator clustering or hybrid models.

papers.title: Timelike Ricci curvature lower bounds via optimal transport for Orlicz-type Lorentzian costs
papers.summary: We study the optimal transport problem on globally hyperbolic spacetimes associated with Orlicz-type Lorentzian cost functions of the form $u \circ \ell$, where $u$ is a suitable monotonically increasing and concave function, and $\ell$ is the time separation. Our work encompasses and generalises the case $u(x) = u_p(x) = p^{-1}x^p$ for $p \in (0,1)$, as well as the more recent $p < 0$, which have been the only examples considered so far in the literature. A fundamental notion for our purposes is the property of $u$-separation for a pair of measures, which generalises McCann's $p$-separation and for which we are able to obtain strong duality to the full Orlicz-type optimization problem. In our main results, we characterise timelike Ricci curvature lower bounds via the convexity of the relative entropy along geodesics arising from the Orlicz-type optimal transport with cost $u \circ \ell$, which is a far-reaching generalization of McCann's seminal work in the case $u = u_p$, $p \in (0,1)$.

ai.tldr: 研究全局双曲时空上Orlicz型洛伦兹代价的最优输运问题，并刻画类时Ricci曲率下界。
ai.motivation: 推广已有文献中仅考虑的p∈(0,1)及p<0情形，建立更一般的曲率刻画框架。
ai.method: 引入u-分离性概念，证明其对偶性，并利用相对熵沿测地线的凸性。
ai.result: 通过Orlicz型最优输运的熵凸性刻画了类时Ricci曲率下界。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解时空曲率与最优输运的联系提供更一般的数学工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Orlicz型代价应用于量子引力或因果集理论中的熵分析。
idea_spark.risk: 数学严格性要求高，物理解释可能不直接。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从McCann的经典工作出发，利用更一般的代价函数扩展曲率刻画范围。

papers.title: Agentic World Modeling: Foundations, Capabilities, Laws, and Beyond
papers.summary: As AI systems move from generating text to accomplishing goals through sustained interaction, the ability to model environment dynamics becomes a central bottleneck. Agents that manipulate objects, navigate software, coordinate with others, or design experiments require predictive environment models, yet the term world model carries different meanings across research communities. We introduce a "levels x laws" taxonomy organized along two axes. The first defines three capability levels: L1 Predictor, which learns one-step local transition operators; L2 Simulator, which composes them into multi-step, action-conditioned rollouts that respect domain laws; and L3 Evolver, which autonomously revises its own model when predictions fail against new evidence. The second identifies four governing-law regimes: physical, digital, social, and scientific. These regimes determine what constraints a world model must satisfy and where it is most likely to fail. Using this framework, we synthesize over 400 works and summarize more than 100 representative systems spanning model-based reinforcement learning, video generation, web and GUI agents, multi-agent social simulation, and AI-driven scientific discovery. We analyze methods, failure modes, and evaluation practices across level-regime pairs, propose decision-centric evaluation principles and a minimal reproducible evaluation package, and outline architectural guidance, open problems, and governance challenges. The resulting roadmap connects previously isolated communities and charts a path from passive next-step prediction toward world models that can simulate, and ultimately reshape, the environments in which agents operate.

ai.tldr: 提出一个“层级×法则”分类法，将世界模型分为三个能力层级（预测器、模拟器、进化器）和四个法则领域（物理、数字、社会、科学），综述400余篇工作，为智能体环境建模提供路线图。

papers.title: Non-linear geometry of multiple zeta values
papers.summary: Since their rediscovery in the 1990s, multiple zeta values have become ubiquitous in many areas of mathematics and physics. Their standard integral and sum representations can usually be traced back to a single source, namely the iterated integrals on the Riemann sphere with three punctures. We refer to such representations as the \emph{linear} geometry of multiple zeta values, since the denominators of the corresponding integrands factor completely into linear terms.   However, there also exist equally important and entirely distinct integral representations for multiple zeta values arising in mathematics and physics, in which matrix determinants appear in the denominator of the integrand. We call this the \emph{non-linear} geometry of multiple zeta values. These lectures trace the origins of this non-linear geometry and provide an introductory journey through a range of topics including tropical geometry, the moduli spaces of tropical curves, Feynman integrals in quantum field theory, the general linear group of integer matrices, and the reduction theory of quadratic forms. In doing so, we propose a geometric framework for multiple zeta values based on such non-linear, determinantal representations and set out a number of open questions for future research.

ai.tldr: 本文介绍了多重zeta值的非线性几何，即其积分表示中分母包含矩阵行列式的形式，并探讨了其与热带几何、热带曲线模空间、费曼积分、整数矩阵一般线性群及二次型约化理论之间的联系。
ai.motivation: 多重zeta值的标准表示基于线性几何（分母完全分解为线性因子），但数学和物理中还存在另一类重要的行列式表示，需要建立统一的几何框架。
ai.method: 通过分析行列式型积分表示，引入热带几何、模空间、费曼积分、一般线性群和二次型约化等工具，构建非线性几何框架。
ai.result: 提出了一个基于非线性行列式表示的多重zeta值几何框架，并列出若干开放问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多重zeta值在数学物理中的深层几何结构，特别是与热带几何和费曼积分的关联。

idea_spark.risk: 非线性几何的数学结构可能过于复杂，导致实际计算困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从热带几何和二次型约化理论中获取灵感，可能发现多重zeta值的新对称性或恒等式。

papers.title: How the Hahn-Banach Theorem Sheds Bright Light on Fundamental Questions in Classical Thermodynamics
papers.summary: The Hahn-Banach Theorem, a cornerstone of modern functional analysis, is a natural companion of the Second Law of Thermodynamics. From a Kelvin-Planck version of the Second Law, the Hahn-Banach Theorem delivers, immediately and simultaneously, entropy and thermodynamic-temperature functions of the local material state such that the Clausius-Duhem inequality is satisfied for every process a particular material might admit. For \emph{existence} of such functions there is no need at all to require that their domain be restricted to states of equilibrium. However, the Hahn-Banach Theorem also indicates that for \emph{uniqueness} of such a pair of functions across the entire state-space domain, every state must be visited by a reversible process. This review is intended to help make accessible to both thermodynamics scholars and mathematicians the remarkable interplay of the Hahn-Banach Theorem and the Second Law.

ai.tldr: Hahn-Banach定理与热力学第二定律结合，直接导出熵和热力学温度函数，并满足Clausius-Duhem不等式，无需平衡态假设；唯一性要求所有状态可逆。
ai.motivation: 揭示Hahn-Banach定理如何为经典热力学的基本问题提供新的数学视角和严格基础。
ai.method: 从Kelvin-Planck版本的第二定律出发，应用Hahn-Banach定理构造熵和温度函数，并分析存在性与唯一性条件。
ai.result: 存在性无需平衡态限制，唯一性要求每个状态均可逆过程到达。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解泛函分析在热力学中的深刻应用，特别是熵和温度函数的数学基础。

en.tldr: The Hahn-Banach Theorem, combined with the Second Law of Thermodynamics, directly yields entropy and thermodynamic temperature functions satisfying the Clausius-Duhem inequality without requiring equilibrium; uniqueness demands that every state be reachable by a reversible process.
en.motivation: To reveal how the Hahn-Banach Theorem provides new mathematical insight and rigorous foundations for fundamental questions in classical thermodynamics.
en.method: Starting from the Kelvin-Planck version of the Second Law, the Hahn-Banach Theorem is applied to construct entropy and temperature functions, analyzing conditions for existence and uniqueness.
en.result: Existence does not require equilibrium; uniqueness requires every state to be visited by a reversible process.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the deep application of functional analysis in thermodynamics, especially the mathematical basis of entropy and temperature functions.

idea_spark.risk: The uniqueness condition (all states reversible) is difficult to satisfy in real materials, potentially limiting practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use functional analysis tools to unify various formulations of the Second Law of Thermodynamics.

papers.title: Long-Range Correlated Random Matrices
papers.summary: Motivated by the importance ascribed to correlations in random matrices used to model phenomena in various scientific disciplines, we report how algebraic correlations between matrix elements affect the eigenvalue statistics and spectral density of random matrices. These correlations, introduced through a long-range correlated percolation model, decay as a power law $\propto r^{-2H}$, with exponent $H > 0$. As $H$ varies, both the eigenvalue distribution and excess kurtosis undergo qualitative changes. At the threshold $H_c = 3/4$, characterized by emergent Gaussian statistics, a sign change in excess kurtosis marks a transition from a fat-tailed generalized $t$-distribution to one that gradually approaches the standard semicircle law for $H \gg H_c$. Our analytical results, based on scaling analysis and supported by extensive numerical simulations, provide clear predictions and uncover novel spectral regimes in random matrix theory. Our results connect techniques from statistical physics, percolation theory, and random matrix analysis, offering a new perspective on universality in correlated ensembles.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了长程相关随机矩阵中元素间的代数相关性如何影响特征值统计和谱密度，发现了以H=3/4为阈值的相变，并建立了广义t分布到半圆律的过渡。
ai.motivation: 随机矩阵在多个科学领域建模中广泛使用，但元素间相关性对谱性质的影响尚未被充分理解，特别是长程幂律相关的情形。
ai.method: 通过长程相关逾渗模型引入幂律衰减的相关性，结合标度分析和大规模数值模拟，推导并验证了特征值分布和超额峰度的解析结果。
ai.result: 在H=3/4处超额峰度变号，标志从肥尾广义t分布向半圆律的转变；标度分析给出了清晰的预测，并揭示了相关随机矩阵的新谱区域。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解长程相关随机矩阵的谱统计行为，为物理、金融等领域的相关建模提供理论指导。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计物理和逾渗理论中借鉴标度律，为随机矩阵的普适性分类提供了新视角。

en.tldr: This paper investigates how algebraic correlations between matrix elements affect eigenvalue statistics and spectral density in long-range correlated random matrices, revealing a transition at H=3/4 from a fat-tailed generalized t-distribution to the semicircle law.
en.motivation: Correlations in random matrices are important for modeling in many scientific fields, but the impact of long-range power-law correlations on spectral properties was not well understood.
en.method: Correlations are introduced via a long-range correlated percolation model with power-law decay ∝ r^{-2H}. Scaling analysis and extensive numerical simulations are used to derive and validate analytical results for eigenvalue distribution and excess kurtosis.
en.result: A sign change in excess kurtosis at H=3/4 marks a transition from a fat-tailed generalized t-distribution to the semicircle law for H≫H_c. Scaling analysis provides clear predictions and uncovers novel spectral regimes.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand spectral statistics of long-range correlated random matrices, offering theoretical guidance for modeling in physics, finance, and other fields.

idea_spark.idea: Use the sign change of excess kurtosis as a sensitive indicator for the emergence of Gaussian statistics in correlated random matrices.
idea_spark.risk: Analytical derivations rely on scaling assumptions and may not apply to non-power-law or short-range correlations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing scaling laws from statistical physics and percolation theory offers a new perspective on universality classification in random matrix ensembles.

papers.title: ReLIC-SGG: Relation Lattice Completion for Open-Vocabulary Scene Graph Generation
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary scene graph generation (SGG) aims to describe visual scenes with flexible relation phrases beyond a fixed predicate set. Existing methods usually treat annotated triplets as positives and all unannotated object-pair relations as negatives. However, scene graph annotations are inherently incomplete: many valid relations are missing, and the same interaction can be described at different granularities, e.g., \textit{on}, \textit{standing on}, \textit{resting on}, and \textit{supported by}. This issue becomes more severe in open-vocabulary SGG due to the much larger relation space. We propose \textbf{ReLIC-SGG}, a relation-incompleteness-aware framework that treats unannotated relations as latent variables rather than definite negatives. ReLIC-SGG builds a semantic relation lattice to model similarity, entailment, and contradiction among open-vocabulary predicates, and uses it to infer missing positive relations from visual-language compatibility, graph context, and semantic consistency. A positive-unlabeled graph learning objective further reduces false-negative supervision, while lattice-guided decoding produces compact and semantically consistent scene graphs. Experiments on conventional, open-vocabulary, and panoptic SGG benchmarks show that ReLIC-SGG improves rare and unseen predicate recognition and better recovers missing relations.

ai.tldr: 提出ReLIC-SGG框架，通过语义关系格和正-无标签学习处理开放词汇场景图生成中的关系不完整问题。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将未标注关系视为负例，但场景图标注天然不完整，开放词汇场景图生成中关系空间更大，导致大量有效关系被错误当作负例。
ai.method: 构建语义关系格建模谓词间的相似、蕴含和矛盾关系；将未标注关系视为隐变量，利用视觉-语言兼容性、图上下文和语义一致性推断缺失正关系；采用正-无标签图学习减少假负例监督；格引导解码生成紧凑一致的场景图。
ai.result: 在常规、开放词汇和全景场景图生成基准上，提升了稀有和未见谓词的识别，更好地恢复了缺失关系。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你需要处理标注不完整的关系预测任务，ReLIC-SGG的隐变量建模和关系格方法可借鉴。

idea_spark.idea: 将未标注关系视为隐变量，利用语义格推断缺失正例，减少假负例监督。
idea_spark.risk: 关系格构建依赖谓词语义知识，可能引入主观偏差；隐变量推断增加计算复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从标注不完整问题出发，将缺失关系建模为隐变量而非负例，启发其他弱监督场景。

en.tldr: Proposes ReLIC-SGG, a relation-incompleteness-aware framework using a semantic relation lattice and positive-unlabeled learning for open-vocabulary scene graph generation.
en.motivation: Existing methods treat unannotated relations as negatives, but scene graph annotations are inherently incomplete; the problem worsens in open-vocabulary SGG due to a larger relation space, causing many valid relations to be incorrectly treated as negatives.
en.method: Builds a semantic relation lattice modeling similarity, entailment, and contradiction among predicates; treats unannotated relations as latent variables inferred via visual-language compatibility, graph context, and semantic consistency; uses positive-unlabeled graph learning to reduce false-negative supervision; lattice-guided decoding produces compact and consistent scene graphs.
en.result: Improves rare and unseen predicate recognition and better recovers missing relations on conventional, open-vocabulary, and panoptic SGG benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: If you work on relation prediction with incomplete annotations, ReLIC-SGG's latent variable modeling and relation lattice approach can be adapted.

idea_spark.idea: Treat unannotated relations as latent variables and use a semantic lattice to infer missing positives, reducing false-negative supervision.
idea_spark.risk: Constructing the relation lattice relies on semantic knowledge of predicates, which may introduce bias; latent variable inference increases computational complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from annotation incompleteness, modeling missing relations as latent variables rather than negatives inspires other weakly supervised scenarios.

papers.title: A Vehicle Routing Problem for Human-Centered Electric Mobility
papers.summary: In this paper, we present the Electric Mobility Dial-a-Ride Problem (EM-DARP), which extends the Electric Vehicle Dial-a-Ride Problem (EV-DARP) to better accommodate human-focused mobility services. The problem involves utilizing a fleet of heterogeneous Electric Vehicles (EVs) to fulfill a set of customer requests with DARP and mobility-related specifications, while incorporating visits to charging stations amid requests. The problem is formulated as a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP) and subsequently solved for a number of curated evaluation scenarios to demonstrate its practical applicability.

ai.tldr: 提出了电动出行按需叫车问题（EM-DARP），扩展了电动车辆按需叫车问题，以更好地适应以人为中心的出行服务。
ai.motivation: 现有电动车辆按需叫车问题未充分考虑人类出行服务的特殊需求，如充电站访问与请求调度的整合。
ai.method: 将问题建模为混合整数线性规划（MILP），并针对多个精心设计的场景进行求解。
ai.result: 通过数值实验验证了模型在实际应用中的可行性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将电动车辆调度与充电规划结合，优化以人为中心的出行服务。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑动态充电价格或用户偏好，进一步优化调度策略。
idea_spark.risk: 大规模实例求解可能面临计算复杂度挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将人类行为因素（如等待时间容忍度）纳入电动出行调度模型。

en.tldr: Proposes the Electric Mobility Dial-a-Ride Problem (EM-DARP), extending the EV-DARP to better accommodate human-centered mobility services.
en.motivation: Existing EV dial-a-ride problems do not fully address human mobility service needs, such as integrating charging station visits with request scheduling.
en.method: Formulated as a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP) and solved for several curated evaluation scenarios.
en.result: Numerical experiments demonstrate the practical applicability of the model.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to combine electric vehicle scheduling with charging planning to optimize human-centered mobility services.

idea_spark.idea: Consider dynamic charging prices or user preferences to further optimize scheduling strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Large-scale instances may face computational complexity challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires incorporating human behavioral factors (e.g., waiting time tolerance) into electric mobility scheduling models.

papers.title: Strong solutions and stability for a thin-film equation of shear-thinning fluids with contact line in partial wetting
papers.summary: We consider a power-law thin-film equation for strongly shear-thinning fluids. Weak solutions to this equation have been constructed more than twenty years ago by Ansini and Giacomelli. Here, we pass over to analyzing strong solutions with nonzero contact angle (partial-wetting regime), and place emphasis on studying the behavior of solutions near points where the film height vanishes (the contact-line region) by considering perturbations of a linear profile. The leading-order equation in von-Mises coordinates shows similarities with the evolution equation for the $p$-Laplace, though being of fourth order. Using a time discretization, we reduce the leading-order problem to finding a variational solution, and pass to the limit in the discretization scheme on suitably estimating higher-order nonlinear terms in conjunction with compactness arguments. This proves existence and asymptotic stability of strong solutions that are perturbations of the linear profile, and yields control on the contact-line velocity on carefully tracking singular terms in our estimates. While we believe that the transformed equation shows mathematical features the analysis of which stands on its own merit, it also physically corroborates shear thinning behavior as an alternative in resolving the no-slip paradox, as opposed to more standard approaches like introducing slip at the liquid-solid interface.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了强剪切变稀流体的幂律薄膜方程，在部分润湿条件下证明了非零接触角强解的存在性和渐近稳定性，并分析了接触线附近的行为。
ai.motivation: 二十多年前已有弱解构造，但强解的存在性和稳定性尚未解决，且剪切变稀行为作为解决无滑移悖论的替代方案值得深入分析。
ai.method: 采用冯·米塞斯坐标将方程转化为类似p-拉普拉斯演化方程的四阶问题，通过时间离散化将问题简化为变分求解，并利用高阶非线性项估计和紧致性论证取极限。
ai.result: 证明了线性剖面扰动的强解存在性和渐近稳定性，通过仔细跟踪奇异项获得了接触线速度的控制。
ai.help_to_user: 为剪切变稀流体薄膜流动的数学分析提供了强解框架，有助于理解接触线动力学和解决无滑移悖论。

idea_spark.idea: 利用类似p-拉普拉斯的结构设计数值格式，或研究接触线速度与剪切变稀指数的定量关系。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶非线性项的估计可能依赖于特定幂律指数范围，推广需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将接触线奇异性处理为线性剖面扰动，启发其他自由边界问题中的正则化策略。
