idea_spark.risk: The synthetic benchmark DONUT may not fully capture real-world topological complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating persistence diagram generation as set prediction inspires other structured output prediction tasks.

papers.title: Improving Driver Drowsiness Detection via Personalized EAR/MAR Thresholds and CNN-Based Classification
papers.summary: Driver drowsiness is a major cause of traffic accidents worldwide, posing a serious threat to public safety. Vision-based driver monitoring systems often rely on fixed Eye Aspect Ratio (EAR) and Mouth Aspect Ratio (MAR) thresholds; however, such fixed values frequently fail to generalize across individuals due to variations in facial structure, illumination, and driving conditions. This paper proposes a personalized driver drowsiness detection system that monitors eyelid movements, head position, and yawning behavior in real time and provides warnings when signs of fatigue are detected. The system employs driver-specific EAR and MAR thresholds, calibrated before driving, to improve classical metric-based detection. In addition, deep learning-based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models are integrated to enhance accuracy in challenging scenarios. The system is evaluated using publicly available datasets as well as a custom dataset collected under diverse lighting conditions, head poses, and user characteristics. Experimental results show that personalized thresholding improves detection accuracy by 2-3% compared to fixed thresholds, while CNN-based classification achieves 99.1% accuracy for eye state detection and 98.8% for yawning detection, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining classical metrics with deep learning for robust real-time driver monitoring.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合个性化EAR/MAR阈值和CNN的驾驶员疲劳检测系统，在公开和自建数据集上眼状态检测准确率达99.1%，哈欠检测达98.8%。
ai.motivation: 固定EAR/MAR阈值因个体面部结构、光照等差异泛化性差，导致疲劳检测准确率下降。
ai.method: 驾驶前校准个性化EAR/MAR阈值，结合CNN模型进行眼状态和哈欠检测，并实时监测头部位置。
ai.result: 个性化阈值比固定阈值准确率提升2-3%；CNN眼状态检测准确率99.1%，哈欠检测98.8%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过个性化阈值和深度学习结合提升驾驶员疲劳检测的鲁棒性和准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将个性化EAR/MAR阈值与多模态传感器（如方向盘握力、车道偏移）融合，构建更全面的疲劳预警系统。
idea_spark.risk: 个性化校准增加使用前准备时间，可能影响用户体验；CNN模型在极端光照或遮挡下可能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴个性化医疗中阈值调整的思路，应用于人机交互中的状态感知。

en.tldr: Proposes a driver drowsiness detection system combining personalized EAR/MAR thresholds and CNN, achieving 99.1% accuracy for eye state and 98.8% for yawning on public and custom datasets.
en.motivation: Fixed EAR/MAR thresholds generalize poorly across individuals due to variations in facial structure, illumination, and driving conditions.
en.method: Calibrates driver-specific EAR/MAR thresholds before driving, integrates CNN models for eye state and yawning detection, and monitors head position in real time.
en.result: Personalized thresholds improve accuracy by 2-3% over fixed thresholds; CNN achieves 99.1% for eye state and 98.8% for yawning detection.
en.help_to_user: Illustrates how combining personalized thresholds with deep learning enhances robustness and accuracy in driver drowsiness detection.

idea_spark.risk: Personalized calibration adds pre-driving setup time, potentially affecting user experience; CNN may degrade under extreme lighting or occlusion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from personalized medicine's threshold adjustment for state sensing in human-computer interaction.

papers.title: A Non-Invasive Alternative to RFID: Self-Sufficient 3D Identification of Group-Housed Livestock
papers.summary: Accurate identification of individual farm animals in group-housed environments is a cornerstone of precision livestock management. However, current industry standards rely heavily on Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) ear tags, which are invasive, prone to loss, and restricted by the spatial limitations of antenna fields. In this paper, we propose a non-intrusive, vision-based identification system leveraging 3D point cloud data captured within a commercial electronic feeding station (EFS). Departing from traditional supervised frame-level inference, we introduce the Temporal Adaptive Recognition Architecture (TARA), a self-sufficient, semi-supervised framework designed to maintain identity consistency over time. TARA employs a dynamic recalibration mechanism that updates individual identity profiles to account for morphological changes in the livestock. To facilitate training in label-scarce environments, we utilize a visit-level majority voting strategy to generate high-fidelity pseudo-labels from raw temporal sequences. Experimental results on a group housed sow dataset collected from an operational commercial barn demonstrate that our approach achieves 100% identification accuracy at the visit level. These results suggest that vision-based 3D point cloud analysis offers a robust, superior alternative to RFID-based systems, paving the way for fully autonomous individual animal monitoring.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于3D点云的非侵入式个体识别系统，替代RFID耳标，在群养母猪中实现100%的访问级识别准确率。
ai.motivation: RFID耳标有创、易丢失且受天线场限制，需要一种非侵入、自给自足的替代方案。
ai.method: 提出TARA框架，采用半监督学习、动态重校准机制和访问级多数投票生成伪标签，利用电子饲喂站内的3D点云数据。
ai.result: 在商业猪场群养母猪数据集上，访问级识别准确率达到100%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标签、非侵入的个体识别方法，可用于精准畜牧管理。

idea_spark.idea: 结合动态重校准和伪标签策略，可进一步扩展到多模态数据（如RGB+深度）或实时边缘部署。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖电子饲喂站的空间约束，可能不适用于开放牧场；形态变化剧烈时重校准可能失败。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用日常设备（如饲喂站）作为数据采集点，将被动监控转化为主动识别系统。

en.tldr: Proposes a non-invasive 3D point cloud-based identification system to replace RFID ear tags, achieving 100% visit-level accuracy on group-housed sows.
en.motivation: RFID ear tags are invasive, prone to loss, and limited by antenna fields, necessitating a non-invasive, self-sufficient alternative.
en.method: Introduces TARA, a semi-supervised framework with dynamic recalibration and visit-level majority voting for pseudo-label generation, using 3D point clouds from an electronic feeding station.
en.result: Achieves 100% identification accuracy at the visit level on a commercial sow dataset.
en.help_to_user: Provides a tag-free, non-invasive identification method for precision livestock management.

idea_spark.idea: Combining dynamic recalibration and pseudo-labeling could be extended to multimodal data (e.g., RGB+depth) or real-time edge deployment.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on spatial constraints of the feeding station, may not suit open pastures; recalibration may fail under rapid morphological changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging everyday equipment (e.g., feeding stations) as data collection points transforms passive monitoring into active identification systems.

papers.title: EvFlow-GS: Event Enhanced Motion Deblurring with Optical Flow for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: Achieving sharp 3D reconstruction from motion-blurred images alone becomes challenging, motivating recent methods to incorporate event cameras, benefiting from microsecond temporal resolution. However, they suffer from residual artifacts and blurry texture details due to misleading supervision from inaccurate event double integral priors and noisy, blurry events. In this study, we propose EvFlow-GS, a unified framework that leverages event streams and optical flow to optimize an end-to-end learnable double integral (LDI), camera poses, and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) jointly on-the-fly. Specifically, we first extract edge information from the events using optical flow and then formulate a novel event-based loss applied separately to different modules. Additionally, we exploit a novel event-residual prior to strengthen the supervision of intensity changes between images rendered from 3DGS. Finally, we integrate the outputs of both 3DGS and LDI into a joint loss, enabling their optimization to mutually facilitate each other. Experiments demonstrate the leading performance of our EvFlow-GS.

ai.tldr: 提出EvFlow-GS框架，联合事件流与光流优化可学习双积分、相机位姿和3D高斯泼溅，实现从运动模糊图像中重建锐利3D场景。
ai.motivation: 现有方法因事件双积分先验不准确和事件噪声导致伪影和纹理模糊，需要更鲁棒的联合优化方案。
ai.method: 利用光流从事件中提取边缘信息，设计基于事件的损失分别应用于不同模块；引入事件残差先验增强3DGS渲染图像间的强度变化监督；将3DGS与LDI输出整合为联合损失，相互促进优化。
ai.result: 实验表明EvFlow-GS在运动模糊图像3D重建任务上达到领先性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从运动模糊图像中重建清晰3D场景，适用于动态场景或手持相机拍摄。

idea_spark.idea: 将事件流与光流结合，通过可学习双积分和事件残差先验增强监督，实现端到端联合优化。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量事件数据，低光照或高速运动下事件噪声可能影响性能；联合优化计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受事件相机高时间分辨率特性启发，利用光流提取边缘信息以弥补事件噪声缺陷。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量事件数据，低光照或高速运动下事件噪声可能影响性能；联合优化计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受事件相机高时间分辨率特性启发，利用光流提取边缘信息以弥补事件噪声缺陷。

en.tldr: Proposes EvFlow-GS, a unified framework that jointly optimizes learnable double integral, camera poses, and 3D Gaussian Splatting using event streams and optical flow for sharp 3D reconstruction from motion-blurred images.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from artifacts and blurry textures due to inaccurate event double integral priors and noisy events, requiring a more robust joint optimization approach.
en.method: Extracts edge information from events via optical flow, designs event-based losses for different modules, introduces an event-residual prior to strengthen intensity change supervision, and integrates outputs of 3DGS and LDI into a joint loss for mutual facilitation.
en.result: Experiments demonstrate leading performance on 3D reconstruction from motion-blurred images.
en.help_to_user: Enables sharp 3D scene reconstruction from motion-blurred images, useful for dynamic scenes or handheld camera capture.

idea_spark.idea: Combines event streams with optical flow, using learnable double integral and event-residual prior to enhance supervision for end-to-end joint optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality event data; event noise under low light or high-speed motion may degrade performance; joint optimization incurs high computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the high temporal resolution of event cameras, uses optical flow to extract edge information to compensate for event noise.

papers.title: Fundamental Theorems on Controllability in Wave-domain Processing for Holographic MIMO
papers.summary: Wave-domain processing is an emerging paradigm where signal processing operations are partially shifted from the digital to the electromagnetic (EM) domain. Leveraging reconfigurable EM devices, this approach aims to reduce complexity, energy consumption, and latency in next-generation wireless systems employing holographic MIMO. This paper establishes fundamental theorems on the controllability of generic reconfigurable EM devices, where wave processing is achieved through the dynamic configuration of passive scatterers. Specifically, we derive necessary and sufficient conditions for controllability as a function of geometry and mutual coupling between elements. Finally, we provide a detailed discussion and numerical results characterizing the interplay between the number of elements, physical size, degrees of freedom, and directivity.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了全息MIMO中波域处理可控性的基本定理，给出了可重构电磁设备可控性的充要条件，并分析了元件数、物理尺寸、自由度和方向性之间的关系。
ai.motivation: 降低下一代无线通信系统的复杂度、能耗和延迟，通过将信号处理从数字域部分转移到电磁域。
ai.method: 推导了基于几何结构和元件间互耦的可控性充要条件，并通过数值结果进行验证。
ai.result: 明确了可控性条件，揭示了元件数、尺寸、自由度和方向性之间的相互影响。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解全息MIMO系统中波域处理的理论基础，为设计可重构电磁设备提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可控性定理优化天线阵列布局，以在有限尺寸下最大化自由度。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设可能与实际硬件限制（如调谐精度）存在差距。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将波域处理与机器学习结合，实现自适应波束赋形。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可控性定理优化天线阵列布局，以在有限尺寸下最大化自由度。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设可能与实际硬件限制（如调谐精度）存在差距。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将波域处理与机器学习结合，实现自适应波束赋形。

en.tldr: This paper establishes fundamental theorems on controllability in wave-domain processing for holographic MIMO, deriving necessary and sufficient conditions based on geometry and mutual coupling, and characterizing the interplay among element count, physical size, degrees of freedom, and directivity.
en.motivation: To reduce complexity, energy consumption, and latency in next-generation wireless systems by shifting signal processing from the digital to the electromagnetic domain.
en.method: Derivation of necessary and sufficient controllability conditions as functions of geometry and mutual coupling, supported by numerical results.
en.result: Controllability conditions are clarified, revealing trade-offs between element count, size, degrees of freedom, and directivity.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundations for wave-domain processing in holographic MIMO, guiding the design of reconfigurable EM devices.

idea_spark.idea: Optimize antenna array layout using controllability theorems to maximize degrees of freedom under size constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions may deviate from practical hardware limitations such as tuning precision.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine wave-domain processing with machine learning for adaptive beamforming.

papers.title: Carrollian quantum states and flat space holography
papers.summary: We study free Carrollian quantum field theories from an algebraic perspective and explore their implications for flat space holography. As explicit examples, we construct the electric and magnetic Carrollian Weyl algebras obtained from Carroll limits of the relativistic scalar field and analyze their states, including vacuum and thermal configurations. For the massive electric theory, we find a regular Carroll-invariant vacuum state and a regular KMS state, yielding a consistent Carrollian thermodynamic system. By contrast, the massless electric and magnetic theories are more subtle: depending on the quantization, they admit either no regular distinguished vacuum or only nonregular Carroll-invariant ground states, while still supporting nonregular thermal states. We further analyze alternative classes of states in the massless electric theory, including spatially homogeneous quasifree pure states and Sorkin--Johnston states.Motivated by these results, we discuss consequences for flat space holography. We construct a well-defined quasifree state relevant for Carrollian holography whose Hilbert-space representation factorizes into a standard Fock sector and a nonseparable zero-mode sector, thereby highlighting the role of infrared degrees of freedom in the boundary theory.

ai.tldr: 从代数角度研究自由Carrollian量子场论，探讨其在平空间全息中的意义。
ai.motivation: 理解Carrollian量子态的结构及其与平空间全息的关系。
ai.method: 构造电型和磁型Carrollian Weyl代数，分析真空态、热态等各类态。
ai.result: 有质量电理论存在正则Carroll不变真空和KMS态；无质量理论中正则真空缺失或非正则，但存在非正则热态；构造了适用于Carrollian全息的准自由态，其Hilbert空间分解为Fock扇区和不可分零模扇区。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了Carrollian量子场论中态的分类和构造方法，有助于平空间全息边界理论的红外自由度研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用零模扇区处理边界理论中的红外发散。
idea_spark.risk: 零模扇区的非可分性可能导致量子场论中标准可观测量的定义困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Carrollian全息出发，或许能构造出更一般的平空间全息对偶框架。

en.tldr: We study free Carrollian quantum field theories from an algebraic perspective and explore their implications for flat space holography.
en.motivation: To understand the structure of Carrollian quantum states and their role in flat space holography.
en.method: Construct electric and magnetic Carrollian Weyl algebras, analyze vacuum, thermal, and other states.
en.result: Massive electric theory admits a regular Carroll-invariant vacuum and KMS state; massless theories lack regular distinguished vacua but support nonregular thermal states; a quasifree state relevant for Carrollian holography is constructed with a Hilbert space factorizing into a Fock sector and a nonseparable zero-mode sector.
en.help_to_user: Provides classification and construction of states in Carrollian QFT, aiding study of infrared degrees of freedom in flat space holographic boundary theories.

idea_spark.idea: Use the zero-mode sector to handle infrared divergences in boundary theories.
idea_spark.risk: Nonseparability of the zero-mode sector may complicate definition of standard observables in QFT.
idea_spark.inspiration: Carrollian holography may lead to a more general framework for flat space holographic dualities.

papers.title: Robust Camera-to-Mocap Calibration and Verification for Large-Scale Multi-Camera Data Capture
papers.summary: Optical motion capture (mocap) systems are widely used for ground-truth capture in AR/VR, SLAM and robotics datasets. These datasets require extrinsic calibration to align mocap coordinates to external camera frames -- a step that is subject to multiple sources of error in practice, and failures often go undetected until they corrupt downstream data. These issues are compounded for fisheye cameras, where spatially non-uniform distortion makes both calibration and verification more challenging. We present a calibration and verification system designed for this setting. Concretely, we target robustness to board-to-marker attachment variation, optimization initialization ambiguity, and session-to-session calibration drift after deployment. The calibration jointly estimates camera extrinsics and the board-to-marker transform, and uses a staged solver to improve convergence reliability under ambiguous initialization. The verification component, \lollypop, provides fast, operator-independent assessment through a measurement chain entirely independent of the calibration data. In experiments on a Meta Quest 3 headset with fisheye cameras, our calibration outperforms existing benchwork, and lollypop reliably detects calibration degradation over time. The system has been deployed in production data collection pipelines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒的相机与动捕系统外参标定及验证方法，解决大场景多相机数据采集中的标定误差和退化检测问题。
ai.motivation: 光学动捕系统广泛用于AR/VR、SLAM和机器人数据集的地面真值采集，但相机与动捕坐标系的标定易受多种误差影响，且故障常在下游数据中才被发现，尤其鱼眼相机的非线性畸变使标定和验证更加困难。
ai.method: 联合估计相机外参和标定板到标记点的变换，采用分阶段求解器提高初始化模糊时的收敛可靠性；验证组件Lollypop通过独立于标定数据的测量链实现快速、无需操作员的评估。
ai.result: 在Meta Quest 3头显的鱼眼相机实验中，标定精度优于现有基准方法，Lollypop能可靠检测标定随时间退化。系统已部署到生产数据采集流水线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解大规模多相机数据采集中标定误差的来源，并提供一种可部署的鲁棒标定与验证方案。

idea_spark.idea: 设计独立于标定数据的验证链，避免标定误差被下游任务掩盖，可推广至任何需要定期验证的传感器系统。
idea_spark.risk: 验证组件依赖的测量链可能引入新的硬件或操作约束，需评估其通用性和部署成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“标定后验证”转向“持续验证”的思路，启发在传感器退化检测中引入独立监控模块。

en.tldr: A robust calibration and verification system for camera-to-mocap extrinsic alignment, addressing errors and degradation in large-scale multi-camera data capture.
en.motivation: Optical motion capture is widely used for ground truth in AR/VR, SLAM, and robotics, but extrinsic calibration between cameras and mocap is error-prone, especially for fisheye cameras with non-uniform distortion, and failures often go undetected until corrupting downstream data.
en.method: Jointly estimates camera extrinsics and board-to-marker transform using a staged solver for robust convergence under ambiguous initialization; verification component Lollypop provides fast, operator-independent assessment via a measurement chain independent of calibration data.
en.result: On Meta Quest 3 fisheye cameras, calibration outperforms existing benchwork, and Lollypop reliably detects calibration degradation over time. The system is deployed in production pipelines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand sources of calibration error in large-scale multi-camera setups and provides a deployable robust calibration and verification solution.

idea_spark.idea: Design a verification chain independent of calibration data to prevent calibration errors from being masked by downstream tasks; generalizable to any sensor system requiring periodic verification.
idea_spark.risk: The verification chain may introduce new hardware or operational constraints; its generality and deployment cost need assessment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shift from 'post-calibration verification' to 'continuous verification' inspires adding independent monitoring modules for sensor degradation detection.

papers.title: Identifying and typifying demographic unfairness in phoneme-level embeddings of self-supervised speech recognition models
papers.summary: Modern automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems have been observed to function better for certain speaker groups (SGs) than others, despite recent gains in overall performance. One potential impediment to progress towards fairer ASR is a more nuanced understanding of the types of modeling errors that speech encoder models make, and in particular the difference between the structure of embeddings for high-performance and low-performance SGs. This paper proposes a framework typifying two types of error that can occur in modeling phonemes in ASR systems: random error/high variance in phoneme embedding, vs systematic error/embedding bias. We find that training phoneme classification probes only on a single, typically disadvantaged SG, sometimes improves performance for that SG, which is evidence for the existence of SG-level bias in phoneme embeddings. On the other hand, we find that speakers and SGs with higher levels of phoneme variance are the same as those with worse phoneme prediction accuracy. We conclude that both types of error are present in phoneme embeddings and both are candidate causes for SG-level unfairness in ASR, though random error is likely a greater hindrance to fairness than systematic error. Furthermore, we find that finetuning encoder models using a fairness-enhancing algorithm (domain enhancing and adversarial training) changes neither the benefits of in-domain phoneme classification probe training, nor measured levels of random embedding error.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一个框架，将ASR系统中音素嵌入的不公平性分为随机误差和系统误差，并发现两种误差均存在，随机误差对公平性影响更大。
ai.motivation: 现有ASR系统对不同说话人群表现不均，但缺乏对嵌入层误差类型的细致理解。
ai.method: 训练仅针对单一弱势说话人群的音素分类探针，并比较嵌入方差与预测准确率；同时测试公平性增强微调算法的影响。
ai.result: 弱势人群的探针训练有时提升其性能，表明存在系统偏差；方差高的人群预测准确率低，随机误差是更大障碍；公平性算法未改变误差模式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解ASR不公平性的根源，区分随机与系统误差，指导公平性改进方向。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种自适应正则化方法，针对高方差说话人群降低嵌入随机性，可能比现有公平性算法更有效。
idea_spark.risk: 过度降低方差可能抑制模型对合法变异的捕捉，导致泛化能力下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从语音识别中的方差-偏差权衡，联想到其他领域（如推荐系统）中用户群体公平性的类似分解。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a framework to typify demographic unfairness in ASR phoneme embeddings into random error and systematic error, finding both present but random error more detrimental.
en.motivation: ASR systems perform unevenly across speaker groups, yet a nuanced understanding of embedding-level error types is lacking.
en.method: Train phoneme classification probes on single disadvantaged speaker groups, compare embedding variance with prediction accuracy, and test fairness-enhancing fine-tuning algorithms.
en.result: Probe training on disadvantaged groups sometimes improves their performance, indicating systematic bias; groups with higher variance have worse accuracy, random error is a larger obstacle; fairness algorithms do not alter error patterns.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the root causes of ASR unfairness by distinguishing random vs systematic errors, guiding fairness improvement strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive regularization method to reduce embedding randomness for high-variance speaker groups, potentially more effective than existing fairness algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Excessive variance reduction may suppress legitimate variability, harming generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The variance-bias trade-off in speech recognition inspires similar decomposition for fairness in other domains like recommendation systems.

papers.title: MTT-Bench: Predicting Social Dominance in Mice via Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.summary: Understanding social dominance in animal behavior is critical for neuroscience and behavioral studies. In this work, we explore the capability of Multimodal Large Language Models(MLLMs) to analyze raw behavioral video of mice and predict their dominance hierarchy. We introduce MTT-Bench, a novel benchmark comprising annotated videos of pairwise mouse interactions for Mouse Tube Test analysis. Building on existing MLLM architectures, we fine-tune these models to perform zero-shot inference on unseen behavioral sequences, predicting social dominance without explicit labels during testing. Our framework demonstrates promising results, showing high agreement with tube test rankings. This work opens a new direction for applying foundation models to ethology and social behavior analysis, without the need to design domain-specific models.

ai.tldr: 提出MTT-Bench基准，利用多模态大语言模型从原始行为视频预测小鼠社会支配等级，无需领域特定模型。
ai.motivation: 理解动物社会支配对神经科学和行为研究至关重要，现有方法依赖人工标注或领域特定模型，缺乏通用性。
ai.method: 构建包含标注小鼠配对交互视频的MTT-Bench基准，微调多模态大语言模型进行零样本推理，预测社会支配等级。
ai.result: 模型预测与管测试排名高度一致，展示了基础模型在动物行为学中的潜力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需领域特定模型即可自动分析动物社会行为的新方法，可应用于行为学研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用多模态大语言模型从原始视频中直接学习社会信号，避免手工特征设计。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能过度拟合特定实验设置（如管测试），泛化到自然社交场景需更多验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将基础模型应用于动物行为学，开启非侵入式、自动化的社会等级评估新方向。

en.tldr: Introduces MTT-Bench, a benchmark using multimodal large language models to predict social dominance in mice from raw behavioral videos without domain-specific models.
en.motivation: Understanding animal social dominance is critical for neuroscience and behavioral studies; existing methods rely on manual annotation or domain-specific models, lacking generality.
en.method: Constructs MTT-Bench with annotated videos of pairwise mouse interactions, fine-tunes multimodal large language models for zero-shot inference to predict dominance hierarchy.
en.result: Model predictions show high agreement with tube test rankings, demonstrating the potential of foundation models in ethology.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new method for automated analysis of animal social behavior without domain-specific models, applicable to behavioral research.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage multimodal large language models to directly learn social signals from raw videos, avoiding handcrafted feature design.
idea_spark.risk: Models may overfit specific experimental setups (e.g., tube test); generalization to natural social scenarios requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying foundation models to ethology opens a new direction for non-invasive, automated social hierarchy assessment.

papers.title: Enhanced Soliton Stability in Bi-directionally Coupled Laser-Microresonator Systems
papers.summary: We investigate a bi-directionally coupled system consisting of a Kerr-nonlinear microresonator and a continuous-wave single-mode semiconductor laser. Inside the resonator, a forward-propagating and a backscattered field interact nonlinearly, while a fraction of the backscattered field is fed back into the laser cavity. We show in this paper that the interaction of the laser with the feedback opens up new ways of stabilizing $1$-solitons. Using numerical bifurcation analysis, we systematically identify existence ranges of time-harmonic 1-soliton states in the anomalous dispersion regime. We demonstrate that, in contrast to the uni-directional configuration, the bi-directional coupling introduces a dynamic self-correcting response of the laser frequency that stabilizes $1$-solitons. These enhanced stability properties of $1$-solitons thus enable robust and self-started frequency-comb generation, consistent with the existing experimental observations.

ai.tldr: 研究了双向耦合激光-微谐振器系统中孤子的稳定性增强机制。
ai.motivation: 传统单向耦合系统中孤子稳定性有限，需要探索新的稳定化途径。
ai.method: 通过数值分岔分析，在反常色散区域系统识别时间谐波1-孤子的存在范围。
ai.result: 双向耦合引入激光频率的动态自校正响应，显著增强1-孤子稳定性，实现鲁棒自启动频率梳生成。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计自启动、高稳定的微谐振器频率梳提供理论依据和参数指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用激光腔反馈动态调节频率，替代外部主动控制实现孤子自稳定。
idea_spark.risk: 实验实现中反馈相位和耦合强度的精确控制可能具有挑战性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴激光器注入锁定或光反馈动力学，设计新型自稳定孤子源。

en.motivation: Unidirectional configurations offer limited soliton stability; new stabilization pathways are needed.
en.method: Used numerical bifurcation analysis to systematically identify existence ranges of time-harmonic 1-soliton states in the anomalous dispersion regime.
en.result: Bi-directional coupling introduces a dynamic self-correcting response of the laser frequency, significantly stabilizing 1-solitons and enabling robust self-started frequency-comb generation.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical basis and parameter guidance for designing self-starting, highly stable microresonator frequency combs.

idea_spark.idea: Use laser cavity feedback to dynamically adjust frequency, replacing external active control for soliton self-stabilization.
idea_spark.risk: Precise control of feedback phase and coupling strength may be challenging in experiments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from laser injection locking or optical feedback dynamics to design novel self-stabilized soliton sources.

papers.title: Gamma-Distributed Geometric Constellation for ISAC: Design and Analysis
papers.summary: A novel Gamma-distributed geometric constellation design framework for integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) is proposed in this paper. In this framework, constellation points are modeled as samples drawn from a parameterized two-dimensional distribution, with a Gamma distribution for the amplitude and a uniform distribution for the phase. End-task performance metrics, namely, the probability of detection for sensing and mutual information for communication, are used as objective functions of the optimization problem, and the problem is solved via particle swarm optimization. We further derive analytical performance bounds for the proposed design, including the union bound on the symbol error rate for communication and the Cramer--Rao bound for sensing parameter estimation. The proposed method is compared with constellations obtained via end-to-end neural network design, demonstrating competitive performance while requiring significantly fewer parameters and no training data. Moreover, the proposed geometric constellation is more compatible with conventional system architectures than probabilistic or neural network-based designs.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Gamma分布幅度的几何星座设计框架，用于集成感知与通信（ISAC），通过粒子群优化检测概率和互信息，性能优于神经网络方法且参数更少。
ai.motivation: 现有星座设计（如概率或神经网络方法）与常规系统架构兼容性差，且需要大量训练数据或参数。

ai.result: 推导了符号错误率的联合界和感知参数估计的Cramer-Rao界；与端到端神经网络设计相比，性能相当但参数更少且无需训练数据。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、兼容性强的ISAC星座设计方法，可降低系统复杂度并提升性能。

idea_spark.risk: Gamma分布假设可能不适用于所有信道环境，需验证鲁棒性。

en.tldr: A Gamma-distributed geometric constellation framework for ISAC is proposed, optimized via particle swarm optimization for detection probability and mutual information, outperforming neural network designs with fewer parameters.

papers.title: Tell Me Why: Designing an Explainable LLM-based Dialogue System for Student Problem Behavior Diagnosis
papers.summary: Diagnosing student problem behaviors requires teachers to synthesize multifaceted information, identify behavioral categories, and plan intervention strategies. Although fine-tuned large language models (LLMs) can support this process through multi-turn dialogue, they rarely explain why a strategy is recommended, limiting transparency and teachers' trust. To address this issue, we present an explainable dialogue system built on a fine-tuned LLM. The system uses a hierarchical attribution method based on explainable AI (xAI) to identify dialogue evidence for each recommendation and generate a natural-language explanation based on that evidence. In technical evaluation, the method outperformed baseline approaches in identifying supporting evidence. In a preliminary user study with 22 pre-service teachers, participants who received explanations reported higher trust in the system. These findings suggest a promising direction for improving LLM explainability in educational dialogue systems.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于可解释大语言模型的对话系统，用于诊断学生问题行为，并通过层级归因方法生成自然语言解释，提升教师信任。
ai.motivation: 教师诊断学生问题行为需要综合多源信息，但现有大语言模型对话系统缺乏对推荐策略的解释，限制了透明度和教师信任。
ai.method: 构建基于微调大语言模型的可解释对话系统，采用可解释AI的层级归因方法识别对话证据，并据此生成自然语言解释。
ai.result: 技术评估中该方法在识别支持证据上优于基线；22名职前教师的初步用户研究表明，收到解释的参与者对系统信任度更高。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助教师理解系统推荐策略的依据，增强对诊断结果的信任，从而更有效地干预学生问题行为。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴可解释AI在教育领域的应用，设计更透明的智能辅导系统。

en.tldr: Proposes an explainable LLM-based dialogue system for diagnosing student problem behaviors, using hierarchical attribution to generate natural-language explanations and improve teacher trust.
en.motivation: Teachers need to synthesize multifaceted information to diagnose student problem behaviors, but existing LLM dialogue systems lack explanations for recommended strategies, limiting transparency and trust.
en.method: Builds an explainable dialogue system on a fine-tuned LLM, employing a hierarchical attribution method from xAI to identify dialogue evidence and generate natural-language explanations.

idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage xAI in education to design more transparent intelligent tutoring systems.

papers.title: MolClaw: An Autonomous Agent with Hierarchical Skills for Drug Molecule Evaluation, Screening, and Optimization
papers.summary: Computational drug discovery, particularly the complex workflows of drug molecule screening and optimization, requires orchestrating dozens of specialized tools in multi-step workflows, yet current AI agents struggle to maintain robust performance and consistently underperform in these high-complexity scenarios. Here we present MolClaw, an autonomous agent that leads drug molecule evaluation, screening, and optimization. It unifies over 30 specialized domain resources through a three-tier hierarchical skill architecture (70 skills in total) that facilitates agent long-term interaction at runtime: tool-level skills standardize atomic operations, workflow-level skills compose them into validated pipelines with quality check and reflection, and a discipline-level skill supplies scientific principles governing planning and verification across all scenarios in the field. Additionally, we introduce MolBench, a benchmark comprising molecular screening, optimization, and end-to-end discovery challenges spanning 8 to 50+ sequential tool calls. MolClaw achieves state-of-the-art performance across all metrics, and ablation studies confirm that gains concentrate on tasks that demand structured workflows while vanishing on those solvable with ad hoc scripting, establishing workflow orchestration competence as the primary capability bottleneck for AI-driven drug discovery.

ai.tldr: MolClaw是一个自主智能体，通过三层技能架构（工具级、工作流级、学科级）统一30多个专业资源，在药物分子评估、筛选和优化任务上达到最优性能，并引入MolBench基准测试。
ai.motivation: 当前AI智能体在复杂的多步骤药物分子筛选与优化工作流中表现不稳定，缺乏鲁棒性，亟需一种能有效编排数十种专业工具的方法。
ai.method: 提出三层层次化技能架构：工具级技能标准化原子操作，工作流级技能组合成带质量检查和反思的验证管线，学科级技能提供科学原理指导规划与验证。
ai.result: MolClaw在所有指标上达到最优，消融实验表明性能提升集中在需要结构化工作流的任务上，而简单脚本可解的任务上提升消失。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助药物研发人员自动化执行分子筛选、优化和端到端发现流程，减少手动编排工具的负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将学科级技能进一步扩展为可学习的科学知识图谱，使智能体能动态调整规划策略。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预定义技能库，可能难以应对全新或未预见的工具组合需求。

papers.title: Video Analysis and Generation via a Semantic Progress Function
papers.summary: Transformations produced by image and video generation models often evolve in a highly non-linear manner: long stretches where the content barely changes are followed by sudden, abrupt semantic jumps. To analyze and correct this behavior, we introduce a Semantic Progress Function, a one-dimensional representation that captures how the meaning of a given sequence evolves over time. For each frame, we compute distances between semantic embeddings and fit a smooth curve that reflects the cumulative semantic shift across the sequence. Departures of this curve from a straight line reveal uneven semantic pacing. Building on this insight, we propose a semantic linearization procedure that reparameterizes (or retimes) the sequence so that semantic change unfolds at a constant rate, yielding smoother and more coherent transitions. Beyond linearization, our framework provides a model-agnostic foundation for identifying temporal irregularities, comparing semantic pacing across different generators, and steering both generated and real-world video sequences toward arbitrary target pacing.

ai.tldr: 提出语义进度函数，用于分析和修正图像/视频生成中语义变化不均匀的问题，并通过语义线性化实现平滑过渡。
ai.motivation: 现有生成模型产生的变换在语义上高度非线性，长时间内容不变后突然跳跃，导致不连贯。
ai.method: 计算帧间语义嵌入距离，拟合一维曲线表示累积语义变化，通过线性化重参数化序列使语义匀速变化。
ai.result: 实现更平滑连贯的过渡，可识别时间不规则性、比较不同生成器的语义节奏，并引导序列达到任意目标节奏。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解生成模型中的语义变化规律，并自动优化视频或图像序列的语义流畅性。

idea_spark.idea: 将语义进度函数应用于视频编辑，允许用户指定语义变化曲线来精确控制叙事节奏。
idea_spark.risk: 语义嵌入的选取可能影响函数准确性，不同任务需调整距离度量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非线性动力学中借用“进度函数”概念，将生成过程视为可重参数化的轨迹。

en.tldr: Introduces a Semantic Progress Function to analyze and correct non-linear semantic changes in image/video generation, achieving smoother transitions via semantic linearization.
en.motivation: Transformations by generative models are highly non-linear, with long static periods followed by abrupt semantic jumps, causing incoherence.
en.method: Computes distances between semantic embeddings per frame, fits a smooth curve for cumulative semantic shift, and reparameterizes the sequence for constant semantic rate.
en.result: Yields smoother and more coherent transitions, identifies temporal irregularities, compares pacing across generators, and steers sequences to target pacing.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand semantic pacing in generative models and automatically optimize semantic fluency of video or image sequences.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the Semantic Progress Function to video editing, allowing users to specify semantic change curves for precise narrative control.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of semantic embeddings may affect accuracy; distance metrics need tuning per task.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows the concept of a 'progress function' from nonlinear dynamics, treating generation as a reparameterizable trajectory.

papers.title: QDTraj: Exploration of Diverse Trajectory Primitives for Articulated Objects Robotic Manipulation
papers.summary: Thanks to the latest advances in learning and robotics, domestic robots are beginning to enter homes, aiming to execute household chores autonomously. However, robots still struggle to perform autonomous manipulation tasks in open-ended environments. In this context, this paper presents a method that enables a robot to manipulate a wide spectrum of articulated objects.   In this paper, we automatically generate different robot low-level trajectory primitives to manipulate given object articulations. A very important point when it comes to generating expert trajectories is to consider the diversity of solutions to achieve the same goal. Indeed, knowing diverse low-level primitives to accomplish the same task enables the robot to choose the optimal solution in its real-world environment, with live constraints and unexpected changes. To do so, we propose a method based on Quality-Diversity algorithms that leverages sparse reward exploration in order to generate a set of diverse and high-performing trajectory primitives for a given manipulation task.   We validated our method, QDTraj, by generating diverse trajectories in simulation and deploying them in the real world. QDTraj generates at least 5 times more diverse trajectories for both hinge and slider activation tasks, outperforming the other methods we compared against. We assessed the generalization of our method over 30 articulations of the PartNetMobility articulated object dataset, with an average of 704 different trajectories by task. Code is publicly available at: https://kappel.web.isir.upmc.fr/trajectory_primitive_website

ai.tldr: 提出QDTraj方法，利用质量-多样性算法生成多样且高性能的轨迹基元，使机器人能灵活操作多种铰接物体。
ai.motivation: 家庭机器人在开放环境中自主操作铰接物体仍面临挑战，现有方法缺乏对任务解决方案多样性的考虑。
ai.method: 基于质量-多样性算法，通过稀疏奖励探索生成一组多样且高性能的轨迹基元。

ai.help_to_user: 帮助机器人操作铰接物体时拥有多种备选轨迹，从而适应真实环境中的实时约束和意外变化。

idea_spark.risk: 在复杂真实环境中，生成的轨迹可能因物理差异而失效，需进一步验证鲁棒性。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物运动多样性启发，机器人应储备多种动作方案以应对环境变化。

en.tldr: Proposes QDTraj, a method using Quality-Diversity algorithms to generate diverse and high-performing trajectory primitives, enabling robots to flexibly manipulate a wide range of articulated objects.
en.motivation: Domestic robots struggle with autonomous manipulation of articulated objects in open-ended environments; existing methods lack consideration of solution diversity.
en.method: Leverages Quality-Diversity algorithms with sparse reward exploration to generate a set of diverse and high-performing trajectory primitives for a given manipulation task.
en.result: QDTraj generates at least 5 times more diverse trajectories for hinge and slider activation tasks, averaging 704 different trajectories per task over 30 articulations from PartNetMobility.
en.help_to_user: Provides robots with multiple alternative trajectories for articulated object manipulation, enabling adaptation to real-world constraints and unexpected changes.

idea_spark.idea: Combine sparse reward exploration with trajectory primitive generation to automatically discover multiple effective manipulation strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Generated trajectories may fail in complex real-world environments due to physical discrepancies; robustness needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological movement diversity, robots should maintain a repertoire of action alternatives to cope with environmental variations.

papers.title: Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus for Prohibitively Large Datasets
papers.summary: We introduce NONSAC (Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus), a general framework for robust and scalable model estimation from arbitrarily large datasets contaminated with noise and outliers. NONSAC repeatedly samples non-minimal subsets of data and generates model hypotheses using a robust estimator, producing multiple candidate models. The final model is selected based on a predefined scoring rule that evaluates hypothesis quality. Our framework is estimator-agnostic and can be integrated with existing geometric fitting algorithms such as RANSAC to improve both scalability and robustness to outliers. We propose and evaluate various scoring rules for NONSAC on relative camera pose estimation, Perspective-n-Point, and point cloud registration. Furthermore, we showcase the applicability of NONSAC to correspondence-free point cloud registration by hypothesizing all-to-all correspondences.

ai.tldr: 提出NONSAC框架，通过非最小子集采样和鲁棒估计器，实现大规模含噪和离群点数据的高效鲁棒模型估计。
ai.motivation: 现有RANSAC等方法在大规模数据集上计算成本高，且对离群点敏感，需要更可扩展的鲁棒估计方案。
ai.method: 重复采样非最小子集，使用鲁棒估计器生成多个候选模型，基于评分规则选择最终模型。框架与估计器无关，可集成RANSAC等算法。
ai.result: 在相对相机位姿估计、PnP和点云配准任务上验证了多种评分规则的有效性，并展示了在无对应点云配准中的应用。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的鲁棒模型估计方法，适用于大规模几何拟合问题，帮助用户处理高离群点率数据。

idea_spark.idea: 结合深度学习特征与NONSAC，实现端到端的鲁棒几何匹配。
idea_spark.risk: 非最小子集可能引入更多离群点，需谨慎设计评分规则。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受RANSAC启发，但通过非最小采样提升效率，类似思想可用于其他随机采样算法。

zh.tldr: 提出NONSAC框架，通过非最小子集采样和鲁棒估计器，实现大规模含噪和离群点数据的高效鲁棒模型估计。
zh.motivation: 现有RANSAC等方法在大规模数据集上计算成本高，且对离群点敏感，需要更可扩展的鲁棒估计方案。
zh.method: 重复采样非最小子集，使用鲁棒估计器生成多个候选模型，基于评分规则选择最终模型。框架与估计器无关，可集成RANSAC等算法。
zh.result: 在相对相机位姿估计、PnP和点云配准任务上验证了多种评分规则的有效性，并展示了在无对应点云配准中的应用。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的鲁棒模型估计方法，适用于大规模几何拟合问题，帮助用户处理高离群点率数据。

idea_spark.risk: 非最小子集可能引入更多离群点，需谨慎设计评分规则。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受RANSAC启发，但通过非最小采样提升效率，类似思想可用于其他随机采样算法。

en.tldr: Introduces NONSAC, a general framework for robust and scalable model estimation from arbitrarily large datasets with noise and outliers via non-minimal sampling and consensus.
en.motivation: Existing methods like RANSAC are computationally expensive on large datasets and sensitive to outliers, requiring a more scalable robust estimation approach.
en.method: Repeatedly sample non-minimal subsets, generate model hypotheses using a robust estimator, and select the final model based on a scoring rule. The framework is estimator-agnostic and integrable with RANSAC.
en.result: Validated on relative camera pose estimation, Perspective-n-Point, and point cloud registration with various scoring rules, and demonstrated applicability to correspondence-free point cloud registration.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable robust model estimation method for large-scale geometric fitting problems, helping users handle high outlier rates.

idea_spark.idea: Combine deep learning features with NONSAC for end-to-end robust geometric matching.
idea_spark.risk: Non-minimal subsets may introduce more outliers, requiring careful design of scoring rules.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by RANSAC but improves efficiency via non-minimal sampling; similar ideas could apply to other random sampling algorithms.

papers.title: CognitiveTwin: Robust Multi-Modal Digital Twins for Predicting Cognitive Decline in Alzheimer's Disease
papers.summary: Predicting individual cognitive decline in Alzheimer's disease (AD) is difficult due to the heterogeneity of disease progression. Reliable clinical tools require not only high accuracy but also fairness across demographics and robustness to missing data. We present CognitiveTwin, a digital twin framework that predicts patient-specific cognitive trajectories. The model integrates multi-modal longitudinal data (cognitive scores, magnetic resonance imaging, positron emission tomography, cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers, and genetics). We use a Transformer-based architecture to fuse these modalities and a Deep Markov Model to capture temporal dynamics. We trained and evaluated the framework using data from 1,666 patients in the TADPOLE (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) dataset. We assessed the model for prediction error, demographic fairness, and robustness to missing-not-at-random (MNAR) data patterns. ognitiveTwin provides accurate and personalized predictions of cognitive decline. Its demonstrated fairness across patient demographics and resilience to clinical dropout make it a reliable tool for clinical trial enrichment and personalized care planning.

ai.tldr: 提出CognitiveTwin数字孪生框架，融合多模态纵向数据预测阿尔茨海默病个体认知衰退，兼顾准确性、公平性和缺失数据鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展异质性大，现有工具难以同时实现高精度、跨人口公平性和对缺失数据的鲁棒性。
ai.method: 采用Transformer融合多模态数据（认知评分、MRI、PET、脑脊液生物标志物、遗传学），结合深度马尔可夫模型捕捉时间动态。
ai.result: 在TADPOLE数据集（1666名患者）上验证，预测准确、公平，且对非随机缺失数据具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助临床医生为患者制定个性化护理计划，并优化临床试验的受试者筛选。

idea_spark.idea: 将框架扩展至多中心数据，并引入可解释性模块以揭示关键生物标志物。
idea_spark.risk: 多模态数据获取成本高，且模型在真实临床环境中的部署需考虑隐私和计算资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合强化学习动态调整干预策略，实现闭环个性化治疗推荐。

zh.tldr: 提出CognitiveTwin数字孪生框架，融合多模态纵向数据预测阿尔茨海默病个体认知衰退，兼顾准确性、公平性和缺失数据鲁棒性。
zh.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展异质性大，现有工具难以同时实现高精度、跨人口公平性和对缺失数据的鲁棒性。

zh.result: 在TADPOLE数据集（1666名患者）上验证，预测准确、公平，且对非随机缺失数据具有鲁棒性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助临床医生为患者制定个性化护理计划，并优化临床试验的受试者筛选。

idea_spark.idea: 将框架扩展至多中心数据，并引入可解释性模块以揭示关键生物标志物。
idea_spark.risk: 多模态数据获取成本高，且模型在真实临床环境中的部署需考虑隐私和计算资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合强化学习动态调整干预策略，实现闭环个性化治疗推荐。

en.tldr: Proposes CognitiveTwin, a digital twin framework integrating multi-modal longitudinal data to predict individual cognitive decline in Alzheimer's disease, with high accuracy, demographic fairness, and robustness to missing data.
en.motivation: Heterogeneity of Alzheimer's disease progression makes it challenging to achieve high accuracy, fairness across demographics, and robustness to missing data simultaneously.
en.method: Uses a Transformer to fuse multi-modal data (cognitive scores, MRI, PET, CSF biomarkers, genetics) and a Deep Markov Model to capture temporal dynamics.
en.result: Validated on the TADPOLE dataset (1,666 patients), demonstrating accurate, fair predictions and robustness to missing-not-at-random patterns.
en.help_to_user: Assists clinicians in personalized care planning and optimizes patient selection for clinical trials.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the framework to multi-center data and incorporate interpretability modules to identify key biomarkers.
idea_spark.risk: High cost of multi-modal data acquisition and deployment challenges in real-world clinical settings regarding privacy and computational resources.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine with reinforcement learning to dynamically adjust intervention strategies for closed-loop personalized treatment recommendations.

papers.title: ArchSym: Detecting 3D-Grounded Architectural Symmetries in the Wild
papers.summary: Symmetry detection is a fundamental problem in computer vision, and symmetries serve as powerful priors for downstream tasks. However, existing learning-based methods for detecting 3D symmetries from single images have been almost exclusively trained and evaluated on object-centric or synthetic datasets, and thus fail to generalize to real-world scenes. Furthermore, due to the inherent scale ambiguity of monocular inputs, which makes localizing the 3D plane an ill-posed problem, many existing works only predict the plane's orientation. In this paper, we address these limitations by presenting the first framework for detecting 3D-grounded reflectional symmetries from single, in-the-wild RGB images, focusing on architectural landmarks. We introduce two key innovations: (1) a scalable data annotation pipeline to automatically curate a large-scale dataset of architectural symmetries, ArchSym, from SfM reconstructions by leveraging cross-view image matching; and building on the dataset, (2) a single-view symmetry detector that accurately localizes symmetries in 3D by parameterizing them as signed distance maps defined relative to predicted scene geometry. We validate our symmetry annotation pipeline against geometry-based alternatives and demonstrate that our symmetry detector significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on our new benchmark.

ai.tldr: 提出首个从单张野外RGB图像检测建筑3D反射对称性的框架，包含自动标注数据集和基于场景几何的对称检测器。
ai.motivation: 现有方法局限于物体中心或合成数据集，无法泛化到真实场景，且单目输入存在尺度模糊导致3D平面定位困难。
ai.method: 利用SfM重建和跨视图图像匹配自动构建大规模建筑对称数据集ArchSym；将对称性参数化为相对于预测场景几何的有符号距离图。
ai.result: 标注管线优于几何基线，对称检测器在新基准上显著超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从单张建筑照片中自动检测3D对称平面，可用于三维重建、场景理解等下游任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将对称检测与深度估计联合学习，利用对称性约束提升单目深度预测精度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖SfM重建质量，对纹理稀疏或重复图案场景可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 跨视图匹配自动生成标注的思路可推广至其他几何属性（如平面、直线）的弱监督学习。

zh.tldr: 提出首个从单张野外RGB图像检测建筑3D反射对称性的框架，包含自动标注数据集和基于场景几何的对称检测器。
zh.motivation: 现有方法局限于物体中心或合成数据集，无法泛化到真实场景，且单目输入存在尺度模糊导致3D平面定位困难。

zh.result: 标注管线优于几何基线，对称检测器在新基准上显著超越现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户从单张建筑照片中自动检测3D对称平面，可用于三维重建、场景理解等下游任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将对称检测与深度估计联合学习，利用对称性约束提升单目深度预测精度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖SfM重建质量，对纹理稀疏或重复图案场景可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 跨视图匹配自动生成标注的思路可推广至其他几何属性（如平面、直线）的弱监督学习。

en.tldr: First framework for detecting 3D-grounded reflectional symmetries from single in-the-wild RGB images of architectural landmarks, with an automatic annotation pipeline and a geometry-aware detector.
en.motivation: Existing methods are trained on object-centric or synthetic datasets and fail on real scenes; monocular scale ambiguity makes 3D plane localization ill-posed.
en.method: Leverages SfM reconstructions and cross-view image matching to build a large-scale architectural symmetry dataset (ArchSym); parameterizes symmetries as signed distance maps relative to predicted scene geometry.
en.result: Annotation pipeline outperforms geometry-based alternatives; symmetry detector significantly surpasses state-of-the-art baselines on the new benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Enables automatic detection of 3D symmetry planes from a single architectural photo, aiding 3D reconstruction and scene understanding.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly learn symmetry detection and depth estimation, using symmetry constraints to improve monocular depth prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on SfM reconstruction quality; may fail on texture-poor or repetitive patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Cross-view matching for automatic annotation can be extended to weakly supervised learning of other geometric properties (e.g., planes, lines).

papers.title: CLARITY: A Framework and Benchmark for Conversational Language Ambiguity and Unanswerability in Interactive NL2SQL Systems
papers.summary: NL2SQL systems deployed in industry settings often encounter ambiguous or unanswerable queries, particularly in interactive scenarios with incomplete user clarification. Existing benchmarks typically assume a single source of ambiguity and rely on user interaction for resolution, overlooking realistic failure modes.   We introduce Clarity, a framework for automatically generating an NL2SQL benchmark with multi-faceted ambiguities and diverse user behaviors across both single- and multi-turn settings. Using a constraint-driven pipeline, Clarity transforms executable SQL into ambiguous queries, augmented with grounded conversational continuations and schema-level metadata.   Empirical evaluation on Spider and BIRD shows that leading NL2SQL systems, including those based on strong LLMs, suffer significant performance degradation under multi-faceted ambiguity. While these systems often detect ambiguity, they struggle to accurately localize and resolve the underlying schema-level sources. Our results highlight the need for more robust ambiguity detection and resolution in industry-grade NL2SQL systems.

ai.tldr: 提出CLARITY框架，自动生成包含多面歧义和用户行为的NL2SQL基准，揭示现有系统在歧义检测和定位上的不足。
ai.motivation: 现有NL2SQL基准假设单一歧义源并依赖用户交互，忽略实际部署中的多面歧义和未澄清查询。
ai.method: 通过约束驱动流水线，将可执行SQL转换为歧义查询，并添加对话延续和模式级元数据。
ai.result: 在Spider和BIRD上评估，领先NL2SQL系统（包括强LLM）在多面歧义下性能显著下降，虽能检测歧义但难以准确定位和解决。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和工程师理解交互式NL2SQL中歧义和不可回答性的挑战，并提供测试基准。

idea_spark.idea: 结合用户行为模拟和模式级元数据，自动生成多面歧义测试集。
idea_spark.risk: 生成的歧义可能无法完全覆盖真实场景的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从实际部署中用户未澄清查询的失败模式出发，设计更鲁棒的歧义处理机制。

zh.tldr: 提出CLARITY框架，自动生成包含多面歧义和用户行为的NL2SQL基准，揭示现有系统在歧义检测和定位上的不足。
zh.motivation: 现有NL2SQL基准假设单一歧义源并依赖用户交互，忽略实际部署中的多面歧义和未澄清查询。

zh.result: 在Spider和BIRD上评估，领先NL2SQL系统（包括强LLM）在多面歧义下性能显著下降，虽能检测歧义但难以准确定位和解决。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和工程师理解交互式NL2SQL中歧义和不可回答性的挑战，并提供测试基准。

idea_spark.idea: 结合用户行为模拟和模式级元数据，自动生成多面歧义测试集。
idea_spark.risk: 生成的歧义可能无法完全覆盖真实场景的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从实际部署中用户未澄清查询的失败模式出发，设计更鲁棒的歧义处理机制。

en.tldr: Introduces CLARITY, a framework to automatically generate an NL2SQL benchmark with multi-faceted ambiguities and user behaviors, revealing that leading systems struggle with ambiguity localization and resolution.
en.motivation: Existing NL2SQL benchmarks assume single-source ambiguity and rely on user interaction, ignoring realistic multi-faceted ambiguities and unclarified queries in deployment.
en.method: A constraint-driven pipeline transforms executable SQL into ambiguous queries, augmented with conversational continuations and schema-level metadata.
en.result: Evaluation on Spider and BIRD shows leading NL2SQL systems, including strong LLMs, suffer significant performance degradation under multi-faceted ambiguity; they detect ambiguity but fail to accurately localize and resolve it.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers and engineers understand challenges of ambiguity and unanswerability in interactive NL2SQL, and provides a benchmark for testing.

idea_spark.idea: Automatically generate multi-faceted ambiguity test sets by combining user behavior simulation and schema-level metadata.
idea_spark.risk: Generated ambiguities may not fully cover the complexity of real-world scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from failure modes of unclarified user queries in real deployments to design more robust ambiguity handling mechanisms.

papers.title: When Does LLM Self-Correction Help? A Control-Theoretic Markov Diagnostic and Verify-First Intervention
papers.summary: Iterative self-correction is widely used in agentic LLM systems, but when repeated refinement helps versus hurts remains unclear. We frame self-correction as a cybernetic feedback loop in which the same language model serves as both controller and plant, and use a two-state Markov model over {Correct, Incorrect} to operationalize a simple deployment diagnostic: iterate only when ECR/EIR > Acc/(1 - Acc). In this view, EIR functions as a stability margin and prompting functions as lightweight controller design. Across 7 models and 3 datasets (GSM8K, MATH, StrategyQA), we find a sharp near-zero EIR threshold (<= 0.5%) separating beneficial from harmful self-correction. Only o3-mini (+3.4 pp, EIR = 0%), Claude Opus 4.6 (+0.6 pp, EIR ~ 0.2%), and o4-mini (+/-0 pp) remain non-degrading; GPT-5 degrades by -1.8 pp. A verify-first prompt ablation provides causal evidence that this threshold is actionable through prompting alone: on GPT-4o-mini it reduces EIR from 2% to 0% and turns -6.2 pp degradation into +0.2 pp (paired McNemar p < 10^-4), while producing little change on already-sub-threshold models. ASC further illustrates the stopping trade-off: it halts harmful refinement but incurs a 3.8 pp confidence-elicitation cost. Overall, the paper argues that self-correction should be treated not as a default behavior, but as a control decision governed by measurable error dynamics.

ai.tldr: 将LLM自我修正建模为控制论反馈回路，提出基于马尔可夫模型的诊断指标EIR，发现仅当EIR低于阈值时迭代修正才有益，并通过验证优先提示干预实现因果验证。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM自我修正方法效果不稳定，缺乏何时应进行迭代修正的明确指导。
ai.method: 将自我修正视为同一LLM同时作为控制器和被控对象的控制论反馈回路，用两状态马尔可夫模型（正确/错误）定义诊断指标EIR，并设计验证优先提示消融实验。
ai.result: 在7个模型和3个数据集上，EIR阈值约0.5%区分有益与有害修正；仅o3-mini、Claude Opus 4.6和o4-mini不退化；验证优先提示可将GPT-4o-mini的EIR从2%降至0%，性能从-6.2 pp转为+0.2 pp。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可操作的诊断规则和轻量级提示干预方法，帮助用户决定是否对LLM输出进行迭代修正。

idea_spark.idea: 将EIR作为在线监控指标，动态决定是否继续迭代修正，避免无益计算。
idea_spark.risk: 阈值可能依赖模型和数据集，需重新校准；验证优先提示可能增加推理成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将AI系统行为建模为控制问题，用稳定性裕度指导干预决策。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将AI系统行为建模为控制问题，用稳定性裕度指导干预决策。

en.tldr: Frames LLM self-correction as a cybernetic feedback loop, proposes a Markov-based diagnostic (EIR), and shows that iteration helps only when EIR is below a threshold; a verify-first prompt intervention causally improves performance.
en.motivation: Iterative self-correction in LLMs yields inconsistent results, and there is no clear guidance on when to iterate.
en.method: Models self-correction as a control-theoretic feedback loop with the same LLM as controller and plant, uses a two-state Markov model to define EIR, and conducts a verify-first prompt ablation.
en.result: Across 7 models and 3 datasets, a sharp EIR threshold (~0.5%) separates beneficial from harmful correction; only o3-mini, Claude Opus 4.6, and o4-mini avoid degradation; verify-first prompting reduces GPT-4o-mini's EIR from 2% to 0% and turns -6.2 pp degradation into +0.2 pp.
en.help_to_user: Provides an actionable diagnostic rule and a lightweight prompt intervention to decide whether to apply iterative self-correction.

idea_spark.idea: Use EIR as an online monitoring metric to dynamically decide whether to continue iterative refinement, avoiding wasteful computation.
idea_spark.risk: Threshold may depend on model and dataset, requiring recalibration; verify-first prompting may increase inference cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat AI system behavior as a control problem and use stability margins to guide intervention decisions.

papers.title: PASR: Pose-Aware 3D Shape Retrieval from Occluded Single Views
papers.summary: Single-view 3D shape retrieval is a fundamental yet challenging task that is increasingly important with the growth of available 3D data. Existing approaches largely fall into two categories: those using contrastive learning to map point cloud features into existing vision-language spaces and those that learn a common embedding space for 2D images and 3D shapes. However, these feed-forward, holistic alignments are often difficult to interpret, which in turn limits their robustness and generalization to real-world applications. To address this problem, we propose Pose-Aware 3D Shape Retrieval (PASR), a framework that formulates retrieval as a feature-level analysis-by-synthesis problem by distilling knowledge from a 2D foundation model (DINOv3) into a 3D encoder. By aligning pose-conditioned 3D projections with 2D feature maps, our method bridges the gap between real-world images and synthetic meshes. During inference, PASR performs a test-time optimization via analysis-by-synthesis, jointly searching for the shape and pose that best reconstruct the patch-level feature map of the input image. This synthesis-based optimization is inherently robust to partial occlusion and sensitive to fine-grained geometric details. PASR substantially outperforms existing methods on both clean and occluded 3D shape retrieval datasets by a wide margin. Additionally, PASR demonstrates strong multi-task capabilities, achieving robust shape retrieval, competitive pose estimation, and accurate category classification within a single framework.

ai.tldr: 提出PASR框架，通过分析-合成和2D基础模型知识蒸馏，实现从遮挡单视图进行姿态感知的3D形状检索。
ai.motivation: 现有单视图3D形状检索方法缺乏可解释性，对遮挡和真实场景泛化能力有限。
ai.method: 将2D基础模型DINOv2的知识蒸馏到3D编码器，在推理时通过分析-合成进行测试时优化，联合搜索最佳形状和姿态以重建输入图像的patch级特征图。
ai.result: 在干净和遮挡数据集上大幅超越现有方法，同时实现鲁棒的形状检索、竞争性的姿态估计和准确的类别分类。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从单张遮挡图像中检索对应的3D形状，并同时获得姿态和类别信息。

idea_spark.idea: 利用2D基础模型的特征作为桥梁，通过特征级分析-合成实现跨模态对齐，无需配对数据。
idea_spark.risk: 测试时优化可能增加推理时间，对实时应用不友好；依赖基础模型的特征质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将检索问题转化为特征重建问题，利用生成式思想提升判别式任务的鲁棒性。

en.tldr: Proposes PASR, a pose-aware 3D shape retrieval framework from occluded single views via analysis-by-synthesis and knowledge distillation from a 2D foundation model.
en.motivation: Existing single-view 3D shape retrieval methods lack interpretability and robustness to occlusion and real-world generalization.
en.method: Distills knowledge from 2D foundation model DINOv2 into a 3D encoder, and performs test-time optimization via analysis-by-synthesis to jointly search for shape and pose that best reconstruct the patch-level feature map of the input image.
en.result: Substantially outperforms existing methods on both clean and occluded datasets, while achieving robust shape retrieval, competitive pose estimation, and accurate category classification.
en.help_to_user: Helps users retrieve the corresponding 3D shape from a single occluded image, along with pose and category information.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage features from a 2D foundation model as a bridge for cross-modal alignment via feature-level analysis-by-synthesis without paired data.
idea_spark.risk: Test-time optimization may increase inference time, making it less suitable for real-time applications; relies on the quality of foundation model features.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulate retrieval as a feature reconstruction problem, using generative ideas to enhance robustness of discriminative tasks.

papers.title: Resource-Aware Layered Intrusion Detection Allocation Model
papers.summary: This paper proposes a resource-aware allocation model for layered intrusion detection in het erogeneous networks. Monitoring traffic at higher protocol layers improves the ability to detect sophisticated attacks, but it also increases computational and storage costs. The problem is formu lated as an integer linear program that assigns a single monitoring depth, ranging from Ethernet to the application layer, to each device, while accounting for device importance, attack probability, layer-dependent detection rates, and per-layer monitoring costs. The model further enforces a global resource budget, a minimum monitoring level for critical devices, and maximum-feasibility limits for constrained devices such as simple IoT sensors. The formulation is solved with the SCIP optimization framework on a small heterogeneous network of six devices, and the resulting allocation illustrates how the model concentrates monitoring effort on important and high-risk devices while respecting feasibility and budget constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出一种资源感知的分层入侵检测分配模型，通过整数线性规划为异构网络中的设备分配监控深度，在预算和可行性约束下优先监控重要和高风险设备。
ai.motivation: 高层协议监控能检测复杂攻击，但计算和存储成本高，需在资源有限下优化分配。
ai.method: 构建整数线性规划模型，考虑设备重要性、攻击概率、层相关检测率和监控成本，并施加全局资源预算、关键设备最低监控级别和受限设备最大可行性限制，使用SCIP求解。
ai.result: 在六设备小型异构网络上验证，模型在满足预算和可行性约束下，将监控资源集中于重要和高风险设备。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全管理员在资源受限的异构网络中智能分配入侵检测监控深度，平衡检测能力与成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合动态威胁情报更新攻击概率和检测率，使分配模型自适应实时风险变化。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖准确的攻击概率和检测率估计，不准确数据可能导致次优分配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将整数线性规划与分层监控结合，为资源受限环境下的安全决策提供量化优化思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a resource-aware allocation model for layered intrusion detection in heterogeneous networks, using integer linear programming to assign monitoring depth per device under budget and feasibility constraints, prioritizing important and high-risk devices.
en.motivation: Higher-layer monitoring detects sophisticated attacks but incurs high computational and storage costs, necessitating optimal allocation under resource constraints.
en.method: Formulates an integer linear program considering device importance, attack probability, layer-dependent detection rates, and monitoring costs, with global resource budget, minimum monitoring for critical devices, and maximum-feasibility limits for constrained devices, solved via SCIP.
en.result: Validated on a small heterogeneous network of six devices, the model concentrates monitoring effort on important and high-risk devices while respecting feasibility and budget constraints.
en.help_to_user: Helps security administrators intelligently allocate intrusion detection monitoring depth in resource-constrained heterogeneous networks, balancing detection capability and cost.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate dynamic threat intelligence to update attack probabilities and detection rates, enabling the allocation model to adapt to real-time risk changes.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on accurate estimates of attack probabilities and detection rates; inaccurate data may lead to suboptimal allocation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining integer linear programming with layered monitoring provides a quantitative optimization approach for security decision-making in resource-constrained environments.

papers.title: Dharma, Data and Deception: An LLM-Powered Rhetorical Analysis of Cow-Urine Health Claims on YouTube
papers.summary: Health misinformation remains one of the most pressing challenges on social media, particularly when cultural traditions intersect with scientific-sounding claims. These dynamics are not only global but also deeply local, manifesting in culturally specific controversies that require careful analysis. Motivated by this, we examine 100 YouTube transcripts that promote or debunk cow urine (gomutra) as a health remedy, focusing on rhetorical strategies such as appeals to authority, efficacy appeals, and conspiracy framing. We employ large language models (LLMs) including GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and Mistral Medium 3 to annotate transcripts using a 14-category taxonomy of persuasive tactics. Our analysis reveals that promoters predominantly rely on efficacy appeals and social proof, while debunkers emphasize authority and rebuttal. Human evaluation of a subset of annotations yielded 90.1\% inter-annotator agreement, confirming the reliability of our taxonomy and validation process. This work advances computational methods for misinformation analysis and demonstrates how LLMs can support large-scale studies of cultural discourse online.

ai.tldr: 利用大语言模型分析YouTube上关于牛尿健康主张的修辞策略，发现支持者多用功效诉求和社会证明，反驳者强调权威和反驳。
ai.motivation: 健康虚假信息在社交媒体上泛滥，尤其是当文化传统与科学主张交织时，需要针对特定文化争议进行细致分析。
ai.method: 收集100个YouTube视频转录文本，使用GPT-4、GPT-4o、GPT-4.1、GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro和Mistral Medium 3等大语言模型，基于14类说服策略分类体系进行标注。
ai.result: 支持者主要依赖功效诉求和社会证明，反驳者强调权威和反驳；人工评估子集标注一致性达90.1%。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何利用大语言模型大规模分析文化语境下的虚假信息修辞策略，为跨文化研究提供方法论参考。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多模态数据（视频、评论）进一步分析修辞策略的传播效果。
idea_spark.risk: 大语言模型可能放大训练数据中的文化偏见，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发开发针对特定文化背景的虚假信息检测工具，融合修辞分析与事实核查。

en.tldr: Using LLMs to analyze rhetorical strategies in YouTube videos about cow urine health claims, finding promoters rely on efficacy appeals and social proof, while debunkers emphasize authority and rebuttal.
en.motivation: Health misinformation on social media is a pressing challenge, especially when cultural traditions intersect with scientific-sounding claims, requiring culturally specific analysis.
en.method: Collected 100 YouTube transcripts, annotated with GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and Mistral Medium 3 using a 14-category taxonomy of persuasive tactics.
en.result: Promoters predominantly use efficacy appeals and social proof; debunkers emphasize authority and rebuttal. Human evaluation achieved 90.1% inter-annotator agreement.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how LLMs can support large-scale analysis of rhetorical strategies in culturally contextualized misinformation, offering a methodological template.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate multimodal data (videos, comments) to study the propagation effects of rhetorical strategies.
idea_spark.risk: LLMs may amplify cultural biases present in training data; careful validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires development of culturally-aware misinformation detection tools that combine rhetorical analysis with fact-checking.

papers.title: Generative Modeling of Neurodegenerative Brain Anatomy with 4D Longitudinal Diffusion Model
papers.summary: Understanding and predicting the progression of neurodegenerative diseases remains a major challenge in medical AI, with significant implications for early diagnosis, disease monitoring, and treatment planning. However, most available longitudinal neuroimaging datasets are temporally sparse with a few follow-up scans per subject. This scarcity of temporal data limits our ability to model and accurately capture the continuous anatomical changes related to disease progression in individual subjects. To address this problem, we propose a novel 4D (3DxT) diffusion-based generative framework that effectively models and synthesizes longitudinal brain anatomy over time, conditioned on available clinical variables such as health status, age, sex, and other relevant factors. Moreover, while most current approaches focus on manipulating image intensity or texture, our method explicitly learns the data distribution of topology-preserving spatiotemporal deformations to effectively capture the geometric changes of brain structures over time. This design enables the realistic generation of future anatomical states and the reconstruction of anatomically consistent disease trajectories, providing a more faithful representation of longitudinal brain changes. We validate our model through both synthetic sequence generation and downstream longitudinal disease classification, as well as brain segmentation. Experiments on two large-scale longitudinal neuroimage datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in generating anatomically accurate, temporally consistent, and clinically meaningful brain trajectories. Our code is available on Github.

ai.tldr: 提出一种4D扩散生成模型，利用稀疏纵向神经影像和临床变量，合成连续、拓扑保持的脑结构变化轨迹。
ai.motivation: 现有纵向数据集时间稀疏，难以准确建模个体疾病进展的连续解剖变化。
ai.method: 构建3D+T扩散框架，学习拓扑保持的时空变形分布，以临床变量为条件生成未来脑解剖状态。
ai.result: 在两个大规模数据集上，生成的脑轨迹在解剖准确性、时间一致性和临床意义方面优于现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员生成连续、真实的脑萎缩轨迹，用于早期诊断、疾病监测和治疗规划。

idea_spark.idea: 结合可逆变形场与扩散模型，实现解剖一致性的长期轨迹外推。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端稀疏或不规则时间点数据，模型可能产生不合理的变形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用拓扑保持约束确保生成轨迹的解剖合理性，启发其他医学时间序列生成任务。

idea_spark.risk: 对极端稀疏或不规则时间点数据，模型可能产生不合理的变形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用拓扑保持约束确保生成轨迹的解剖合理性，启发其他医学时间序列生成任务。

en.tldr: A 4D diffusion generative model synthesizes continuous, topology-preserving brain structure trajectories from sparse longitudinal neuroimaging and clinical variables.
en.motivation: Existing longitudinal datasets are temporally sparse, limiting the ability to model continuous anatomical changes in individual disease progression.
en.method: A 3D+T diffusion framework learns topology-preserving spatiotemporal deformation distributions conditioned on clinical variables to generate future brain anatomy states.
en.result: On two large-scale datasets, the generated brain trajectories outperform baselines in anatomical accuracy, temporal consistency, and clinical meaningfulness.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers generate continuous, realistic brain atrophy trajectories for early diagnosis, disease monitoring, and treatment planning.

idea_spark.idea: Combine invertible deformation fields with diffusion models to achieve anatomically consistent long-term trajectory extrapolation.
idea_spark.risk: With extremely sparse or irregular time points, the model may produce unrealistic deformations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Topology-preserving constraints ensure anatomical plausibility of generated trajectories, inspiring other medical time-series generation tasks.

papers.title: Bridging the Long-Tail Gap: Robust Retrieval-Augmented Relation Completion via Multi-Stage Paraphrase Infusion
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) struggle with relation completion (RC), both with and without retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), particularly when the required information is rare or sparsely represented. To address this, we propose a novel multi-stage paraphrase-guided relation-completion framework, RC-RAG, that systematically incorporates relation paraphrases across multiple stages. In particular, RC-RAG: (a) integrates paraphrases into retrieval to expand lexical coverage of the relation, (b) uses paraphrases to generate relation-aware summaries, and (c) leverages paraphrases during generation to guide reasoning for relation completion. Importantly, our method does not require any model fine-tuning. Experiments with five LLMs on two benchmark datasets show that RC-RAG consistently outperforms several RAG baselines. In long-tail settings, the best-performing LLM augmented with RC-RAG improves by 40.6 Exact Match (EM) points over its standalone performance and surpasses two strong RAG baselines by 16.0 and 13.8 EM points, respectively, while maintaining low computational overhead.

ai.tldr: 提出RC-RAG框架，通过多阶段释义注入提升大语言模型在长尾关系补全任务上的性能，无需微调。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型在关系补全任务中表现不佳，尤其当所需信息罕见或稀疏时，现有RAG方法也难以应对长尾问题。
ai.method: RC-RAG在检索、摘要和生成三个阶段系统性地融入关系释义：检索阶段扩展词汇覆盖，摘要阶段生成关系感知摘要，生成阶段引导推理。
ai.result: 在五个大语言模型和两个基准数据集上，RC-RAG一致优于多个RAG基线；最佳模型在长尾设置下EM提升40.6点，超越强基线16.0和13.8点，计算开销低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过多阶段释义注入提升检索增强生成在长尾关系补全中的效果，无需额外训练。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将释义注入与动态知识图谱结合，或用于跨语言关系补全。
idea_spark.risk: 释义质量可能影响性能，且多阶段设计可能增加系统复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类利用同义表达检索信息的启发，将释义系统性地融入RAG各阶段。

zh.result: 在五个大语言模型和两个基准数据集上，RC-RAG一致优于多个RAG基线；最佳模型在长尾设置下EM提升40.6点，超越强基线16.0和13.8点，计算开销低。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过多阶段释义注入提升检索增强生成在长尾关系补全中的效果，无需额外训练。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将释义注入与动态知识图谱结合，或用于跨语言关系补全。
idea_spark.risk: 释义质量可能影响性能，且多阶段设计可能增加系统复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类利用同义表达检索信息的启发，将释义系统性地融入RAG各阶段。

en.tldr: Proposes RC-RAG, a multi-stage paraphrase infusion framework that robustly improves relation completion for LLMs under long-tail settings without fine-tuning.
en.motivation: LLMs struggle with relation completion, especially for rare or sparse information, and existing RAG methods fail to bridge the long-tail gap.
en.method: RC-RAG systematically incorporates relation paraphrases in three stages: retrieval (expanding lexical coverage), summarization (generating relation-aware summaries), and generation (guiding reasoning).
en.result: On five LLMs and two benchmarks, RC-RAG consistently outperforms multiple RAG baselines; the best model achieves 40.6 EM improvement over standalone LLM and surpasses strong baselines by 16.0 and 13.8 EM points with low computational overhead.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how multi-stage paraphrase infusion enhances retrieval-augmented generation for long-tail relation completion without additional training.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining paraphrase infusion with dynamic knowledge graphs or applying it to cross-lingual relation completion.
idea_spark.risk: Paraphrase quality may affect performance, and the multi-stage design could increase system complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how humans use synonymous expressions to retrieve information, systematically integrating paraphrases into all RAG stages.

papers.title: How Do AI Agents Spend Your Money? Analyzing and Predicting Token Consumption in Agentic Coding Tasks
papers.summary: The wide adoption of AI agents in complex human workflows is driving rapid growth in LLM token consumption. When agents are deployed on tasks that require a significant amount of tokens, three questions naturally arise: (1) Where do AI agents spend the tokens? (2) Which models are more token-efficient? and (3) Can agents predict their token usage before task execution? In this paper, we present the first systematic study of token consumption patterns in agentic coding tasks. We analyze trajectories from eight frontier LLMs on SWE-bench Verified and evaluate models' ability to predict their own token costs before task execution. We find that: (1) agentic tasks are uniquely expensive, consuming 1000x more tokens than code reasoning and code chat, with input tokens rather than output tokens driving the overall cost; (2) token usage is highly variable and inherently stochastic: runs on the same task can differ by up to 30x in total tokens, and higher token usage does not translate into higher accuracy; instead, accuracy often peaks at intermediate cost and saturates at higher costs; (3) models vary substantially in token efficiency: on the same tasks, Kimi-K2 and Claude-Sonnet-4.5, on average, consume over 1.5 million more tokens than GPT-5; (4) task difficulty rated by human experts only weakly aligns with actual token costs, revealing a fundamental gap between human-perceived complexity and the computational effort agents actually expend; and (5) frontier models fail to accurately predict their own token usage (with weak-to-moderate correlations, up to 0.39) and systematically underestimate real token costs. Our study offers new insights into the economics of AI agents and can inspire future research in this direction.

ai.tldr: 首次系统研究AI智能体在编码任务中的token消耗模式，发现任务消耗是代码推理的1000倍，输入token主导成本，token使用高度随机且与准确率无正相关，前沿模型难以预测自身token消耗。
ai.motivation: AI智能体在复杂工作流中广泛部署，token消耗快速增长，但缺乏对消耗模式、效率和预测能力的系统理解。
ai.method: 在SWE-bench Verified上分析8个前沿LLM的轨迹，评估模型在执行前预测自身token成本的能力。
ai.result: 智能体任务消耗token是代码推理的1000倍；同一任务token差异可达30倍；高消耗不带来高准确率；模型间效率差异大；人类难度评级与真实成本弱相关；模型预测能力弱（相关系数最高0.39），且系统低估成本。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI智能体的token经济性，选择高效模型，并意识到成本预测的不可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个轻量级预估算子，基于任务特征（如代码行数、依赖数量）快速估计token消耗，辅助用户决策。
idea_spark.risk: 预估算子可能因任务随机性而精度有限，且需大量标注数据训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用任务难度与成本之间的弱对齐，探索基于成本感知的任务分解策略，优化资源分配。
